authors_text: Xiao Zang,Miao Yin,Lingyi Huang,Jingjin Yu,Saman Zonouz,Bo Yuan
title: Robot Motion Planning as Video Prediction: A Spatio-Temporal Neural Network-based Motion Planner
title_zh: 作为视频预测的机器人运动规划：基于时空神经网络的运动规划器
abstract: Neural network (NN)-based methods have emerged as an attractive approach for robot motion planning due to strong learning capabilities of NN models and their inherently high parallelism. Despite the current development in this direction, the efficient capture and processing of important sequential and spatial information, in a direct and simultaneous way, is still relatively under-explored. To overcome the challenge and unlock the potentials of neural networks for motion planning tasks, in this paper, we propose STP-Net, an end-to-end learning framework that can fully extract and leverage important spatio-temporal information to form an efficient neural motion planner. By interpreting the movement of the robot as a video clip, robot motion planning is transformed to a video prediction task that can be performed by STP-Net in both spatially and temporally efficient ways. Empirical evaluations across different seen and unseen environments show that, with nearly 100% accuracy (aka, success rate), STP-Net demonstrates very promising performance with respect to both planning speed and path cost. Compared with existing NN-based motion planners, STP-Net achieves at least 5x, 2.6x and 1.8x faster speed with lower path cost on 2D Random Forest, 2D Maze and 3D Random Forest environments, respectively. Furthermore, STP-Net can quickly and simultaneously compute multiple near-optimal paths in multi-robot motion planning tasks
summary: Neural network (NN)-based methods have emerged as an attractive approach for robot motion planning due to strong learning capabilities of NN models and their inherently high parallelism. Despite the current development in this direction, the efficient capture and processing of important sequential and spatial information, in a direct and simultaneous way, is still relatively under-explored. To overcome the challenge and unlock the potentials of neural networks for motion planning tasks, in this paper, we propose STP-Net, an end-to-end learning framework that can fully extract and leverage important spatio-temporal information to form an efficient neural motion planner. By interpreting the movement of the robot as a video clip, robot motion planning is transformed to a video prediction task that can be performed by STP-Net in both spatially and temporally efficient ways. Empirical evaluations across different seen and unseen environments show that, with nearly 100% accuracy (aka, success rate), STP-Net demonstrates very promising performance with respect to both planning speed and path cost. Compared with existing NN-based motion planners, STP-Net achieves at least 5x, 2.6x and 1.8x faster speed with lower path cost on 2D Random Forest, 2D Maze and 3D Random Forest environments, respectively. Furthermore, STP-Net can quickly and simultaneously compute multiple near-optimal paths in multi-robot motion planning tasks
abstract_zh: 由于神经网络（NN）模型强大的学习能力及其固有的高并行性，基于神经网络（NN）的方法已成为机器人运动规划的一种有吸引力的方法。尽管目前在这个方向上取得了进展，但以直接和同时的方式有效捕获和处理重要的顺序和空间信息仍然相对不足。为了克服挑战并释放神经网络在运动规划任务中的潜力，在本文中，我们提出了 STP-Net，这是一种端到端学习框架，可以充分提取和利用重要的时空信息来形成高效的神经运动规划器。通过将机器人的运动解释为视频片段，机器人运动规划被转换为视频预测任务，该任务可以由 STP-Net 以空间和时间有效的方式执行。对不同可见和未见环境的实证评估表明，STP-Net 在规划速度和路径成本方面表现出非常有前景的性能，准确率接近 100%（即成功率）。与现有的基于神经网络的运动规划器相比，STP-Net 在 2D 随机森林、2D 迷宫和 3D 随机森林环境中分别实现了至少 5 倍、2.6 倍和 1.8 倍的速度提升和更低的路径成本。此外，STP-Net可以在多机器人运动规划任务中快速、同时计算多个接近最优的路径

AI.tldr: 本文提出STP-Net，将机器人运动规划转化为视频预测任务，通过时空神经网络框架实现高效的运动规划。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络运动规划方法未能有效同时捕捉时空信息，限制了其性能。需探索更高效的时空信息处理方式以提升规划效率。
AI.method: 将机器人运动视为视频片段，构建端到端的STP-Net框架，通过时空神经网络同时处理空间和时间信息，实现运动规划。
AI.result: 在多种环境中达到近100%成功率，相比现有方法速度提升5倍至2.6倍，路径成本更低，并可快速生成多机器人近优路径。
AI.conclusion: STP-Net通过视频预测视角有效利用时空信息，在运动规划速度和成本上显著优于现有方法，适用于复杂多机器人场景。

title: Resolving Matrix Spencer Conjecture Up to Poly-logarithmic Rank
title_zh: 将矩阵斯宾塞猜想求解至多对数阶
abstract: We give a simple proof of the matrix Spencer conjecture up to poly-logarithmic rank: given symmetric $d \times d$ matrices $A_1,\ldots,A_n$ each with $\|A_i\|_{\mathsf{op}} \leq 1$ and rank at most $n/\log^3 n$, one can efficiently find $\pm 1$ signs $x_1,\ldots,x_n$ such that their signed sum has spectral norm $\|\sum_{i=1}^n x_i A_i\|_{\mathsf{op}} = O(\sqrt{n})$. This result also implies a $\log n - Ω( \log \log n)$ qubit lower bound for quantum random access codes encoding $n$ classical bits with advantage $\gg 1/\sqrt{n}$. Our proof uses the recent refinement of the non-commutative Khintchine inequality in [Bandeira, Boedihardjo, van Handel, 2022] for random matrices with correlated Gaussian entries.
summary: We give a simple proof of the matrix Spencer conjecture up to poly-logarithmic rank: given symmetric $d \times d$ matrices $A_1,\ldots,A_n$ each with $\|A_i\|_{\mathsf{op}} \leq 1$ and rank at most $n/\log^3 n$, one can efficiently find $\pm 1$ signs $x_1,\ldots,x_n$ such that their signed sum has spectral norm $\|\sum_{i=1}^n x_i A_i\|_{\mathsf{op}} = O(\sqrt{n})$. This result also implies a $\log n - Ω( \log \log n)$ qubit lower bound for quantum random access codes encoding $n$ classical bits with advantage $\gg 1/\sqrt{n}$. Our proof uses the recent refinement of the non-commutative Khintchine inequality in [Bandeira, Boedihardjo, van Handel, 2022] for random matrices with correlated Gaussian entries.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了矩阵斯宾塞猜想的多对数秩的简单证明：给定对称 $d \times d$ 矩阵 $A_1,\ldots,A_n$ 每个矩阵 $\|A_i\|_{\mathsf{op}} \leq 1$ 且秩最多为 $n/\log^3 n$，可以有效地找到 $\pm 1$ 符号$x_1,\ldots,x_n$ 使得它们的符号和具有谱范数 $\|\sum_{i=1}^n x_i A_i\|_{\mathsf{op}} = O(\sqrt{n})$。该结果还意味着编码 $n$ 经典位的量子随机访问码的 $\log n - Ω( \log \log n)$ 量子位下限具有 $\gg 1/\sqrt{n}$ 的优势。我们的证明使用了最近对 [Bandeira, Boedihardjo, van Handel, 2022] 中的非交换 Khintchine 不等式的改进，用于具有相关高斯条目的随机矩阵。

AI.tldr: 本文解决了矩阵Spencer猜想在多项式对数秩范围内的证明，展示了如何高效找到符号使得矩阵和的谱范数为O(√n)。
AI.motivation: 矩阵Spencer猜想在随机矩阵理论和量子信息领域具有重要意义，此前对高秩矩阵的处理存在困难，需寻找更有效的证明方法。
AI.method: 利用[Bandeira等, 2022]提出的非交换Khintchine不等式改进版本，结合相关高斯随机矩阵的分析技术。
AI.result: 证明了当矩阵秩至多n/log³n时，存在高效算法构造符号序列使谱范数界为O(√n)，并推导出量子随机存取码的log n - Ω(log log n)比特下界。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决高维矩阵符号问题提供了新思路，并在量子信息理论中建立了重要的复杂度下界。

authors_text: Nithin Gopalakrishnan Nair,Kangfu Mei,Vishal M. Patel
title: AT-DDPM: Restoring Faces degraded by Atmospheric Turbulence using Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
title_zh: AT-DDPM：使用去噪扩散概率模型恢复因大气湍流而退化的面孔
abstract: Although many long-range imaging systems are designed to support extended vision applications, a natural obstacle to their operation is degradation due to atmospheric turbulence. Atmospheric turbulence causes significant degradation to image quality by introducing blur and geometric distortion. In recent years, various deep learning-based single image atmospheric turbulence mitigation methods, including CNN-based and GAN inversion-based, have been proposed in the literature which attempt to remove the distortion in the image. However, some of these methods are difficult to train and often fail to reconstruct facial features and produce unrealistic results especially in the case of high turbulence. Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs) have recently gained some traction because of their stable training process and their ability to generate high quality images. In this paper, we propose the first DDPM-based solution for the problem of atmospheric turbulence mitigation. We also propose a fast sampling technique for reducing the inference times for conditional DDPMs. Extensive experiments are conducted on synthetic and real-world data to show the significance of our model. To facilitate further research, all codes and pretrained models are publically available at http://github.com/Nithin-GK/AT-DDPM
summary: Although many long-range imaging systems are designed to support extended vision applications, a natural obstacle to their operation is degradation due to atmospheric turbulence. Atmospheric turbulence causes significant degradation to image quality by introducing blur and geometric distortion. In recent years, various deep learning-based single image atmospheric turbulence mitigation methods, including CNN-based and GAN inversion-based, have been proposed in the literature which attempt to remove the distortion in the image. However, some of these methods are difficult to train and often fail to reconstruct facial features and produce unrealistic results especially in the case of high turbulence. Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs) have recently gained some traction because of their stable training process and their ability to generate high quality images. In this paper, we propose the first DDPM-based solution for the problem of atmospheric turbulence mitigation. We also propose a fast sampling technique for reducing the inference times for conditional DDPMs. Extensive experiments are conducted on synthetic and real-world data to show the significance of our model. To facilitate further research, all codes and pretrained models are publically available at http://github.com/Nithin-GK/AT-DDPM
abstract_zh: 尽管许多远程成像系统被设计为支持扩展视觉应用，但其运行的一个自然障碍是大气湍流导致的性能退化。大气湍流会引入模糊和几何失真，从而导致图像质量显着下降。近年来，文献中提出了各种基于深度学习的单图像大气湍流缓解方法，包括基于CNN和基于GAN反演的方法，试图消除图像中的失真。然而，其中一些方法很难训练，并且常常无法重建面部特征并产生不切实际的结果，特别是在高湍流的情况下。去噪扩散概率模型 (DDPM) 最近因其稳定的训练过程和生成高质量图像的能力而获得了一些关注。在本文中，我们针对大气湍流缓解问题提出了第一个基于 DDPM 的解决方案。我们还提出了一种快速采样技术来减少条件 DDPM 的推理时间。对合成数据和真实数据进行了大量实验，以证明我们模型的重要性。为了便于进一步研究，所有代码和预训练模型均可在 http://github.com/Nithin-GK/AT-DDPM 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 提出基于DDPM的方法恢复大气湍流退化的人脸图像
AI.motivation: 现有方法训练困难且难以重建面部特征，尤其在高湍流情况下效果差，而DDPM具有稳定训练和生成高质量图像的能力
AI.method: 提出AT-DDPM模型，结合DDPM和快速采样技术，用于去噪和图像恢复

search_text: AT-DDPM: Restoring Faces degraded by Atmospheric Turbulence using Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models AT-DDPM：使用去噪扩散概率模型恢复因大气湍流而退化的面孔 Although many long-range imaging systems are designed to support extended vision applications, a natural obstacle to their operation is degradation due to atmospheric turbulence. Atmospheric turbulence causes significant degradation to image quality by introducing blur and geometric distortion. In recent years, various deep learning-based single image atmospheric turbulence mitigation methods, including CNN-based and GAN inversion-based, have been proposed in the literature which attempt to remove the distortion in the image. However, some of these methods are difficult to train and often fail to reconstruct facial features and produce unrealistic results especially in the case of high turbulence. Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs) have recently gained some traction because of their stable training process and their ability to generate high quality images. In this paper, we propose the first DDPM-based solution for the problem of atmospheric turbulence mitigation. We also propose a fast sampling technique for reducing the inference times for conditional DDPMs. Extensive experiments are conducted on synthetic and real-world data to show the significance of our model. To facilitate further research, all codes and pretrained models are publically available at http://github.com/Nithin-GK/AT-DDPM 尽管许多远程成像系统被设计为支持扩展视觉应用，但其运行的一个自然障碍是大气湍流导致的性能退化。大气湍流会引入模糊和几何失真，从而导致图像质量显着下降。近年来，文献中提出了各种基于深度学习的单图像大气湍流缓解方法，包括基于CNN和基于GAN反演的方法，试图消除图像中的失真。然而，其中一些方法很难训练，并且常常无法重建面部特征并产生不切实际的结果，特别是在高湍流的情况下。去噪扩散概率模型 (DDPM) 最近因其稳定的训练过程和生成高质量图像的能力而获得了一些关注。在本文中，我们针对大气湍流缓解问题提出了第一个基于 DDPM 的解决方案。我们还提出了一种快速采样技术来减少条件 DDPM 的推理时间。对合成数据和真实数据进行了大量实验，以证明我们模型的重要性。为了便于进一步研究，所有代码和预训练模型均可在 http://github.com/Nithin-GK/AT-DDPM 上公开获取 提出基于DDPM的方法恢复大气湍流退化的人脸图像 Nithin Gopalakrishnan Nair,Kangfu Mei,Vishal M. Patel cs.CV

title: Multi-AI Complex Systems in Humanitarian Response
title_zh: 人道主义响应中的多人工智能复杂系统
abstract: AI is being increasingly used to aid response efforts to humanitarian emergencies at multiple levels of decision-making. Such AI systems are generally understood to be stand-alone tools for decision support, with ethical assessments, guidelines and frameworks applied to them through this lens. However, as the prevalence of AI increases in this domain, such systems will begin to encounter each other through information flow networks created by interacting decision-making entities, leading to multi-AI complex systems which are often ill understood. In this paper we describe how these multi-AI systems can arise, even in relatively simple real-world humanitarian response scenarios, and lead to potentially emergent and erratic erroneous behavior. We discuss how we can better work towards more trustworthy multi-AI systems by exploring some of the associated challenges and opportunities, and how we can design better mechanisms to understand and assess such systems. This paper is designed to be a first exposition on this topic in the field of humanitarian response, raising awareness, exploring the possible landscape of this domain, and providing a starting point for future work within the wider community.

abstract_zh: 人工智能正越来越多地被用于帮助多个决策层面应对人道主义紧急情况。此类人工智能系统通常被认为是用于决策支持的独立工具，通过这个镜头对其应用道德评估、指南和框架。然而，随着人工智能在这一领域的普及，这些系统将开始通过交互决策实体创建的信息流网络相互接触，从而导致多人工智能复杂系统的出现，而这些系统往往难以被理解。在本文中，我们描述了这些多人工智能系统如何出现，即使是在相对简单的现实世界人道主义响应场景中，并导致潜在的紧急和不稳定的错误行为。我们讨论如何通过探索一些相关的挑战和机遇来更好地实现更值得信赖的多人工智能系统，以及如何设计更好的机制来理解和评估此类系统。本文旨在首次阐述人道主义响应领域的这一主题，提高认识，探索该领域的可能前景，并为更广泛的社区内的未来工作提供起点。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人道主义响应中多AI复杂系统的形成机制及其潜在风险，提出构建更可信系统的挑战与机遇。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统多被视为独立工具，但其在实际场景中的交互可能引发不可预测的错误行为，亟需新的评估框架。
AI.method: 通过分析现实场景中多AI系统的信息交互网络，识别其复杂性来源并讨论设计改进机制的路径。
AI.result: 揭示了多AI系统在人道主义响应中的潜在风险，为未来研究提供了问题框架与研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 需建立跨学科协作机制，开发适应复杂交互的AI评估标准，以提升人道主义响应的可靠性。

authors_text: Yawen Wu,Dewen Zeng,Zhepeng Wang,Yi Sheng,Lei Yang,Alaina J. James,Yiyu Shi,Jingtong Hu
title: Federated Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning and Masked Autoencoder for Dermatological Disease Diagnosis
title_zh: 用于皮肤病诊断的联合自监督对比学习和屏蔽自动编码器
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.07470
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.07470
abstract: In dermatological disease diagnosis, the private data collected by mobile dermatology assistants exist on distributed mobile devices of patients. Federated learning (FL) can use decentralized data to train models while keeping data local. Existing FL methods assume all the data have labels. However, medical data often comes without full labels due to high labeling costs. Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods, contrastive learning (CL) and masked autoencoders (MAE), can leverage the unlabeled data to pre-train models, followed by fine-tuning with limited labels. However, combining SSL and FL has unique challenges. For example, CL requires diverse data but each device only has limited data. For MAE, while Vision Transformer (ViT) based MAE has higher accuracy over CNNs in centralized learning, MAE's performance in FL with unlabeled data has not been investigated. Besides, the ViT synchronization between the server and clients is different from traditional CNNs. Therefore, special synchronization methods need to be designed. In this work, we propose two federated self-supervised learning frameworks for dermatological disease diagnosis with limited labels. The first one features lower computation costs, suitable for mobile devices. The second one features high accuracy and fits high-performance servers. Based on CL, we proposed federated contrastive learning with feature sharing (FedCLF). Features are shared for diverse contrastive information without sharing raw data for privacy. Based on MAE, we proposed FedMAE. Knowledge split separates the global and local knowledge learned from each client. Only global knowledge is aggregated for higher generalization performance. Experiments on dermatological disease datasets show superior accuracy of the proposed frameworks over state-of-the-arts.

Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods, contrastive learning (CL) and masked autoencoders (MAE), can leverage the unlabeled data to pre-train models, followed by fine-tuning with limited labels. However, combining SSL and FL has unique challenges. For example, CL requires diverse data but each device only has limited data. For MAE, while Vision Transformer (ViT) based MAE has higher accuracy over CNNs in centralized learning, MAE's performance in FL with unlabeled data has not been investigated. Besides, the ViT synchronization between the server and clients is different from traditional CNNs. Therefore, special synchronization methods need to be designed. In this work, we propose two federated self-supervised learning frameworks for dermatological disease diagnosis with limited labels. The first one features lower computation costs, suitable for mobile devices. The second one features high accuracy and fits high-performance servers. Based on CL, we proposed federated contrastive learning with feature sharing (FedCLF). Features are shared for diverse contrastive information without sharing raw data for privacy. Based on MAE, we proposed FedMAE. Knowledge split separates the global and local knowledge learned from each client. Only global knowledge is aggregated for higher generalization performance. Experiments on dermatological disease datasets show superior accuracy of the proposed frameworks over state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 在皮肤病诊断中，移动皮肤科助手收集的隐私数据存在于患者的分布式移动设备上。联邦学习（FL）可以使用去中心化数据来训练模型，同时保持数据本地化。现有的 FL 方法假设所有数据都有标签。然而，由于标签成本高昂，医疗数据通常没有完整的标签。自监督学习（SSL）方法、对比学习（CL）和掩模自动编码器（MAE）可以利用未标记的数据来预训练模型，然后使用有限的标签进行微调。然而，结合 SSL 和 FL 面临着独特的挑战。例如，CL需要不同的数据，但每个设备只有有限的数据。对于 MAE，虽然基于 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的 MAE 在集中学习中比 CNN 具有更高的准确性，但 MAE 在未标记数据的 FL 中的性能尚未得到研究。此外，服务器和客户端之间的ViT同步与传统CNN不同。因此，需要设计特殊的同步方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了两个联合自我监督学习框架，用于标签有限的皮肤病诊断。第一个特点是计算成本较低，适合移动设备。第二种具有高精度，适合高性能服务器。基于 CL，我们提出了具有特征共享的联邦对比学习（FedCLF）。共享特征以获取不同的对比信息，而不共享原始数据以保护隐私。基于MAE，我们提出了FedMAE。知识分割将从每个客户那里学到的全局知识和局部知识分开。只有聚合全局知识才能获得更高的泛化性能。皮肤病数据集的实验表明，所提出的框架比最先进的框架具有更高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种联邦自监督学习框架（FedCLF和FedMAE），用于在有限标签的皮肤病诊断中结合对比学习和掩码自编码器。
AI.motivation: 皮肤病诊断中医疗数据常因标注成本高而缺乏完整标签，传统联邦学习依赖标注数据，而自监督学习（SSL）可利用无标签数据。但SSL与联邦学习结合面临数据多样性不足、ViT同步机制差异等挑战。
AI.method: 基于对比学习提出FedCLF（特征共享避免数据泄露），基于MAE提出FedMAE（知识分割聚合全局知识）。FedCLF通过特征共享提升对比多样性，FedMAE通过知识分离优化泛化能力。
AI.result: 在皮肤病数据集上，所提框架优于现有方法，FedCLF适合移动端低计算需求，FedMAE在高性能服务器上实现更高精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文框架有效解决了联邦学习中无标签数据的SSL挑战，为皮肤病诊断提供了兼顾隐私与精度的解决方案。

method: 基于对比学习提出FedCLF（特征共享避免数据泄露），基于MAE提出FedMAE（知识分割聚合全局知识）。FedCLF通过特征共享提升对比多样性，FedMAE通过知识分离优化泛化能力。
result: 在皮肤病数据集上，所提框架优于现有方法，FedCLF适合移动端低计算需求，FedMAE在高性能服务器上实现更高精度。
conclusion: 本文框架有效解决了联邦学习中无标签数据的SSL挑战，为皮肤病诊断提供了兼顾隐私与精度的解决方案。
search_text: Federated Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning and Masked Autoencoder for Dermatological Disease Diagnosis 用于皮肤病诊断的联合自监督对比学习和屏蔽自动编码器 In dermatological disease diagnosis, the private data collected by mobile dermatology assistants exist on distributed mobile devices of patients. Federated learning (FL) can use decentralized data to train models while keeping data local. Existing FL methods assume all the data have labels. However, medical data often comes without full labels due to high labeling costs. Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods, contrastive learning (CL) and masked autoencoders (MAE), can leverage the unlabeled data to pre-train models, followed by fine-tuning with limited labels. However, combining SSL and FL has unique challenges. For example, CL requires diverse data but each device only has limited data. For MAE, while Vision Transformer (ViT) based MAE has higher accuracy over CNNs in centralized learning, MAE's performance in FL with unlabeled data has not been investigated. Besides, the ViT synchronization between the server and clients is different from traditional CNNs. Therefore, special synchronization methods need to be designed. In this work, we propose two federated self-supervised learning frameworks for dermatological disease diagnosis with limited labels. The first one features lower computation costs, suitable for mobile devices. The second one features high accuracy and fits high-performance servers. Based on CL, we proposed federated contrastive learning with feature sharing (FedCLF). Features are shared for diverse contrastive information without sharing raw data for privacy. Based on MAE, we proposed FedMAE. Knowledge split separates the global and local knowledge learned from each client. Only global knowledge is aggregated for higher generalization performance. Experiments on dermatological disease datasets show superior accuracy of the proposed frameworks over state-of-the-arts. 在皮肤病诊断中，移动皮肤科助手收集的隐私数据存在于患者的分布式移动设备上。联邦学习（FL）可以使用去中心化数据来训练模型，同时保持数据本地化。现有的 FL 方法假设所有数据都有标签。然而，由于标签成本高昂，医疗数据通常没有完整的标签。自监督学习（SSL）方法、对比学习（CL）和掩模自动编码器（MAE）可以利用未标记的数据来预训练模型，然后使用有限的标签进行微调。然而，结合 SSL 和 FL 面临着独特的挑战。例如，CL需要不同的数据，但每个设备只有有限的数据。对于 MAE，虽然基于 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的 MAE 在集中学习中比 CNN 具有更高的准确性，但 MAE 在未标记数据的 FL 中的性能尚未得到研究。此外，服务器和客户端之间的ViT同步与传统CNN不同。因此，需要设计特殊的同步方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了两个联合自我监督学习框架，用于标签有限的皮肤病诊断。第一个特点是计算成本较低，适合移动设备。第二种具有高精度，适合高性能服务器。基于 CL，我们提出了具有特征共享的联邦对比学习（FedCLF）。共享特征以获取不同的对比信息，而不共享原始数据以保护隐私。基于MAE，我们提出了FedMAE。知识分割将从每个客户那里学到的全局知识和局部知识分开。只有聚合全局知识才能获得更高的泛化性能。皮肤病数据集的实验表明，所提出的框架比最先进的框架具有更高的准确性。 本文提出两种联邦自监督学习框架（FedCLF和FedMAE），用于在有限标签的皮肤病诊断中结合对比学习和掩码自编码器。 Yawen Wu,Dewen Zeng,Zhepeng Wang,Yi Sheng,Lei Yang,Alaina J. James,Yiyu Shi,Jingtong Hu cs.LG,cs.CR,eess.IV

title: Molecular Substructure-Aware Network for Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction
title_zh: 用于药物相互作用预测的分子亚结构感知网络
comment: Accepted to CIKM 2022 (Short), camera ready version
comments: Accepted to CIKM 2022 (Short), camera ready version
abstract: Concomitant administration of drugs can cause drug-drug interactions (DDIs). Some drug combinations are beneficial, but other ones may cause negative effects which are previously unrecorded. Previous works on DDI prediction usually rely on hand-engineered domain knowledge, which is laborious to obtain. In this work, we propose a novel model, Molecular Substructure-Aware Network (MSAN), to effectively predict potential DDIs from molecular structures of drug pairs. We adopt a Transformer-like substructure extraction module to acquire a fixed number of representative vectors that are associated with various substructure patterns of the drug molecule. Then, interaction strength between the two drugs' substructures will be captured by a similarity-based interaction module. We also perform a substructure dropping augmentation before graph encoding to alleviate overfitting. Experimental results from a real-world dataset reveal that our proposed model achieves the state-of-the-art performance. We also show that the predictions of our model are highly interpretable through a case study.
summary: Concomitant administration of drugs can cause drug-drug interactions (DDIs). Some drug combinations are beneficial, but other ones may cause negative effects which are previously unrecorded. Previous works on DDI prediction usually rely on hand-engineered domain knowledge, which is laborious to obtain. In this work, we propose a novel model, Molecular Substructure-Aware Network (MSAN), to effectively predict potential DDIs from molecular structures of drug pairs. We adopt a Transformer-like substructure extraction module to acquire a fixed number of representative vectors that are associated with various substructure patterns of the drug molecule. Then, interaction strength between the two drugs' substructures will be captured by a similarity-based interaction module. We also perform a substructure dropping augmentation before graph encoding to alleviate overfitting. Experimental results from a real-world dataset reveal that our proposed model achieves the state-of-the-art performance. We also show that the predictions of our model are highly interpretable through a case study.
abstract_zh: 联合用药可能会导致药物间相互作用 (DDI)。有些药物组合是有益的，但其他药物组合可能会产生以前未记录的负面影响。以前的 DDI 预测工作通常依赖于手工设计的领域知识，而这些知识很难获得。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的模型，即分子子结构感知网络（MSAN），可以有效地从药物对的分子结构中预测潜在的 DDI。我们采用类似 Transformer 的子结构提取模块来获取与药物分子的各种子结构模式相关的固定数量的代表向量。然后，两种药物子结构之间的相互作用强度将由基于相似性的相互作用模块捕获。我们还在图编码之前执行子结构删除增强，以减轻过度拟合。现实世界数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型实现了最先进的性能。我们还通过案例研究表明，我们的模型的预测是高度可解释的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分子子结构感知的神经网络模型（MSAN），用于从药物分子结构预测潜在的药物-药物相互作用（DDI）。
AI.motivation: 传统DDI预测方法依赖手工设计的领域知识，获取成本高且效率低，亟需一种能自动挖掘分子结构特征的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 采用Transformer-like架构提取分子子结构特征向量，通过相似度模块计算药物对的子结构交互强度，并引入子结构丢弃增强策略防止过拟合。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集上达到SOTA性能，且通过案例研究验证了模型预测结果的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: MSAN通过自动学习分子子结构特征有效预测DDI，在保持高性能的同时提供了可解释的预测依据，为药物组合安全性评估提供新思路。

title: SCALE: Online Self-Supervised Lifelong Learning without Prior Knowledge
title_zh: SCALE：无需先验知识的在线自我监督终身学习
abstract: Unsupervised lifelong learning refers to the ability to learn over time while memorizing previous patterns without supervision. Although great progress has been made in this direction, existing work often assumes strong prior knowledge about the incoming data (e.g., knowing the class boundaries), which can be impossible to obtain in complex and unpredictable environments. In this paper, motivated by real-world scenarios, we propose a more practical problem setting called online self-supervised lifelong learning without prior knowledge. The proposed setting is challenging due to the non-iid and single-pass data, the absence of external supervision, and no prior knowledge. To address the challenges, we propose Self-Supervised ContrAstive Lifelong LEarning without Prior Knowledge (SCALE) which can extract and memorize representations on the fly purely from the data continuum. SCALE is designed around three major components: a pseudo-supervised contrastive loss, a self-supervised forgetting loss, and an online memory update for uniform subset selection. All three components are designed to work collaboratively to maximize learning performance. We perform comprehensive experiments of SCALE under iid and four non-iid data streams. The results show that SCALE outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithm in all settings with improvements up to 3.83%, 2.77% and 5.86% in terms of kNN accuracy on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and TinyImageNet datasets.
summary: Unsupervised lifelong learning refers to the ability to learn over time while memorizing previous patterns without supervision. Although great progress has been made in this direction, existing work often assumes strong prior knowledge about the incoming data (e.g., knowing the class boundaries), which can be impossible to obtain in complex and unpredictable environments. In this paper, motivated by real-world scenarios, we propose a more practical problem setting called online self-supervised lifelong learning without prior knowledge. The proposed setting is challenging due to the non-iid and single-pass data, the absence of external supervision, and no prior knowledge. To address the challenges, we propose Self-Supervised ContrAstive Lifelong LEarning without Prior Knowledge (SCALE) which can extract and memorize representations on the fly purely from the data continuum. SCALE is designed around three major components: a pseudo-supervised contrastive loss, a self-supervised forgetting loss, and an online memory update for uniform subset selection. All three components are designed to work collaboratively to maximize learning performance. We perform comprehensive experiments of SCALE under iid and four non-iid data streams. The results show that SCALE outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithm in all settings with improvements up to 3.83%, 2.77% and 5.86% in terms of kNN accuracy on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and TinyImageNet datasets.
abstract_zh: 无监督的终身学习是指在没有监督的情况下记忆以前的模式的同时不断学习的能力。尽管在这个方向上已经取得了很大的进展，但现有的工作通常假设对传入数据有很强的先验知识（例如，了解类边界），而这在复杂且不可预测的环境中是不可能获得的。在本文中，受现实世界场景的启发，我们提出了一种更实际的问题设置，称为无需先验知识的在线自我监督终身学习。由于非独立同分布和单遍数据、缺乏外部监督以及没有先验知识，所提出的设置具有挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了无先验知识的自我监督对比终身学习（SCALE），它可以纯粹从数据连续体中即时提取和记忆表示。 SCALE 围绕三个主要组件设计：伪监督对比损失、自监督遗忘损失和用于统一子集选择的在线内存更新。所有三个组件都旨在协同工作，以最大限度地提高学习绩效。我们在独立同分布和四个非独立同分布数据流下对 SCALE 进行了全面的实验。结果表明，SCALE 在所有设置中均优于最先进的算法，在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 TinyImageNet 数据集上的 kNN 精度方面分别提高了 3.83%、2.77% 和 5.86%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需先验知识的在线自监督终身学习框架SCALE，以应对复杂环境中数据非独立同分布和无监督的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有终身学习方法依赖于对数据的强先验假设（如类别边界），难以适应复杂多变的真实环境，需探索无需先验知识的更实用学习范式。
AI.method: 设计SCALE框架，包含伪监督对比损失、自监督遗忘损失和在线记忆更新模块，通过协作机制实现数据流中的动态表征学习与记忆保持。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和TinyImageNet数据集上，SCALE在IID和四种非IID数据流中均优于现有方法，kNN准确率提升最高达5.86%。
AI.conclusion: SCALE通过自监督机制有效解决了无先验知识下的终身学习难题，为复杂环境中的持续学习提供了新思路。

SCALE is designed around three major components: a pseudo-supervised contrastive loss, a self-supervised forgetting loss, and an online memory update for uniform subset selection. The results show that SCALE outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithm in all settings with improvements up to 3.83%, 2.77% and 5.86% in terms of kNN accuracy on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and TinyImageNet datasets. 无监督的终身学习是指在没有监督的情况下记忆以前的模式的同时不断学习的能力。尽管在这个方向上已经取得了很大的进展，但现有的工作通常假设对传入数据有很强的先验知识（例如，了解类边界），而这在复杂且不可预测的环境中是不可能获得的。在本文中，受现实世界场景的启发，我们提出了一种更实际的问题设置，称为无需先验知识的在线自我监督终身学习。由于非独立同分布和单遍数据、缺乏外部监督以及没有先验知识，所提出的设置具有挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了无先验知识的自我监督对比终身学习（SCALE），它可以纯粹从数据连续体中即时提取和记忆表示。 SCALE 围绕三个主要组件设计：伪监督对比损失、自监督遗忘损失和用于统一子集选择的在线内存更新。所有三个组件都旨在协同工作，以最大限度地提高学习绩效。我们在独立同分布和四个非独立同分布数据流下对 SCALE 进行了全面的实验。结果表明，SCALE 在所有设置中均优于最先进的算法，在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 TinyImageNet 数据集上的 kNN 精度方面分别提高了 3.83%、2.77% 和 5.86%。 本文提出了一种无需先验知识的在线自监督终身学习框架SCALE，以应对复杂环境中数据非独立同分布和无监督的挑战。 Xiaofan Yu,Yunhui Guo,Sicun Gao,Tajana Rosing cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Differential evolution variants for Searching D- and A-optimal designs
title_zh: 用于搜索 D 和 A 最优设计的差分进化变体
abstract: Optimal experimental design is an essential subfield of statistics that maximizes the chances of experimental success. The D- and A-optimal design is a very challenging problem in the field of optimal design, namely minimizing the determinant and trace of the inverse Fisher information matrix. Due to the flexibility and ease of implementation, traditional evolutionary algorithms (EAs) are applied to deal with a small part of experimental optimization design problems without mathematical derivation and assumption. However, the current EAs remain the issues of determining the support point number, handling the infeasible weight solution, and the insufficient experiment. To address the above issues, this paper investigates differential evolution (DE) variants for finding D- and A-optimal designs on several different statistical models. The repair operation is proposed to automatically determine the support point by combining similar support points with their corresponding weights based on Euclidean distance and deleting the support point with less weight. Furthermore, the repair operation fixes the infeasible weight solution into the feasible weight solution. To enrich our optimal design experiments, we utilize the proposed DE variants to test the D- and A-optimal design problems on 12 statistical models. Compared with other competitor algorithms, simulation experiments show that LSHADE can achieve better performance on the D- and A-optimal design problems.
summary: Optimal experimental design is an essential subfield of statistics that maximizes the chances of experimental success. The D- and A-optimal design is a very challenging problem in the field of optimal design, namely minimizing the determinant and trace of the inverse Fisher information matrix. Due to the flexibility and ease of implementation, traditional evolutionary algorithms (EAs) are applied to deal with a small part of experimental optimization design problems without mathematical derivation and assumption. However, the current EAs remain the issues of determining the support point number, handling the infeasible weight solution, and the insufficient experiment. To address the above issues, this paper investigates differential evolution (DE) variants for finding D- and A-optimal designs on several different statistical models. The repair operation is proposed to automatically determine the support point by combining similar support points with their corresponding weights based on Euclidean distance and deleting the support point with less weight. Furthermore, the repair operation fixes the infeasible weight solution into the feasible weight solution. To enrich our optimal design experiments, we utilize the proposed DE variants to test the D- and A-optimal design problems on 12 statistical models. Compared with other competitor algorithms, simulation experiments show that LSHADE can achieve better performance on the D- and A-optimal design problems.
abstract_zh: 最佳实验设计是统计学的一个重要子领域，可以最大限度地提高实验成功的机会。 D最优设计和A最优设计是最优设计领域中一个非常具有挑战性的问题，即最小化逆Fisher信息矩阵的行列式和迹。由于灵活性和易于实现，传统的进化算法（EA）被用来处理一小部分实验优化设计问题，无需数学推导和假设。然而，目前的EA仍然存在支撑点数量的确定、权重解不可行的处理以及实验不足等问题。为了解决上述问题，本文研究了差分进化 (DE) 变体，以在几种不同的统计模型上寻找 D 和 A 最优设计。修复操作提出基于欧几里得距离将相似的支撑点与其相应的权重相结合并删除权重较小的支撑点来自动确定支撑点。此外，修复操作将不可行的权重解固定为可行的权重解。为了丰富我们的最优设计实验，我们利用提出的 DE 变体在 12 个统计模型上测试 D 和 A 最优设计问题。与其他竞争算法相比，仿真实验表明，LSHADE 在 D 和 A 最优设计问题上能够取得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用差分进化（DE）算法变体寻找D-和A-最优实验设计的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统进化算法在处理D-和A-最优设计问题时存在支撑点数量确定困难、不可行权重解处理不足及实验效率低等问题。
AI.method: 提出结合欧几里得距离的修复操作，自动合并相似支撑点并调整权重；采用LSHADE等DE变体在12个统计模型中进行测试。
AI.result: 实验表明LSHADE在D-和A-最优设计问题上优于其他对比算法。
AI.conclusion: 改进的DE算法有效解决了传统方法的不足，在多种统计模型中验证了其优越性。

title: Applying Eigencontours to PolarMask-Based Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 将特征轮廓应用于基于 PolarMask 的实例分割
abstract: Eigencontours are the first data-driven contour descriptors based on singular value decomposition. Based on the implementation of ESE-Seg, eigencontours were applied to the instance segmentation task successfully. In this report, we incorporate eigencontours into the PolarMask network for instance segmentation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm yields better results than PolarMask on two instance segmentation datasets of COCO2017 and SBD. Also, we analyze the characteristics of eigencontours qualitatively. Our codes are available at https://github.com/dnjs3594/Eigencontours.
summary: Eigencontours are the first data-driven contour descriptors based on singular value decomposition. Based on the implementation of ESE-Seg, eigencontours were applied to the instance segmentation task successfully. In this report, we incorporate eigencontours into the PolarMask network for instance segmentation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm yields better results than PolarMask on two instance segmentation datasets of COCO2017 and SBD. Also, we analyze the characteristics of eigencontours qualitatively. Our codes are available at https://github.com/dnjs3594/Eigencontours.
abstract_zh: 特征轮廓是第一个基于奇异值分解的数据驱动轮廓描述符。基于ESE-Seg的实现，特征轮廓成功地应用于实例分割任务。在本报告中，我们将特征轮廓合并到 PolarMask 网络中以进行实例分割。实验结果表明，该算法在 COCO2017 和 SBD 两个实例分割数据集上比 PolarMask 产生了更好的结果。此外，我们还定性分析了特征轮廓的特征。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/dnjs3594/Eigencontours 获取。

AI.tldr: 将Eigencontours应用于PolarMask网络以提升实例分割性能
AI.motivation: 现有实例分割方法在轮廓描述上存在局限，而Eigencontours作为数据驱动的轮廓描述符可提供更精确的形状表示
AI.method: 在PolarMask网络中引入Eigencontours特征，通过奇异值分解提取轮廓信息并融合到分割流程中
AI.result: 在COCO2017和SBD数据集上优于原始PolarMask方法，定性分析验证了Eigencontours的轮廓描述特性
AI.conclusion: Eigencontours有效增强了实例分割的轮廓精度，证明了其在目标分割任务中的应用价值

authors_text: Yuchen Liu,Zhixin Shu,Yijun Li,Zhe Lin,Richard Zhang,S. Y. Kung
title: 3D-FM GAN: Towards 3D-Controllable Face Manipulation
title_zh: 3D-FM GAN：迈向 3D 可控面部操纵
abstract: 3D-controllable portrait synthesis has significantly advanced, thanks to breakthroughs in generative adversarial networks (GANs). However, it is still challenging to manipulate existing face images with precise 3D control. While concatenating GAN inversion and a 3D-aware, noise-to-image GAN is a straight-forward solution, it is inefficient and may lead to noticeable drop in editing quality. To fill this gap, we propose 3D-FM GAN, a novel conditional GAN framework designed specifically for 3D-controllable face manipulation, and does not require any tuning after the end-to-end learning phase. By carefully encoding both the input face image and a physically-based rendering of 3D edits into a StyleGAN's latent spaces, our image generator provides high-quality, identity-preserved, 3D-controllable face manipulation. To effectively learn such novel framework, we develop two essential training strategies and a novel multiplicative co-modulation architecture that improves significantly upon naive schemes. With extensive evaluations, we show that our method outperforms the prior arts on various tasks, with better editability, stronger identity preservation, and higher photo-realism. In addition, we demonstrate a better generalizability of our design on large pose editing and out-of-domain images.
summary: 3D-controllable portrait synthesis has significantly advanced, thanks to breakthroughs in generative adversarial networks (GANs). However, it is still challenging to manipulate existing face images with precise 3D control. While concatenating GAN inversion and a 3D-aware, noise-to-image GAN is a straight-forward solution, it is inefficient and may lead to noticeable drop in editing quality. To fill this gap, we propose 3D-FM GAN, a novel conditional GAN framework designed specifically for 3D-controllable face manipulation, and does not require any tuning after the end-to-end learning phase. By carefully encoding both the input face image and a physically-based rendering of 3D edits into a StyleGAN's latent spaces, our image generator provides high-quality, identity-preserved, 3D-controllable face manipulation. To effectively learn such novel framework, we develop two essential training strategies and a novel multiplicative co-modulation architecture that improves significantly upon naive schemes. With extensive evaluations, we show that our method outperforms the prior arts on various tasks, with better editability, stronger identity preservation, and higher photo-realism. In addition, we demonstrate a better generalizability of our design on large pose editing and out-of-domain images.
abstract_zh: 由于生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的突破，3D 可控肖像合成取得了显着进步。然而，通过精确的 3D 控制来操纵现有的人脸图像仍然具有挑战性。虽然连接 GAN 反转和 3D 感知、噪声到图像的 GAN 是一种直接的解决方案，但它效率低下，可能会导致编辑质量明显下降。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了 3D-FM GAN，这是一种专门为 3D 可控人脸操作而设计的新型条件 GAN 框架，并且在端到端学习阶段后不需要任何调整。通过将输入面部图像和基于物理的 3D 编辑渲染仔细编码到 StyleGAN 的潜在空间中，我们的图像生成器提供了高质量、身份保留、3D 可控的面部操作。为了有效地学习这种新颖的框架，我们开发了两种基本的训练策略和一种新颖的乘法共调制架构，该架构显着改进了朴素的方案。通过广泛的评估，我们表明我们的方法在各种任务上都优于现有技术，具有更好的可编辑性、更强的身份保留和更高的照片真实感。此外，我们在大型姿势编辑和域外图像上展示了我们的设计的更好的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出3D-FM GAN框架，实现无需调优的高质量3D可控人脸编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过拼接GAN逆向生成与3D感知GAN实现3D编辑，存在效率低、质量下降问题，需更高效且保真度高的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于StyleGAN的条件GAN框架，将输入人脸与物理渲染的3D编辑信息编码至潜在空间，结合双重训练策略与乘法共调制架构。
AI.result: 在可编辑性、身份保持与照片真实感指标上优于现有方法，且在大角度编辑与跨域图像中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 3D-FM GAN通过端到端学习实现高效3D人脸编辑，无需后期调优，验证了设计的普适性与先进性。

tldr: 本文提出3D-FM GAN框架，实现无需调优的高质量3D可控人脸编辑。
motivation: 现有方法通过拼接GAN逆向生成与3D感知GAN实现3D编辑，存在效率低、质量下降问题，需更高效且保真度高的解决方案。
method: 设计基于StyleGAN的条件GAN框架，将输入人脸与物理渲染的3D编辑信息编码至潜在空间，结合双重训练策略与乘法共调制架构。
result: 在可编辑性、身份保持与照片真实感指标上优于现有方法，且在大角度编辑与跨域图像中表现更优。
conclusion: 3D-FM GAN通过端到端学习实现高效3D人脸编辑，无需后期调优，验证了设计的普适性与先进性。
search_text: 3D-FM GAN: Towards 3D-Controllable Face Manipulation 3D-FM GAN：迈向 3D 可控面部操纵 3D-controllable portrait synthesis has significantly advanced, thanks to breakthroughs in generative adversarial networks (GANs). However, it is still challenging to manipulate existing face images with precise 3D control. While concatenating GAN inversion and a 3D-aware, noise-to-image GAN is a straight-forward solution, it is inefficient and may lead to noticeable drop in editing quality. To fill this gap, we propose 3D-FM GAN, a novel conditional GAN framework designed specifically for 3D-controllable face manipulation, and does not require any tuning after the end-to-end learning phase. By carefully encoding both the input face image and a physically-based rendering of 3D edits into a StyleGAN's latent spaces, our image generator provides high-quality, identity-preserved, 3D-controllable face manipulation. To effectively learn such novel framework, we develop two essential training strategies and a novel multiplicative co-modulation architecture that improves significantly upon naive schemes. With extensive evaluations, we show that our method outperforms the prior arts on various tasks, with better editability, stronger identity preservation, and higher photo-realism. In addition, we demonstrate a better generalizability of our design on large pose editing and out-of-domain images. 由于生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的突破，3D 可控肖像合成取得了显着进步。然而，通过精确的 3D 控制来操纵现有的人脸图像仍然具有挑战性。虽然连接 GAN 反转和 3D 感知、噪声到图像的 GAN 是一种直接的解决方案，但它效率低下，可能会导致编辑质量明显下降。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了 3D-FM GAN，这是一种专门为 3D 可控人脸操作而设计的新型条件 GAN 框架，并且在端到端学习阶段后不需要任何调整。通过将输入面部图像和基于物理的 3D 编辑渲染仔细编码到 StyleGAN 的潜在空间中，我们的图像生成器提供了高质量、身份保留、3D 可控的面部操作。为了有效地学习这种新颖的框架，我们开发了两种基本的训练策略和一种新颖的乘法共调制架构，该架构显着改进了朴素的方案。通过广泛的评估，我们表明我们的方法在各种任务上都优于现有技术，具有更好的可编辑性、更强的身份保留和更高的照片真实感。此外，我们在大型姿势编辑和域外图像上展示了我们的设计的更好的通用性。 本文提出3D-FM GAN框架，实现无需调优的高质量3D可控人脸编辑。 Yuchen Liu,Zhixin Shu,Yijun Li,Zhe Lin,Richard Zhang,S. Y. Kung cs.CV

title: FashionVQA: A Domain-Specific Visual Question Answering System
title_zh: FashionVQA：特定领域的视觉问答系统
abstract: Humans apprehend the world through various sensory modalities, yet language is their predominant communication channel. Machine learning systems need to draw on the same multimodal richness to have informed discourses with humans in natural language; this is particularly true for systems specialized in visually-dense information, such as dialogue, recommendation, and search engines for clothing. To this end, we train a visual question answering (VQA) system to answer complex natural language questions about apparel in fashion photoshoot images. The key to the successful training of our VQA model is the automatic creation of a visual question-answering dataset with 168 million samples from item attributes of 207 thousand images using diverse templates. The sample generation employs a strategy that considers the difficulty of the question-answer pairs to emphasize challenging concepts. Contrary to the recent trends in using several datasets for pretraining the visual question answering models, we focused on keeping the dataset fixed while training various models from scratch to isolate the improvements from model architecture changes. We see that using the same transformer for encoding the question and decoding the answer, as in language models, achieves maximum accuracy, showing that visual language models (VLMs) make the best visual question answering systems for our dataset. The accuracy of the best model surpasses the human expert level, even when answering human-generated questions that are not confined to the template formats. Our approach for generating a large-scale multimodal domain-specific dataset provides a path for training specialized models capable of communicating in natural language. The training of such domain-expert models, e.g., our fashion VLM model, cannot rely solely on the large-scale general-purpose datasets collected from the web.

The accuracy of the best model surpasses the human expert level, even when answering human-generated questions that are not confined to the template formats. abstract_zh: 人类通过各种感官方式理解世界，但语言是他们主要的沟通渠道。机器学习系统需要利用相同的多模态丰富性，以自然语言与人类进行知情对话；对于专门处理视觉密集信息的系统尤其如此，例如对话、推荐和服装搜索引擎。为此，我们训练了一个视觉问答（VQA）系统来回答有关时尚摄影图像中服装的复杂自然语言问题。我们的 VQA 模型成功训练的关键是使用不同的模板自动创建一个视觉问答数据集，其中包含来自 20.7 万张图像的项目属性的 1.68 亿个样本。样本生成采用一种考虑问答对难度的策略来强调具有挑战性的概念。与最近使用多个数据集预训练视觉问答模型的趋势相反，我们专注于保持数据集固定，同时从头开始训练各种模型，以将改进与模型架构的变化隔离开来。我们看到，与语言模型中一样，使用相同的转换器来编码问题和解码答案，可以达到最大的准确性，这表明视觉语言模型（VLM）为我们的数据集提供了最好的视觉问答系统。即使在回答不限于模板格式的人类生成的问题时，最佳模型的准确性也超过了人类专家的水平。我们生成大规模多模态特定领域数据集的方法为训练能够以自然语言进行通信的专用模型提供了一条途径。这种领域专家模型（例如我们的时尚 VLM 模型）的训练不能仅仅依赖于从网络收集的大规模通用数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个针对时尚领域的视觉问答系统FashionVQA，通过构建大规模服装图像属性数据集并训练视觉语言模型（VLM）来实现对服装照片中复杂自然语言问题的回答。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉问答模型难以处理服装等视觉信息密集领域的复杂问题，需要专门针对服装领域设计模型和数据集以实现更精准的自然语言交互。
AI.method: 通过自动构建包含16800万样本的服装图像属性问答数据集，采用模板生成多样化问题并侧重困难样本。固定数据集训练从零开始的模型，使用统一的Transformer架构进行问题编码和答案解码。
AI.result: 最佳模型在非模板化人类生成问题上的准确率超越人类专家，证明了领域专用数据集和VLM架构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 大规模领域专用数据集的构建是训练专业视觉语言模型的关键，通用网络数据无法替代专门领域的高质量数据训练。

authors_text: Taoyuanmin Zhu,Gabriel I. Fernandez,Colin Togashi,Yeting Liu,Dennis Hong
title: Feasibility Study of LIMMS, A Multi-Agent Modular Robotic Delivery System with Various Locomotion and Manipulation Modes
title_zh: 具有多种运动和操纵模式的多智能体模块化机器人输送系统 LIMMS 的可行性研究
comment: ef:In 2022 19th International Conference on Ubiquitous Robots (UR) (pp. 30-37). IEEE
comments: ef:In 2022 19th International Conference on Ubiquitous Robots (UR) (pp. 30-37). IEEE
abstract: The logistics of transporting a package from a storage facility to the consumer's front door usually employs highly specialized robots often times splitting sub-tasks up to different systems, e.g., manipulator arms to sort and wheeled vehicles to deliver. More recent endeavors attempt to have a unified approach with legged and humanoid robots. These solutions, however, occupy large amounts of space thus reducing the number of packages that can fit into a delivery vehicle. As a result, these bulky robotic systems often reduce the potential for scalability and task parallelization. In this paper, we introduce LIMMS (Latching Intelligent Modular Mobility System) to address both the manipulation and delivery portion of a typical last-mile delivery while maintaining a minimal spatial footprint. LIMMS is a symmetrically designed, 6 degree of freedom (DoF) appendage-like robot with wheels and latching mechanisms at both ends. By latching onto a surface and anchoring at one end, LIMMS can function as a traditional 6-DoF manipulator arm. On the other hand, multiple LIMMS can latch onto a single box and behave like a legged robotic system where the package is the body. During transit, LIMMS folds up compactly and takes up much less space compared to traditional robotic systems. A large group of LIMMS units can fit inside of a single delivery vehicle, opening the potential for new delivery optimization and hybrid planning methods never done before. In this paper, the feasibility of LIMMS is studied and presented using a hardware prototype as well as simulation results for a range of sub-tasks in a typical last-mile delivery.

abstract_zh: 将包裹从存储设施运输到消费者前门的物流通常采用高度专业化的机器人，通常将子任务分配给不同的系统，例如用于分类的机械臂和用于交付的轮式车辆。最近的努力试图对有腿机器人和人形机器人采取统一的方法。然而，这些解决方案占用大量空间，从而减少了可装入运输车辆的包裹数量。因此，这些庞大的机器人系统通常会降低可扩展性和任务并行化的潜力。在本文中，我们引入了 LIMMS（闭锁智能模块化移动系统）来解决典型最后一英里交付的操纵和交付部分，同时保持最小的空间占用。 LIMMS 是一款对称设计的 6 自由度 (DoF) 附属机器人，两端带有轮子和闭锁机构。通过锁定在表面上并锚定在一端，LIMMS 可以充当传统的 6 自由度机械臂。另一方面，多个 LIMMS 可以锁定在一个盒子上，并且表现得像一个有腿的机器人系统，其中包裹就是身体。在运输过程中，LIMMS 可以紧凑地折叠起来，与传统的机器人系统相比，占用的空间要少得多。大量 LIMMS 单元可以安装在单个运输车辆内，从而为前所未有的新运输优化和混合规划方法带来了潜力。在本文中，使用硬件原型以及典型最后一英里交付中一系列子任务的仿真结果来研究和展示 LIMMS 的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIMMS（Latching Intelligent Modular Mobility System），一种模块化机器人系统，旨在通过折叠设计解决末端配送中机械臂与运输车辆空间占用大的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统配送机器人因体积庞大导致运输车辆装载量受限，难以实现规模化与任务并行化，需开发空间利用率更高的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计具有6自由度的对称机械臂结构，末端配备轮子与锁紧机构，通过折叠实现紧凑收纳，并通过硬件原型与仿真验证其作为机械臂或腿部系统的多任务执行能力。
AI.result: LIMMS在折叠状态下占用空间减少，可批量装载于配送车辆中，仿真与实验证明其具备抓取、搬运及复杂地形移动能力。
AI.conclusion: LIMMS通过模块化设计实现了配送机械臂与运输系统的空间优化，为未来配送路径规划与多机器人协同提供了新思路。

search_text: Feasibility Study of LIMMS, A Multi-Agent Modular Robotic Delivery System with Various Locomotion and Manipulation Modes 具有多种运动和操纵模式的多智能体模块化机器人输送系统 LIMMS 的可行性研究 The logistics of transporting a package from a storage facility to the consumer's front door usually employs highly specialized robots often times splitting sub-tasks up to different systems, e.g., manipulator arms to sort and wheeled vehicles to deliver. More recent endeavors attempt to have a unified approach with legged and humanoid robots. These solutions, however, occupy large amounts of space thus reducing the number of packages that can fit into a delivery vehicle. As a result, these bulky robotic systems often reduce the potential for scalability and task parallelization. In this paper, we introduce LIMMS (Latching Intelligent Modular Mobility System) to address both the manipulation and delivery portion of a typical last-mile delivery while maintaining a minimal spatial footprint. LIMMS is a symmetrically designed, 6 degree of freedom (DoF) appendage-like robot with wheels and latching mechanisms at both ends. By latching onto a surface and anchoring at one end, LIMMS can function as a traditional 6-DoF manipulator arm. On the other hand, multiple LIMMS can latch onto a single box and behave like a legged robotic system where the package is the body. During transit, LIMMS folds up compactly and takes up much less space compared to traditional robotic systems. A large group of LIMMS units can fit inside of a single delivery vehicle, opening the potential for new delivery optimization and hybrid planning methods never done before. In this paper, the feasibility of LIMMS is studied and presented using a hardware prototype as well as simulation results for a range of sub-tasks in a typical last-mile delivery. 将包裹从存储设施运输到消费者前门的物流通常采用高度专业化的机器人，通常将子任务分配给不同的系统，例如用于分类的机械臂和用于交付的轮式车辆。最近的努力试图对有腿机器人和人形机器人采取统一的方法。然而，这些解决方案占用大量空间，从而减少了可装入运输车辆的包裹数量。因此，这些庞大的机器人系统通常会降低可扩展性和任务并行化的潜力。在本文中，我们引入了 LIMMS（闭锁智能模块化移动系统）来解决典型最后一英里交付的操纵和交付部分，同时保持最小的空间占用。 LIMMS 是一款对称设计的 6 自由度 (DoF) 附属机器人，两端带有轮子和闭锁机构。通过锁定在表面上并锚定在一端，LIMMS 可以充当传统的 6 自由度机械臂。另一方面，多个 LIMMS 可以锁定在一个盒子上，并且表现得像一个有腿的机器人系统，其中包裹就是身体。在运输过程中，LIMMS 可以紧凑地折叠起来，与传统的机器人系统相比，占用的空间要少得多。大量 LIMMS 单元可以安装在单个运输车辆内，从而为前所未有的新运输优化和混合规划方法带来了潜力。在本文中，使用硬件原型以及典型最后一英里交付中一系列子任务的仿真结果来研究和展示 LIMMS 的可行性。 本文提出LIMMS（Latching Intelligent Modular Mobility System），一种模块化机器人系统，旨在通过折叠设计解决末端配送中机械臂与运输车辆空间占用大的问题。 Taoyuanmin Zhu,Gabriel I. Fernandez,Colin Togashi,Yeting Liu,Dennis Hong cs.RO

title: Learnable human mesh triangulation for 3D human pose and shape estimation
title_zh: 用于 3D 人体姿势和形状估计的可学习人体网格三角测量
abstract: Compared to joint position, the accuracy of joint rotation and shape estimation has received relatively little attention in the skinned multi-person linear model (SMPL)-based human mesh reconstruction from multi-view images. The work in this field is broadly classified into two categories. The first approach performs joint estimation and then produces SMPL parameters by fitting SMPL to resultant joints. The second approach regresses SMPL parameters directly from the input images through a convolutional neural network (CNN)-based model. However, these approaches suffer from the lack of information for resolving the ambiguity of joint rotation and shape reconstruction and the difficulty of network learning. To solve the aforementioned problems, we propose a two-stage method. The proposed method first estimates the coordinates of mesh vertices through a CNN-based model from input images, and acquires SMPL parameters by fitting the SMPL model to the estimated vertices. Estimated mesh vertices provide sufficient information for determining joint rotation and shape, and are easier to learn than SMPL parameters. According to experiments using Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets, the proposed method significantly outperforms the previous works in terms of joint rotation and shape estimation, and achieves competitive performance in terms of joint location estimation.
summary: Compared to joint position, the accuracy of joint rotation and shape estimation has received relatively little attention in the skinned multi-person linear model (SMPL)-based human mesh reconstruction from multi-view images. The work in this field is broadly classified into two categories. The first approach performs joint estimation and then produces SMPL parameters by fitting SMPL to resultant joints. The second approach regresses SMPL parameters directly from the input images through a convolutional neural network (CNN)-based model. However, these approaches suffer from the lack of information for resolving the ambiguity of joint rotation and shape reconstruction and the difficulty of network learning. To solve the aforementioned problems, we propose a two-stage method. The proposed method first estimates the coordinates of mesh vertices through a CNN-based model from input images, and acquires SMPL parameters by fitting the SMPL model to the estimated vertices. Estimated mesh vertices provide sufficient information for determining joint rotation and shape, and are easier to learn than SMPL parameters. According to experiments using Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets, the proposed method significantly outperforms the previous works in terms of joint rotation and shape estimation, and achieves competitive performance in terms of joint location estimation.
abstract_zh: 与关节位置相比，在基于蒙皮多人线性模型（SMPL）的多视图图像人体网格重建中，关节旋转和形状估计的准确性相对较少受到关注。该领域的工作大致分为两类。第一种方法执行关节估计，然后通过将 SMPL 拟合到所得关节来生成 SMPL 参数。第二种方法通过基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的模型直接从输入图像回归 SMPL 参数。然而，这些方法缺乏解决关节旋转和形状重建模糊性的信息以及网络学习的困难。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种两阶段方法。该方法首先通过基于 CNN 的模型根据输入图像估计网格顶点的坐标，并通过将 SMPL 模型拟合到估计的顶点来获取 SMPL 参数。估计的网格顶点为确定关节旋转和形状提供了足够的信息，并且比 SMPL 参数更容易学习。根据使用Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集的实验，该方法在关节旋转和形状估计方面显着优于以前的工作，并且在关节位置估计方面取得了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的人体网格三角化方法，用于改进基于SMPL模型的3D人体姿态和形状估计，重点关注关节旋转和形状的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在基于SMPL的人体网格重建中，对关节旋转和形状估计的关注不足，导致信息不足和网络学习困难。
AI.method: 提出两阶段方法：第一阶段通过CNN模型从输入图像估计网格顶点坐标，第二阶段将SMPL模型拟合到估计顶点以获取参数。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上，该方法在关节旋转和形状估计上显著优于先前工作，在关节位置估计上表现竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过估计网格顶点提供更充分的信息，解决了关节旋转和形状重建的歧义问题，提升了整体估计精度。

The second approach regresses SMPL parameters directly from the input images through a convolutional neural network (CNN)-based model. However, these approaches suffer from the lack of information for resolving the ambiguity of joint rotation and shape reconstruction and the difficulty of network learning. authors_text: Dafeng Zhang,Feiyu Huang,Shizhuo Liu,Xiaobing Wang,Zhezhu Jin
title: SwinFIR: Revisiting the SwinIR with Fast Fourier Convolution and Improved Training for Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: SwinFIR：通过快速傅立叶卷积和改进的图像超分辨率训练重新审视 SwinIR
abstract: Transformer-based methods have achieved impressive image restoration performance due to their capacities to model long-range dependency compared to CNN-based methods. However, advances like SwinIR adopts the window-based and local attention strategy to balance the performance and computational overhead, which restricts employing large receptive fields to capture global information and establish long dependencies in the early layers. To further improve the efficiency of capturing global information, in this work, we propose SwinFIR to extend SwinIR by replacing Fast Fourier Convolution (FFC) components, which have the image-wide receptive field. We also revisit other advanced techniques, i.e, data augmentation, pre-training, and feature ensemble to improve the effect of image reconstruction. And our feature ensemble method enables the performance of the model to be considerably enhanced without increasing the training and testing time. We applied our algorithm on multiple popular large-scale benchmarks and achieved state-of-the-art performance comparing to the existing methods. For example, our SwinFIR achieves the PSNR of 32.83 dB on Manga109 dataset, which is 0.8 dB higher than the state-of-the-art SwinIR method.
summary: Transformer-based methods have achieved impressive image restoration performance due to their capacities to model long-range dependency compared to CNN-based methods. However, advances like SwinIR adopts the window-based and local attention strategy to balance the performance and computational overhead, which restricts employing large receptive fields to capture global information and establish long dependencies in the early layers. To further improve the efficiency of capturing global information, in this work, we propose SwinFIR to extend SwinIR by replacing Fast Fourier Convolution (FFC) components, which have the image-wide receptive field. We also revisit other advanced techniques, i.e, data augmentation, pre-training, and feature ensemble to improve the effect of image reconstruction. And our feature ensemble method enables the performance of the model to be considerably enhanced without increasing the training and testing time. We applied our algorithm on multiple popular large-scale benchmarks and achieved state-of-the-art performance comparing to the existing methods. For example, our SwinFIR achieves the PSNR of 32.83 dB on Manga109 dataset, which is 0.8 dB higher than the state-of-the-art SwinIR method.
abstract_zh: 与基于 CNN 的方法相比，基于 Transformer 的方法由于能够对远程依赖性进行建模，因此取得了令人印象深刻的图像恢复性能。然而，像 SwinIR 这样的进步采用基于窗口的局部注意力策略来平衡性能和计算开销，这限制了使用大感受野来捕获全局信息并在早期层中建立长依赖关系。为了进一步提高捕获全局信息的效率，在这项工作中，我们提出 SwinFIR 通过替换具有图像范围感受野的快速傅立叶卷积（FFC）组件来扩展 SwinIR。我们还重新审视其他先进技术，即数据增强、预训练和特征集成，以提高图像重建的效果。我们的特征集成方法可以在不增加训练和测试时间的情况下显着提高模型的性能。我们将我们的算法应用于多个流行的大规模基准测试，并与现有方法相比实现了最先进的性能。例如，我们的 SwinFIR 在 Manga109 数据集上实现了 32.83 dB 的 PSNR，比最先进的 SwinIR 方法高 0.8 dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SwinFIR的图像超分辨率方法，通过引入快速傅里叶卷积（FFC）组件和改进训练策略来提升性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于Transformer的方法在图像恢复中表现出色，但SwinIR等方法由于采用基于窗口和局部注意力的策略，限制了在早期层中捕获全局信息和建立长依赖的能力。
AI.method: 本文通过将快速傅里叶卷积（FFC）组件引入SwinIR，以实现图像范围的感知域。此外，还重新审视了数据增强、预训练和特征集成等先进技术，以提高图像重建效果。
AI.result: 在多个大型基准测试中，SwinFIR取得了最先进的性能。例如，在Manga109数据集上，SwinFIR的PSNR达到32.83 dB，比最先进的SwinIR方法高出0.8 dB。
AI.conclusion: SwinFIR通过引入FFC组件和改进训练策略，在图像超分辨率任务中取得了显著的性能提升，且未增加训练和测试时间。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SwinFIR的图像超分辨率方法，通过引入快速傅里叶卷积（FFC）组件和改进训练策略来提升性能。
motivation: 尽管基于Transformer的方法在图像恢复中表现出色，但SwinIR等方法由于采用基于窗口和局部注意力的策略，限制了在早期层中捕获全局信息和建立长依赖的能力。
method: 本文通过将快速傅里叶卷积（FFC）组件引入SwinIR，以实现图像范围的感知域。此外，还重新审视了数据增强、预训练和特征集成等先进技术，以提高图像重建效果。
result: 在多个大型基准测试中，SwinFIR取得了最先进的性能。例如，在Manga109数据集上，SwinFIR的PSNR达到32.83 dB，比最先进的SwinIR方法高出0.8 dB。
conclusion: SwinFIR通过引入FFC组件和改进训练策略，在图像超分辨率任务中取得了显著的性能提升，且未增加训练和测试时间。
search_text: SwinFIR: Revisiting the SwinIR with Fast Fourier Convolution and Improved Training for Image Super-Resolution SwinFIR：通过快速傅立叶卷积和改进的图像超分辨率训练重新审视 SwinIR Transformer-based methods have achieved impressive image restoration performance due to their capacities to model long-range dependency compared to CNN-based methods. However, advances like SwinIR adopts the window-based and local attention strategy to balance the performance and computational overhead, which restricts employing large receptive fields to capture global information and establish long dependencies in the early layers. To further improve the efficiency of capturing global information, in this work, we propose SwinFIR to extend SwinIR by replacing Fast Fourier Convolution (FFC) components, which have the image-wide receptive field. We also revisit other advanced techniques, i.e, data augmentation, pre-training, and feature ensemble to improve the effect of image reconstruction. And our feature ensemble method enables the performance of the model to be considerably enhanced without increasing the training and testing time. We applied our algorithm on multiple popular large-scale benchmarks and achieved state-of-the-art performance comparing to the existing methods. For example, our SwinFIR achieves the PSNR of 32.83 dB on Manga109 dataset, which is 0.8 dB higher than the state-of-the-art SwinIR method. 与基于 CNN 的方法相比，基于 Transformer 的方法由于能够对远程依赖性进行建模，因此取得了令人印象深刻的图像恢复性能。然而，像 SwinIR 这样的进步采用基于窗口的局部注意力策略来平衡性能和计算开销，这限制了使用大感受野来捕获全局信息并在早期层中建立长依赖关系。为了进一步提高捕获全局信息的效率，在这项工作中，我们提出 SwinFIR 通过替换具有图像范围感受野的快速傅立叶卷积（FFC）组件来扩展 SwinIR。我们还重新审视其他先进技术，即数据增强、预训练和特征集成，以提高图像重建的效果。我们的特征集成方法可以在不增加训练和测试时间的情况下显着提高模型的性能。我们将我们的算法应用于多个流行的大规模基准测试，并与现有方法相比实现了最先进的性能。例如，我们的 SwinFIR 在 Manga109 数据集上实现了 32.83 dB 的 PSNR，比最先进的 SwinIR 方法高 0.8 dB。 本文提出了一种名为SwinFIR的图像超分辨率方法，通过引入快速傅里叶卷积（FFC）组件和改进训练策略来提升性能。 Dafeng Zhang,Feiyu Huang,Shizhuo Liu,Xiaobing Wang,Zhezhu Jin cs.CV

title: A new explainable DTM generation algorithm with airborne LIDAR data: grounds are smoothly connected eventually
title_zh: 一种新的可解释的机载激光雷达数据 DTM 生成算法：地面最终顺利连接
abstract: The digital terrain model (DTM) is fundamental geospatial data for various studies in urban, environmental, and Earth science. The reliability of the results obtained from such studies can be considerably affected by the errors and uncertainties of the underlying DTM. Numerous algorithms have been developed to mitigate the errors and uncertainties of DTM. However, most algorithms involve tricky parameter selection and complicated procedures that make the algorithm's decision rule obscure, so it is often difficult to explain and predict the errors and uncertainties of the resulting DTM. Also, previous algorithms often consider the local neighborhood of each point for distinguishing non-ground objects, which limits both search radius and contextual understanding and can be susceptible to errors particularly if point density varies. This study presents an open-source DTM generation algorithm for airborne LiDAR data that can consider beyond the local neighborhood and whose results are easily explainable, predictable, and reliable. The key assumption of the algorithm is that grounds are smoothly connected while non-grounds are surrounded by areas having sharp elevation changes. The robustness and uniqueness of the proposed algorithm were evaluated in geographically complex environments through tiling evaluation compared to other state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: The digital terrain model (DTM) is fundamental geospatial data for various studies in urban, environmental, and Earth science. The reliability of the results obtained from such studies can be considerably affected by the errors and uncertainties of the underlying DTM. Numerous algorithms have been developed to mitigate the errors and uncertainties of DTM. However, most algorithms involve tricky parameter selection and complicated procedures that make the algorithm's decision rule obscure, so it is often difficult to explain and predict the errors and uncertainties of the resulting DTM. Also, previous algorithms often consider the local neighborhood of each point for distinguishing non-ground objects, which limits both search radius and contextual understanding and can be susceptible to errors particularly if point density varies. This study presents an open-source DTM generation algorithm for airborne LiDAR data that can consider beyond the local neighborhood and whose results are easily explainable, predictable, and reliable. The key assumption of the algorithm is that grounds are smoothly connected while non-grounds are surrounded by areas having sharp elevation changes. The robustness and uniqueness of the proposed algorithm were evaluated in geographically complex environments through tiling evaluation compared to other state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 数字地形模型 (DTM) 是城市、环境和地球科学各种研究的基础地理空间数据。从此类研究中获得的结果的可靠性可能会受到基础 DTM 的错误和不确定性的显着影响。人们已经开发了许多算法来减轻 DTM 的错误和不确定性。然而，大多数算法涉及棘手的参数选择和复杂的程序，使得算法的决策规则变得模糊，因此通常很难解释和预测所得DTM的错误和不确定性。此外，以前的算法通常考虑每个点的局部邻域来区分非地​​面物体，这限制了搜索半径和上下文理解，并且可能容易出错，特别是在点密度变化的情况下。本研究提出了一种机载 LiDAR 数据的开源 DTM 生成算法，该算法可以考虑局部邻域之外的情况，并且其结果易于解释、可预测且可靠。该算法的关键假设是地面平滑连接，而非地面则被高程急剧变化的区域包围。通过与其他最先进算法相比的平铺评估，在地理复杂的环境中评估了所提出算法的鲁棒性和独特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机载激光雷达数据的新型可解释数字高程模型（DTM）生成算法，通过考虑更广区域的地形特征，实现地面点的平滑连接。
AI.motivation: 现有DTM算法存在参数选择复杂、局部邻域分析局限性及结果可解释性差等问题，导致生成的地形模型可靠性不足，难以预测和修正误差。
AI.method: 基于地面平滑性假设，通过分析非地面物体周围显著高程变化特征，结合分块评估方法，在复杂地理环境中验证算法鲁棒性。
AI.result: 算法在多种复杂地形场景下表现出优于现有先进算法的稳定性与独特性，生成的DTM具有更高的可解释性和预测可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过突破局部邻域限制并增强可解释性，为高精度、高可靠性DTM生成提供了新的解决方案。

title: Psychophysical Machine Learning
title_zh: 心理物理机器学习
abstract: The Weber Fechner Law of psychophysics observes that human perception is logarithmic in the stimulus. We present an algorithm for incorporating the Weber Fechner law into loss functions for machine learning, and use the algorithm to enhance the performance of deep learning networks.
summary: The Weber Fechner Law of psychophysics observes that human perception is logarithmic in the stimulus. We present an algorithm for incorporating the Weber Fechner law into loss functions for machine learning, and use the algorithm to enhance the performance of deep learning networks.
abstract_zh: 心理物理学的韦伯费希纳定律指出，人类的感知在刺激中呈对数关系。我们提出了一种将韦伯费希纳定律纳入机器学习损失函数的算法，并使用该算法来增强深度学习网络的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将韦伯-费希纳定律整合到机器学习损失函数中的算法，以提升深度学习网络性能。
AI.motivation: 人类感知对刺激的响应呈对数关系，而现有机器学习模型未充分考虑这一心理物理特性，可能导致性能局限。
AI.method: 设计符合韦伯-费希纳定律的损失函数算法，通过调整梯度更新机制使模型学习过程符合感知对数特性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效提升了深度学习网络在感知相关任务中的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 将心理物理学规律引入机器学习框架可增强模型对人类感知特性的拟合能力，为跨学科研究提供新方向。

title: Why Deep Learning's Performance Data Are Misleading
title_zh: 为什么深度学习的性能数据具有误导性
abstract: This is a theoretical paper, as a companion paper of the keynote talk at the same conference AIEE 2023. In contrast to conscious learning, many projects in AI have employed so-called "deep learning" many of which seemed to give impressive performance. This paper explains that such performance data are deceptively inflated due to two misconducts: "data deletion" and "test on training set". This paper clarifies "data deletion" and "test on training set" in deep learning and why they are misconducts. A simple classification method is defined, called Nearest Neighbor With Threshold (NNWT). A theorem is established that the NNWT method reaches a zero error on any validation set and any test set using the two misconducts, as long as the test set is in the possession of the author and both the amount of storage space and the time of training are finite but unbounded like with many deep learning methods. However, many deep learning methods, like the NNWT method, are all not generalizable since they have never been tested by a true test set. Why? The so-called "test set" was used in the Post-Selection step of the training stage. The evidence that misconducts actually took place in many deep learning projects is beyond the scope of this paper.
summary: This is a theoretical paper, as a companion paper of the keynote talk at the same conference AIEE 2023. In contrast to conscious learning, many projects in AI have employed so-called "deep learning" many of which seemed to give impressive performance. This paper explains that such performance data are deceptively inflated due to two misconducts: "data deletion" and "test on training set". This paper clarifies "data deletion" and "test on training set" in deep learning and why they are misconducts. A simple classification method is defined, called Nearest Neighbor With Threshold (NNWT). A theorem is established that the NNWT method reaches a zero error on any validation set and any test set using the two misconducts, as long as the test set is in the possession of the author and both the amount of storage space and the time of training are finite but unbounded like with many deep learning methods. However, many deep learning methods, like the NNWT method, are all not generalizable since they have never been tested by a true test set. Why? The so-called "test set" was used in the Post-Selection step of the training stage. The evidence that misconducts actually took place in many deep learning projects is beyond the scope of this paper.
abstract_zh: 这是一篇理论论文，作为同一届 AIEE 2023 会议主题演讲的配套论文。与有意识学习相反，人工智能领域的许多项目都采用了所谓的“深度学习”，其中许多项目似乎给出了令人印象深刻的表现。本文解释说，此类性能数据由于“数据删除”和“训练集测试”两种不当行为而被欺骗性夸大。本文澄清了深度学习中的“数据删除”和“训练集测试”以及为什么它们是不当行为。定义了一种简单的分类方法，称为带阈值的最近邻（NNWT）。建立了一个定理：NNWT 方法在使用这两种不当行为的任何验证集和任何测试集上都达到零误差，只要测试集为作者所有，并且存储空间量和训练时间都是有限但无界的，就像许多深度学习方法一样。然而，许多深度学习方法，例如 NNWT 方法，都不可推广，因为它们从未经过真正的测试集测试。为什么？所谓的“测试集”用于训练阶段的后选择步骤。许多深度学习项目中实际发生不当行为的证据超出了本文的范围。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨深度学习性能数据被误导的原因，揭示了'数据删除'和'测试集与训练集重复'两种不当操作如何导致性能指标虚高。
AI.motivation: 许多深度学习项目展示的优异性能可能源于数据处理不当，本文旨在揭露此类学术不端行为并重新评估模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 定义'带阈值最近邻分类法'(NNWT)，通过数学定理证明在特定不当操作下可实现零误差，同时分析深度学习方法未经过真正测试集验证的本质问题。

search_text: Why Deep Learning's Performance Data Are Misleading 为什么深度学习的性能数据具有误导性 This is a theoretical paper, as a companion paper of the keynote talk at the same conference AIEE 2023. In contrast to conscious learning, many projects in AI have employed so-called "deep learning" many of which seemed to give impressive performance. This paper explains that such performance data are deceptively inflated due to two misconducts: "data deletion" and "test on training set". This paper clarifies "data deletion" and "test on training set" in deep learning and why they are misconducts. A simple classification method is defined, called Nearest Neighbor With Threshold (NNWT). A theorem is established that the NNWT method reaches a zero error on any validation set and any test set using the two misconducts, as long as the test set is in the possession of the author and both the amount of storage space and the time of training are finite but unbounded like with many deep learning methods. However, many deep learning methods, like the NNWT method, are all not generalizable since they have never been tested by a true test set. Why? The so-called "test set" was used in the Post-Selection step of the training stage. The evidence that misconducts actually took place in many deep learning projects is beyond the scope of this paper. 这是一篇理论论文，作为同一届 AIEE 2023 会议主题演讲的配套论文。与有意识学习相反，人工智能领域的许多项目都采用了所谓的“深度学习”，其中许多项目似乎给出了令人印象深刻的表现。本文解释说，此类性能数据由于“数据删除”和“训练集测试”两种不当行为而被欺骗性夸大。本文澄清了深度学习中的“数据删除”和“训练集测试”以及为什么它们是不当行为。定义了一种简单的分类方法，称为带阈值的最近邻（NNWT）。建立了一个定理：NNWT 方法在使用这两种不当行为的任何验证集和任何测试集上都达到零误差，只要测试集为作者所有，并且存储空间量和训练时间都是有限但无界的，就像许多深度学习方法一样。然而，许多深度学习方法，例如 NNWT 方法，都不可推广，因为它们从未经过真正的测试集测试。为什么？所谓的“测试集”用于训练阶段的后选择步骤。许多深度学习项目中实际发生不当行为的证据超出了本文的范围。 本文探讨深度学习性能数据被误导的原因，揭示了'数据删除'和'测试集与训练集重复'两种不当操作如何导致性能指标虚高。 Juyang Weng cs.LG,cs.AI

title: POPDx: An Automated Framework for Patient Phenotyping across 392,246 Individuals in the UK Biobank Study
title_zh: POPDx：英国生物银行研究中针对 392,246 名个体进行患者表型分析的自动化框架
comment: 45 pages, 6 main figures, 2 main tables. Journal of the American Medical Informatics Association, 2022
comments: 45 pages, 6 main figures, 2 main tables. Journal of the American Medical Informatics Association, 2022
abstract: Objective For the UK Biobank standardized phenotype codes are associated with patients who have been hospitalized but are missing for many patients who have been treated exclusively in an outpatient setting. We describe a method for phenotype recognition that imputes phenotype codes for all UK Biobank participants. Materials and Methods POPDx (Population-based Objective Phenotyping by Deep Extrapolation) is a bilinear machine learning framework for simultaneously estimating the probabilities of 1,538 phenotype codes. We extracted phenotypic and health-related information of 392,246 individuals from the UK Biobank for POPDx development and evaluation. A total of 12,803 ICD-10 diagnosis codes of the patients were converted to 1,538 Phecodes as gold standard labels. The POPDx framework was evaluated and compared to other available methods on automated multi-phenotype recognition. Results POPDx can predict phenotypes that are rare or even unobserved in training. We demonstrate substantial improvement of automated multi-phenotype recognition across 22 disease categories, and its application in identifying key epidemiological features associated with each phenotype. Conclusions POPDx helps provide well-defined cohorts for downstream studies. It is a general purpose method that can be applied to other biobanks with diverse but incomplete data.
summary: Objective For the UK Biobank standardized phenotype codes are associated with patients who have been hospitalized but are missing for many patients who have been treated exclusively in an outpatient setting. We describe a method for phenotype recognition that imputes phenotype codes for all UK Biobank participants. Materials and Methods POPDx (Population-based Objective Phenotyping by Deep Extrapolation) is a bilinear machine learning framework for simultaneously estimating the probabilities of 1,538 phenotype codes. We extracted phenotypic and health-related information of 392,246 individuals from the UK Biobank for POPDx development and evaluation. A total of 12,803 ICD-10 diagnosis codes of the patients were converted to 1,538 Phecodes as gold standard labels. The POPDx framework was evaluated and compared to other available methods on automated multi-phenotype recognition. Results POPDx can predict phenotypes that are rare or even unobserved in training. We demonstrate substantial improvement of automated multi-phenotype recognition across 22 disease categories, and its application in identifying key epidemiological features associated with each phenotype. Conclusions POPDx helps provide well-defined cohorts for downstream studies. It is a general purpose method that can be applied to other biobanks with diverse but incomplete data.
abstract_zh: 目的 对于英国生物银行来说，标准化表型代码与住院患者相关，但许多仅在门诊接受治疗的患者缺失。我们描述了一种表型识别方法，可以为所有英国生物银行参与者估算表型代码。材料和方法 POPDx（基于群体的深度外推客观表型分析）是一种双线性机器学习框架，用于同时估计 1,538 个表型代码的概率。我们从英国生物库中提取了 392,246 名个体的表型和健康相关信息，用于 POPDx 开发和评估。总共12,803个患者的ICD-10诊断代码被转换为1,538个Phecode作为金标准标签。对 POPDx 框架进行了评估，并与其他可用的自动多表型识别方法进行了比较。结果 POPDx 可以预测训练中罕见甚至未观察到的表型。我们展示了 22 种疾病类别的自动多表型识别的显着改进，及其在识别与每种表型相关的关键流行病学特征方面的应用。结论 POPDx 有助于为下游研究提供明确的队列。它是一种通用方法，可应用于具有多样化但不完整数据的其他生物库。

AI.tldr: 本文提出POPDx框架，用于为英国生物库研究中的392,246名参与者自动填补缺失的标准化表型代码。
AI.motivation: 英国生物库的标准化表型代码仅覆盖住院患者，大量门诊患者数据缺失，需开发自动化方法填补这一空白。
AI.method: 基于双线性机器学习框架POPDx，利用12,803个ICD-10诊断代码转换为1,538个Phecodes作为黄金标准标签，同时估计多表型概率。
AI.result: POPDx可预测训练数据中罕见或未观察到的表型，在22类疾病中显著提升多表型识别能力，并识别出与各表型相关的流行病学特征。
AI.conclusion: POPDx为下游研究提供明确队列，是一种适用于其他数据不完整生物库的通用方法。

title: Data augmentation on graphs for table type classification
title_zh: 用于表类型分类的图上的数据增强
abstract: Tables are widely used in documents because of their compact and structured representation of information. In particular, in scientific papers, tables can sum up novel discoveries and summarize experimental results, making the research comparable and easily understandable by scholars. Since the layout of tables is highly variable, it would be useful to interpret their content and classify them into categories. This could be helpful to directly extract information from scientific papers, for instance comparing performance of some models given their paper result tables. In this work, we address the classification of tables using a Graph Neural Network, exploiting the table structure for the message passing algorithm in use. We evaluate our model on a subset of the Tab2Know dataset. Since it contains few examples manually annotated, we propose data augmentation techniques directly on the table graph structures. We achieve promising preliminary results, proposing a data augmentation method suitable for graph-based table representation.
summary: Tables are widely used in documents because of their compact and structured representation of information. In particular, in scientific papers, tables can sum up novel discoveries and summarize experimental results, making the research comparable and easily understandable by scholars. Since the layout of tables is highly variable, it would be useful to interpret their content and classify them into categories. This could be helpful to directly extract information from scientific papers, for instance comparing performance of some models given their paper result tables. In this work, we address the classification of tables using a Graph Neural Network, exploiting the table structure for the message passing algorithm in use. We evaluate our model on a subset of the Tab2Know dataset. Since it contains few examples manually annotated, we propose data augmentation techniques directly on the table graph structures. We achieve promising preliminary results, proposing a data augmentation method suitable for graph-based table representation.
abstract_zh: 表格因其紧凑且结构化的信息表示而广泛用于文档中。特别是在科学论文中，表格可以总结新发现并总结实验结果，使研究具有可比性并易于学者理解。由于表格的布局变化很大，因此解释其内容并将其分类将很有用。这可能有助于直接从科学论文中提取信息，例如在给定论文结果表的情况下比较某些模型的性能。在这项工作中，我们使用图神经网络来解决表的分类问题，利用所使用的消息传递算法的表结构。我们在 Tab2Know 数据集的子集上评估我们的模型。由于它包含很少的手动注释示例，因此我们直接在表图结构上提出数据增强技术。我们取得了有希望的初步结果，提出了一种适合基于图的表表示的数据增强方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用图神经网络对表格进行类型分类，并提出针对表格图结构的数据增强方法以解决标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 表格布局多样，分类有助于从科学论文中提取信息，但现有标注数据有限，需有效数据增强方法提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用图神经网络（GNN）建模表格结构，利用消息传递机制进行分类，并设计基于图结构的数据增强技术以扩充训练数据。
AI.result: 在Tab2Know数据集子集上实现了有希望的初步分类效果，验证了所提数据增强方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的图数据增强方法有效提升了表格分类性能，为基于图结构的表格分析提供了可行方案，未来可进一步优化增强策略。

In this work, we address the classification of tables using a Graph Neural Network, exploiting the table structure for the message passing algorithm in use. We evaluate our model on a subset of the Tab2Know dataset. Since it contains few examples manually annotated, we propose data augmentation techniques directly on the table graph structures. We achieve promising preliminary results, proposing a data augmentation method suitable for graph-based table representation. 表格因其紧凑且结构化的信息表示而广泛用于文档中。特别是在科学论文中，表格可以总结新发现并总结实验结果，使研究具有可比性并易于学者理解。由于表格的布局变化很大，因此解释其内容并将其分类将很有用。这可能有助于直接从科学论文中提取信息，例如在给定论文结果表的情况下比较某些模型的性能。在这项工作中，我们使用图神经网络来解决表的分类问题，利用所使用的消息传递算法的表结构。我们在 Tab2Know 数据集的子集上评估我们的模型。由于它包含很少的手动注释示例，因此我们直接在表图结构上提出数据增强技术。我们取得了有希望的初步结果，提出了一种适合基于图的表表示的数据增强方法。 本文旨在利用图神经网络对表格进行类型分类，并提出针对表格图结构的数据增强方法以解决标注数据不足的问题。 Davide del Bimbo,Andrea Gemelli,Simone Marinai cs.CV

title: Graph Neural Networks and Representation Embedding for Table Extraction in PDF Documents
title_zh: 用于 PDF 文档中表格提取的图神经网络和表示嵌入
abstract: Tables are widely used in several types of documents since they can bring important information in a structured way. In scientific papers, tables can sum up novel discoveries and summarize experimental results, making the research comparable and easily understandable by scholars. Several methods perform table analysis working on document images, losing useful information during the conversion from the PDF files since OCR tools can be prone to recognition errors, in particular for text inside tables. The main contribution of this work is to tackle the problem of table extraction, exploiting Graph Neural Networks. Node features are enriched with suitably designed representation embeddings. These representations help to better distinguish not only tables from the other parts of the paper, but also table cells from table headers. We experimentally evaluated the proposed approach on a new dataset obtained by merging the information provided in the PubLayNet and PubTables-1M datasets.

In scientific papers, tables can sum up novel discoveries and summarize experimental results, making the research comparable and easily understandable by scholars. Several methods perform table analysis working on document images, losing useful information during the conversion from the PDF files since OCR tools can be prone to recognition errors, in particular for text inside tables. The main contribution of this work is to tackle the problem of table extraction, exploiting Graph Neural Networks. Node features are enriched with suitably designed representation embeddings. These representations help to better distinguish not only tables from the other parts of the paper, but also table cells from table headers. We experimentally evaluated the proposed approach on a new dataset obtained by merging the information provided in the PubLayNet and PubTables-1M datasets.
abstract_zh: 表格广泛用于多种类型的文档中，因为它们可以以结构化的方式提供重要信息。在科学论文中，表格可以总结新发现并总结实验结果，使研究具有可比性并且易于学者理解。有多种方法对文档图像执行表格分析，但在从 PDF 文件转换过程中会丢失有用的信息，因为 OCR 工具很容易出现识别错误，尤其是表格内的文本。这项工作的主要贡献是利用图神经网络解决表提取问题。通过适当设计的表示嵌入来丰富节点特征。这些表示不仅有助于更好地区分表格与论文的其他部分，还有助于更好地区分表格单元格与表格标题。我们在通过合并 PubLayNet 和 PubTables-1M 数据集中提供的信息获得的新数据集上对所提出的方法进行了实验评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络和表示嵌入的方法，用于从PDF文档中准确提取表格结构。
AI.motivation: 现有表格分析方法依赖OCR处理PDF文档，易因识别错误导致信息丢失，需更鲁棒的表格提取方案。
AI.method: 利用图神经网络建模表格结构，通过设计的表示嵌入增强节点特征，区分表格与非表格区域及表头与单元格。
AI.result: 在合并PubLayNet和PubTables-1M数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性，显著提升表格提取准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效避免OCR误差，为PDF表格分析提供新思路，可推广至其他文档结构化信息提取任务。
