title: Modelling Latent Dynamics of StyleGAN using Neural ODEs
title_zh: 使用神经常微分方程对 StyleGAN 的潜在动态进行建模
abstract: In this paper, we propose to model the video dynamics by learning the trajectory of independently inverted latent codes from GANs. The entire sequence is seen as discrete-time observations of a continuous trajectory of the initial latent code, by considering each latent code as a moving particle and the latent space as a high-dimensional dynamic system. The latent codes representing different frames are therefore reformulated as state transitions of the initial frame, which can be modeled by neural ordinary differential equations. The learned continuous trajectory allows us to perform infinite frame interpolation and consistent video manipulation. The latter task is reintroduced for video editing with the advantage of requiring the core operations to be applied to the first frame only while maintaining temporal consistency across all frames. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance but with much less computation. Code is available at https://github.com/weihaox/dynode_released.
summary: In this paper, we propose to model the video dynamics by learning the trajectory of independently inverted latent codes from GANs. The entire sequence is seen as discrete-time observations of a continuous trajectory of the initial latent code, by considering each latent code as a moving particle and the latent space as a high-dimensional dynamic system. The latent codes representing different frames are therefore reformulated as state transitions of the initial frame, which can be modeled by neural ordinary differential equations. The learned continuous trajectory allows us to perform infinite frame interpolation and consistent video manipulation. The latter task is reintroduced for video editing with the advantage of requiring the core operations to be applied to the first frame only while maintaining temporal consistency across all frames. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance but with much less computation. Code is available at https://github.com/weihaox/dynode_released.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们建议通过学习 GAN 中独立反转的潜在代码的轨迹来对视频动态进行建模。通过将每个潜在代码视为移动粒子并将潜在空间视为高维动态系统，整个序列被视为对初始潜在代码的连续轨迹的离散时间观察。因此，代表不同帧的潜在代码被重新表述为初始帧的状态转换，这可以通过神经常微分方程来建模。学习到的连续轨迹使我们能够执行无限帧插值和一致的视频操作。后一个任务被重新引入视频编辑中，其优点是要求核心操作仅应用于第一帧，同时保持所有帧的时间一致性。大量的实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，但计算量却少得多。代码可在 https://github.com/weihaox/dynode_released 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过学习GANs中独立反转的潜在代码轨迹，利用神经常微分方程（Neural ODEs）建模StyleGAN的潜在动态，实现无限帧插值和一致的视频编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有视频编辑方法计算成本高或难以保持时间一致性，需开发更高效且能保持动态连贯性的视频生成与编辑技术。
AI.method: 将潜在代码视为高维动态系统中的粒子，将不同帧的潜在代码重构为初始帧的状态转移，通过神经ODE建模连续轨迹，仅需对首帧进行操作即可实现全局时间一致性编辑。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在计算成本显著降低的情况下达到最先进的视频生成与编辑性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 神经ODE有效捕捉潜在空间动态，为高效、一致的视频编辑提供了新思路，未来可扩展至其他生成模型动态建模任务。

title: PU-MFA : Point Cloud Up-sampling via Multi-scale Features Attention
title_zh: PU-MFA：通过多尺度特征注意力进行点云上采样
abstract: Recently, research using point clouds has been increasing with the development of 3D scanner technology. According to this trend, the demand for high-quality point clouds is increasing, but there is still a problem with the high cost of obtaining high-quality point clouds. Therefore, with the recent remarkable development of deep learning, point cloud up-sampling research, which uses deep learning to generate high-quality point clouds from low-quality point clouds, is one of the fields attracting considerable attention. This paper proposes a new point cloud up-sampling method called Point cloud Up-sampling via Multi-scale Features Attention (PU-MFA). Inspired by previous studies that reported good performance using the multi-scale features or attention mechanisms, PU-MFA merges the two through a U-Net structure. In addition, PU-MFA adaptively uses multi-scale features to refine the global features effectively. The performance of PU-MFA was compared with other state-of-the-art methods through various experiments using the PU-GAN dataset, which is a synthetic point cloud dataset, and the KITTI dataset, which is the real-scanned point cloud dataset. In various experimental results, PU-MFA showed superior performance in quantitative and qualitative evaluation compared to other state-of-the-art methods, proving the effectiveness of the proposed method. The attention map of PU-MFA was also visualized to show the effect of multi-scale features.
summary: Recently, research using point clouds has been increasing with the development of 3D scanner technology. According to this trend, the demand for high-quality point clouds is increasing, but there is still a problem with the high cost of obtaining high-quality point clouds. Therefore, with the recent remarkable development of deep learning, point cloud up-sampling research, which uses deep learning to generate high-quality point clouds from low-quality point clouds, is one of the fields attracting considerable attention. This paper proposes a new point cloud up-sampling method called Point cloud Up-sampling via Multi-scale Features Attention (PU-MFA). Inspired by previous studies that reported good performance using the multi-scale features or attention mechanisms, PU-MFA merges the two through a U-Net structure. In addition, PU-MFA adaptively uses multi-scale features to refine the global features effectively. The performance of PU-MFA was compared with other state-of-the-art methods through various experiments using the PU-GAN dataset, which is a synthetic point cloud dataset, and the KITTI dataset, which is the real-scanned point cloud dataset. In various experimental results, PU-MFA showed superior performance in quantitative and qualitative evaluation compared to other state-of-the-art methods, proving the effectiveness of the proposed method. The attention map of PU-MFA was also visualized to show the effect of multi-scale features.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着3D扫描仪技术的发展，使用点云的研究不断增加。按照这一趋势，对高质量点云的需求不断增加，但仍然存在获取高质量点云成本较高的问题。因此，随着近年来深度学习的显着发展，利用深度学习从低质量点云生成高质量点云的点云上采样研究是备受关注的领域之一。本文提出了一种新的点云上采样方法，称为通过多尺度特征注意力的点云上采样（PU-MFA）。受到之前使用多尺度特征或注意力机制获得良好性能的研究的启发，PU-MFA 通过 U-Net 结构将两者合并。此外，PU-MFA自适应地使用多尺度特征来有效细化全局特征。通过使用 PU-GAN 数据集（合成点云数据集）和 KITTI 数据集（真实扫描点云数据集）进行的各种实验，将 PU-MFA 的性能与其他最先进的方法进行比较。在各种实验结果中，与其他最先进的方法相比，PU-MFA 在定量和定性评估方面表现出优越的性能，证明了该方法的有效性。 PU-MFA 的注意力图也被可视化，以显示多尺度特征的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多尺度特征注意力机制的点云上采样方法PU-MFA，旨在从低质量点云生成高质量点云。
AI.motivation: 高质量点云获取成本高，而现有方法在细节保留和结构完整性上存在不足，需结合多尺度特征与注意力机制提升效果。
AI.method: 通过U-Net结构融合多尺度特征与注意力机制，自适应优化全局特征，利用多尺度特征细化局部细节。
AI.result: 在PU-GAN和KITTI数据集上，PU-MFA在定量与定性评估中均优于现有方法，注意力图可视化验证了多尺度特征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PU-MFA通过结合多尺度特征与注意力机制，有效提升了点云上采样质量，实验结果验证了方法的优越性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多尺度特征注意力机制的点云上采样方法PU-MFA，旨在从低质量点云生成高质量点云。

search_text: PU-MFA : Point Cloud Up-sampling via Multi-scale Features Attention PU-MFA：通过多尺度特征注意力进行点云上采样 Recently, research using point clouds has been increasing with the development of 3D scanner technology. According to this trend, the demand for high-quality point clouds is increasing, but there is still a problem with the high cost of obtaining high-quality point clouds. Therefore, with the recent remarkable development of deep learning, point cloud up-sampling research, which uses deep learning to generate high-quality point clouds from low-quality point clouds, is one of the fields attracting considerable attention. This paper proposes a new point cloud up-sampling method called Point cloud Up-sampling via Multi-scale Features Attention (PU-MFA). Inspired by previous studies that reported good performance using the multi-scale features or attention mechanisms, PU-MFA merges the two through a U-Net structure. In addition, PU-MFA adaptively uses multi-scale features to refine the global features effectively. The performance of PU-MFA was compared with other state-of-the-art methods through various experiments using the PU-GAN dataset, which is a synthetic point cloud dataset, and the KITTI dataset, which is the real-scanned point cloud dataset. In various experimental results, PU-MFA showed superior performance in quantitative and qualitative evaluation compared to other state-of-the-art methods, proving the effectiveness of the proposed method. The attention map of PU-MFA was also visualized to show the effect of multi-scale features. 近年来，随着3D扫描仪技术的发展，使用点云的研究不断增加。按照这一趋势，对高质量点云的需求不断增加，但仍然存在获取高质量点云成本较高的问题。因此，随着近年来深度学习的显着发展，利用深度学习从低质量点云生成高质量点云的点云上采样研究是备受关注的领域之一。本文提出了一种新的点云上采样方法，称为通过多尺度特征注意力的点云上采样（PU-MFA）。受到之前使用多尺度特征或注意力机制获得良好性能的研究的启发，PU-MFA 通过 U-Net 结构将两者合并。此外，PU-MFA自适应地使用多尺度特征来有效细化全局特征。通过使用 PU-GAN 数据集（合成点云数据集）和 KITTI 数据集（真实扫描点云数据集）进行的各种实验，将 PU-MFA 的性能与其他最先进的方法进行比较。在各种实验结果中，与其他最先进的方法相比，PU-MFA 在定量和定性评估方面表现出优越的性能，证明了该方法的有效性。 PU-MFA 的注意力图也被可视化，以显示多尺度特征的效果。 本文提出了一种基于多尺度特征注意力机制的点云上采样方法PU-MFA，旨在从低质量点云生成高质量点云。 Hyungjun Lee,Sejoon Lim cs.CV

authors_text: Ashwin De Silva,Rahul Ramesh,Carey E. Priebe,Pratik Chaudhari,Joshua T. Vogelstein
title: The Value of Out-of-Distribution Data
title_zh: 分布外数据的价值
comment: Previous versions of this work have been presented at the Out-of-Distribution Generalization in Computer Vision (OOD-CV) Workshop (ECCV 2022) and the Workshop on Distribution Shifts (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: Previous versions of this work have been presented at the Out-of-Distribution Generalization in Computer Vision (OOD-CV) Workshop (ECCV 2022) and the Workshop on Distribution Shifts (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: We expect the generalization error to improve with more samples from a similar task, and to deteriorate with more samples from an out-of-distribution (OOD) task. In this work, we show a counter-intuitive phenomenon: the generalization error of a task can be a non-monotonic function of the number of OOD samples. As the number of OOD samples increases, the generalization error on the target task improves before deteriorating beyond a threshold. In other words, there is value in training on small amounts of OOD data. We use Fisher's Linear Discriminant on synthetic datasets and deep networks on computer vision benchmarks such as MNIST, CIFAR-10, CINIC-10, PACS and DomainNet to demonstrate and analyze this phenomenon. In the idealistic setting where we know which samples are OOD, we show that these non-monotonic trends can be exploited using an appropriately weighted objective of the target and OOD empirical risk. While its practical utility is limited, this does suggest that if we can detect OOD samples, then there may be ways to benefit from them. When we do not know which samples are OOD, we show how a number of go-to strategies such as data-augmentation, hyper-parameter optimization, and pre-training are not enough to ensure that the target generalization error does not deteriorate with the number of OOD samples in the dataset.
summary: We expect the generalization error to improve with more samples from a similar task, and to deteriorate with more samples from an out-of-distribution (OOD) task. In this work, we show a counter-intuitive phenomenon: the generalization error of a task can be a non-monotonic function of the number of OOD samples. As the number of OOD samples increases, the generalization error on the target task improves before deteriorating beyond a threshold. In other words, there is value in training on small amounts of OOD data. We use Fisher's Linear Discriminant on synthetic datasets and deep networks on computer vision benchmarks such as MNIST, CIFAR-10, CINIC-10, PACS and DomainNet to demonstrate and analyze this phenomenon. In the idealistic setting where we know which samples are OOD, we show that these non-monotonic trends can be exploited using an appropriately weighted objective of the target and OOD empirical risk. While its practical utility is limited, this does suggest that if we can detect OOD samples, then there may be ways to benefit from them. When we do not know which samples are OOD, we show how a number of go-to strategies such as data-augmentation, hyper-parameter optimization, and pre-training are not enough to ensure that the target generalization error does not deteriorate with the number of OOD samples in the dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们预计泛化误差会随着来自类似任务的更多样本而改善，而随着来自分布外（OOD）任务的更多样本而恶化。在这项工作中，我们展示了一个反直觉的现象：任务的泛化误差可以是 OOD 样本数量的非单调函数。随着 OOD 样本数量的增加，目标任务的泛化误差在恶化到超过阈值之前会有所改善。换句话说，少量 OOD 数据的训练是有价值的。我们在 MNIST、CIFAR-10、CINIC-10、PACS 和 DomainNet 等计算机视觉基准的合成数据集和深度网络上使用 Fisher 线性判别法来演示和分析这种现象。在我们知道哪些样本是 OOD 的理想环境中，我们表明可以使用目标和 OOD 经验风险的适当加权目标来利用这些非单调趋势。虽然它的实用性有限，但这确实表明，如果我们能够检测 OOD 样本，那么可能有方法可以从中受益。当我们不知道哪些样本是 OOD 时，我们展示了数据增强、超参数优化和预训练等多种首选策略不足以确保目标泛化误差不会随着数据集中 OOD 样本数量的增加而恶化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分布外（OOD）数据对目标任务泛化误差的非单调影响，并探讨了在不同条件下利用OOD数据的策略。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为，增加OOD样本会损害模型泛化性能，但作者发现泛化误差可能随OOD样本数量增加先改善后恶化，因此需重新评估OOD数据的价值。
AI.method: 采用Fisher线性判别分析和深度网络在多个基准数据集（如MNIST、CIFAR-10等）上验证现象；通过加权目标函数利用已知OOD样本，并测试数据增强等策略在未知OOD场景下的效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，少量OOD数据可提升目标任务性能，但超过阈值后性能下降；当能检测OOD样本时，加权损失函数可有效利用其价值，而常用策略在未知OOD场景下无法避免性能恶化。
AI.conclusion: 若能识别OOD样本，合理利用其可提升模型性能；但现有方法在未知OOD场景下难以保证性能稳定，需进一步研究检测与利用策略。

title: Derandomizing Directed Random Walks in Almost-Linear Time
title_zh: 在几乎线性的时间内去随机定向随机游走
abstract: In this article, we present the first deterministic directed Laplacian L systems solver that runs in time almost-linear in the number of non-zero entries of L. Previous reductions imply the first deterministic almost-linear time algorithms for computing various fundamental quantities on directed graphs including stationary distributions, personalized PageRank, hitting times and escape probabilities. We obtain these results by introducing partial symmetrization, a new technique that makes the Laplacian of an Eulerian directed graph ``less directed'' in a useful sense, which may be of independent interest. The usefulness of this technique comes from two key observations: Firstly, the partially symmetrized Laplacian preconditions the original Eulerian Laplacian well in Richardson iteration, enabling us to construct a solver for the original matrix from a solver for the partially symmetrized one. Secondly, the undirected structure in the partially symmetrized Laplacian makes it possible to sparsify the matrix very crudely, i.e. with large spectral error, and still show that Richardson iterations convergence when using the sparsified matrix as a preconditioner. This allows us to develop deterministic sparsification tools for the partially symmetrized Laplacian. Together with previous reductions from directed Laplacians to Eulerian Laplacians, our technique results in the first deterministic almost-linear time algorithm for solving linear equations in directed Laplacians. To emphasize the generality of our new technique, we show that two prominent existing (randomized) frameworks for solving linear equations in Eulerian Laplacians can be derandomized in this way: the squaring-based framework of Cohen, Kelner, Peebles, Peng, Rao, Sidford and Vladu (STOC 2017) and the sparsified Cholesky-based framework of Peng and Song (STOC 2022).
summary: In this article, we present the first deterministic directed Laplacian L systems solver that runs in time almost-linear in the number of non-zero entries of L. Previous reductions imply the first deterministic almost-linear time algorithms for computing various fundamental quantities on directed graphs including stationary distributions, personalized PageRank, hitting times and escape probabilities. We obtain these results by introducing partial symmetrization, a new technique that makes the Laplacian of an Eulerian directed graph ``less directed'' in a useful sense, which may be of independent interest. The usefulness of this technique comes from two key observations: Firstly, the partially symmetrized Laplacian preconditions the original Eulerian Laplacian well in Richardson iteration, enabling us to construct a solver for the original matrix from a solver for the partially symmetrized one. Secondly, the undirected structure in the partially symmetrized Laplacian makes it possible to sparsify the matrix very crudely, i.e. with large spectral error, and still show that Richardson iterations convergence when using the sparsified matrix as a preconditioner. This allows us to develop deterministic sparsification tools for the partially symmetrized Laplacian. Together with previous reductions from directed Laplacians to Eulerian Laplacians, our technique results in the first deterministic almost-linear time algorithm for solving linear equations in directed Laplacians. To emphasize the generality of our new technique, we show that two prominent existing (randomized) frameworks for solving linear equations in Eulerian Laplacians can be derandomized in this way: the squaring-based framework of Cohen, Kelner, Peebles, Peng, Rao, Sidford and Vladu (STOC 2017) and the sparsified Cholesky-based framework of Peng and Song (STOC 2022).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了第一个确定性有向拉普拉斯 L 系统求解器，它在 L 的非零条目数量中几乎线性地运行。之前的简化意味着第一个确定性近线性时间算法，用于计算有向图上的各种基本量，包括平稳分布、个性化 PageRank、命中时间和逃逸概率。我们通过引入部分对称化来获得这些结果，这是一种新技术，它使欧拉有向图的拉普拉斯在有用的意义上“无向”，这可能是独立的兴趣。这项技术的有用性来自于两个关键的观察结果：首先，部分对称拉普拉斯算子在理查森迭代中很好地预处理了原始欧拉拉普拉斯算子，使我们能够从部分对称矩阵的求解器构造原始矩阵的求解器。其次，部分对称拉普拉斯算子中的无向结构使得可以非常粗略地稀疏矩阵，即具有较大的谱误差，并且在使用稀疏矩阵作为预处理器时仍然表明理查森迭代收敛。这使我们能够为部分对称拉普拉斯开发确定性稀疏化工具。与之前从有向拉普拉斯算子到欧拉拉普拉斯算子的简化一起，我们的技术产生了第一个用于求解有向拉普拉斯线性方程的确定性几乎线性时间算法。为了强调我们新技术的通用性，我们展示了两个用于求解欧拉拉普拉斯线性方程的现有（随机化）框架可以通过这种方式去随机化：Cohen、Kelner、Peebles、Peng、Rao、Sidford 和 Vladu 的基于平方的框架（STOC 2017）以及 Peng 和 Song 的基于稀疏 Cholesky 的框架（STOC 2022）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在几乎线性时间内运行的确定性有向拉普拉斯系统求解器，并用于计算有向图的基本量。
AI.motivation: 现有有向图算法多依赖随机化方法或时间复杂度较高，缺乏高效的确定性解决方案。
AI.method: 引入部分对称化技术，通过预处理和粗略稀疏化降低有向拉普拉斯矩阵的定向性，并结合Richardson迭代构建求解器。
AI.result: 首次实现有向拉普拉斯线性方程组的确定性几乎线性时间算法，并成功去随机化两个主流框架。
AI.conclusion: 部分对称化技术具有通用性，为有向图计算提供了高效确定性方法的新途径。

tldr: 本文提出了一种在几乎线性时间内运行的确定性有向拉普拉斯系统求解器，并用于计算有向图的基本量。
motivation: 现有有向图算法多依赖随机化方法或时间复杂度较高，缺乏高效的确定性解决方案。
method: 引入部分对称化技术，通过预处理和粗略稀疏化降低有向拉普拉斯矩阵的定向性，并结合Richardson迭代构建求解器。
result: 首次实现有向拉普拉斯线性方程组的确定性几乎线性时间算法，并成功去随机化两个主流框架。
conclusion: 部分对称化技术具有通用性，为有向图计算提供了高效确定性方法的新途径。
search_text: Derandomizing Directed Random Walks in Almost-Linear Time 在几乎线性的时间内去随机定向随机游走 In this article, we present the first deterministic directed Laplacian L systems solver that runs in time almost-linear in the number of non-zero entries of L. Previous reductions imply the first deterministic almost-linear time algorithms for computing various fundamental quantities on directed graphs including stationary distributions, personalized PageRank, hitting times and escape probabilities. We obtain these results by introducing partial symmetrization, a new technique that makes the Laplacian of an Eulerian directed graph ``less directed'' in a useful sense, which may be of independent interest. The usefulness of this technique comes from two key observations: Firstly, the partially symmetrized Laplacian preconditions the original Eulerian Laplacian well in Richardson iteration, enabling us to construct a solver for the original matrix from a solver for the partially symmetrized one. Secondly, the undirected structure in the partially symmetrized Laplacian makes it possible to sparsify the matrix very crudely, i.e. with large spectral error, and still show that Richardson iterations convergence when using the sparsified matrix as a preconditioner. This allows us to develop deterministic sparsification tools for the partially symmetrized Laplacian. Together with previous reductions from directed Laplacians to Eulerian Laplacians, our technique results in the first deterministic almost-linear time algorithm for solving linear equations in directed Laplacians. To emphasize the generality of our new technique, we show that two prominent existing (randomized) frameworks for solving linear equations in Eulerian Laplacians can be derandomized in this way: the squaring-based framework of Cohen, Kelner, Peebles, Peng, Rao, Sidford and Vladu (STOC 2017) and the sparsified Cholesky-based framework of Peng and Song (STOC 2022). 在本文中，我们提出了第一个确定性有向拉普拉斯 L 系统求解器，它在 L 的非零条目数量中几乎线性地运行。之前的简化意味着第一个确定性近线性时间算法，用于计算有向图上的各种基本量，包括平稳分布、个性化 PageRank、命中时间和逃逸概率。我们通过引入部分对称化来获得这些结果，这是一种新技术，它使欧拉有向图的拉普拉斯在有用的意义上“无向”，这可能是独立的兴趣。这项技术的有用性来自于两个关键的观察结果：首先，部分对称拉普拉斯算子在理查森迭代中很好地预处理了原始欧拉拉普拉斯算子，使我们能够从部分对称矩阵的求解器构造原始矩阵的求解器。其次，部分对称拉普拉斯算子中的无向结构使得可以非常粗略地稀疏矩阵，即具有较大的谱误差，并且在使用稀疏矩阵作为预处理器时仍然表明理查森迭代收敛。这使我们能够为部分对称拉普拉斯开发确定性稀疏化工具。与之前从有向拉普拉斯算子到欧拉拉普拉斯算子的简化一起，我们的技术产生了第一个用于求解有向拉普拉斯线性方程的确定性几乎线性时间算法。为了强调我们新技术的通用性，我们展示了两个用于求解欧拉拉普拉斯线性方程的现有（随机化）框架可以通过这种方式去随机化：Cohen、Kelner、Peebles、Peng、Rao、Sidford 和 Vladu 的基于平方的框架（STOC 2017）以及 Peng 和 Song 的基于稀疏 Cholesky 的框架（STOC 2022）。 本文提出了一种在几乎线性时间内运行的确定性有向拉普拉斯系统求解器，并用于计算有向图的基本量。 Rasmus Kyng,Simon Meierhans,Maximilian Probst Gutenberg cs.DS

authors_text: Rajat Rasal,Daniel C. Castro,Nick Pawlowski,Ben Glocker
title: Deep Structural Causal Shape Models
title_zh: 深层结构因果形状模型
comment: Accepted in 2nd Causality in Vision Workshop at ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted in 2nd Causality in Vision Workshop at ECCV 2022
abstract: Causal reasoning provides a language to ask important interventional and counterfactual questions beyond purely statistical association. In medical imaging, for example, we may want to study the causal effect of genetic, environmental, or lifestyle factors on the normal and pathological variation of anatomical phenotypes. However, while anatomical shape models of 3D surface meshes, extracted from automated image segmentation, can be reliably constructed, there is a lack of computational tooling to enable causal reasoning about morphological variations. To tackle this problem, we propose deep structural causal shape models (CSMs), which utilise high-quality mesh generation techniques, from geometric deep learning, within the expressive framework of deep structural causal models. CSMs enable subject-specific prognoses through counterfactual mesh generation ("How would this patient's brain structure change if they were ten years older?"), which is in contrast to most current works on purely population-level statistical shape modelling. We demonstrate the capabilities of CSMs at all levels of Pearl's causal hierarchy through a number of qualitative and quantitative experiments leveraging a large dataset of 3D brain structures.
summary: Causal reasoning provides a language to ask important interventional and counterfactual questions beyond purely statistical association. In medical imaging, for example, we may want to study the causal effect of genetic, environmental, or lifestyle factors on the normal and pathological variation of anatomical phenotypes. However, while anatomical shape models of 3D surface meshes, extracted from automated image segmentation, can be reliably constructed, there is a lack of computational tooling to enable causal reasoning about morphological variations. To tackle this problem, we propose deep structural causal shape models (CSMs), which utilise high-quality mesh generation techniques, from geometric deep learning, within the expressive framework of deep structural causal models. CSMs enable subject-specific prognoses through counterfactual mesh generation ("How would this patient's brain structure change if they were ten years older?"), which is in contrast to most current works on purely population-level statistical shape modelling. We demonstrate the capabilities of CSMs at all levels of Pearl's causal hierarchy through a number of qualitative and quantitative experiments leveraging a large dataset of 3D brain structures.
abstract_zh: 因果推理提供了一种语言来提出超越纯粹统计关联的重要干预和反事实问题。例如，在医学成像中，我们可能想要研究遗传、环境或生活方式因素对解剖表型的正常和病理变异的因果影响。然而，虽然可以可靠地构建从自动图像分割中提取的 3D 表面网格的解剖形状模型，但缺乏计算工具来对形态变化进行因果推理。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了深层结构因果形状模型（CSM），它在深层结构因果模型的表达框架内利用几何深度学习的高质量网格生成技术。 CSM 通过反事实网格生成实现特定于受试者的预后（“如果该患者年长十岁，其大脑结构会如何变化？”），这与当前大多数纯粹人口水平统计形状建模的工作形成鲜明对比。我们利用大量 3D 大脑结构数据集进行大量定性和定量实验，展示了 CSM 在 Pearl 因果层次结构各个级别的功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出深度结构因果形状模型（CSMs），用于在医学影像中实现对解剖形态变化的因果推理。
AI.motivation: 现有解剖形状模型仅能描述统计关联，缺乏对遗传、环境等因素导致形态变化的因果推理能力，无法回答干预性或反事实问题。
AI.method: 结合几何深度学习的高质量网格生成技术与深度结构因果模型框架，构建支持个体化反事实预测的CSMs模型。
AI.result: 通过大量3D脑结构数据集的定性和定量实验，验证了CSMs在Pearl因果层次各层级的有效性，可生成个体化反事实网格（如预测患者十年后的脑结构变化）。
AI.conclusion: CSMs为医学影像中的因果分析提供了新框架，相比传统统计形状建模，能更精准地支持个体化医学预测与干预研究。

title: Regularized impurity reduction: Accurate decision trees with complexity guarantees
title_zh: 正则化杂质减少：复杂度保证的准确决策树
abstract: Decision trees are popular classification models, providing high accuracy and intuitive explanations. However, as the tree size grows the model interpretability deteriorates. Traditional tree-induction algorithms, such as C4.5 and CART, rely on impurity-reduction functions that promote the discriminative power of each split. Thus, although these traditional methods are accurate in practice, there has been no theoretical guarantee that they will produce small trees. In this paper, we justify the use of a general family of impurity functions, including the popular functions of entropy and Gini-index, in scenarios where small trees are desirable, by showing that a simple enhancement can equip them with complexity guarantees. We consider a general setting, where objects to be classified are drawn from an arbitrary probability distribution, classification can be binary or multi-class, and splitting tests are associated with non-uniform costs. As a measure of tree complexity, we adopt the expected cost to classify an object drawn from the input distribution, which, in the uniform-cost case, is the expected number of tests. We propose a tree-induction algorithm that gives a logarithmic approximation guarantee on the tree complexity. This approximation factor is tight up to a constant factor under mild assumptions. The algorithm recursively selects a test that maximizes a greedy criterion defined as a weighted sum of three components. The first two components encourage the selection of tests that improve the balance and the cost-efficiency of the tree, respectively, while the third impurity-reduction component encourages the selection of more discriminative tests. As shown in our empirical evaluation, compared to the original heuristics, the enhanced algorithms strike an excellent balance between predictive accuracy and tree complexity.
summary: Decision trees are popular classification models, providing high accuracy and intuitive explanations. However, as the tree size grows the model interpretability deteriorates. Traditional tree-induction algorithms, such as C4.5 and CART, rely on impurity-reduction functions that promote the discriminative power of each split. Thus, although these traditional methods are accurate in practice, there has been no theoretical guarantee that they will produce small trees. In this paper, we justify the use of a general family of impurity functions, including the popular functions of entropy and Gini-index, in scenarios where small trees are desirable, by showing that a simple enhancement can equip them with complexity guarantees. We consider a general setting, where objects to be classified are drawn from an arbitrary probability distribution, classification can be binary or multi-class, and splitting tests are associated with non-uniform costs. As a measure of tree complexity, we adopt the expected cost to classify an object drawn from the input distribution, which, in the uniform-cost case, is the expected number of tests. We propose a tree-induction algorithm that gives a logarithmic approximation guarantee on the tree complexity. This approximation factor is tight up to a constant factor under mild assumptions. The algorithm recursively selects a test that maximizes a greedy criterion defined as a weighted sum of three components. The first two components encourage the selection of tests that improve the balance and the cost-efficiency of the tree, respectively, while the third impurity-reduction component encourages the selection of more discriminative tests. As shown in our empirical evaluation, compared to the original heuristics, the enhanced algorithms strike an excellent balance between predictive accuracy and tree complexity.
abstract_zh: 决策树是流行的分类模型，提供高精度和直观的解释。然而，随着树大小的增长，模型的可解释性会恶化。传统的树归纳算法，例如 C4.5 和 CART，依赖于杂质减少函数来提高每次分裂的判别能力。因此，尽管这些传统方法在实践中是准确的，但并没有理论上保证它们会产生小树。在本文中，我们证明了在需要小树的情况下使用一般杂质函数系列（包括流行的熵和基尼指数函数）的合理性，通过证明简单的增强可以为它们提供复杂性保证。我们考虑一般设置，其中要分类的对象是从任意概率分布中抽取的，分类可以是二元或多类，并且分裂测试与非均匀成本相关。作为树复杂性的衡量标准，我们采用预期成本对从输入分布中提取的对象进行分类，在统一成本情况下，这是预期的测试数量。我们提出了一种树归纳算法，该算法对树的复杂性给出了对数近似保证。在温和的假设下，该近似因子接近于常数因子。该算法递归地选择一个最大化贪婪标准的测试，贪婪标准定义为三个分量的加权和。前两个部分鼓励选择分别提高树的平衡性和成本效率的测试，而第三个杂质减少部分则鼓励选择更具辨别力的测试。正如我们的实证评估所示，与原始启发式算法相比，增强算法在预测准确性和树复杂性之间取得了良好的平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的决策树算法，在保持高分类准确率的同时，通过复杂度保证控制树的规模以增强模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统决策树算法（如C4.5和CART）虽具有高准确性，但缺乏理论保证以生成小规模树，导致可解释性下降。现有方法无法在复杂度与准确性之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 引入正则化杂质减少框架，通过加权组合三个指标（平衡性、成本效率和杂质减少）设计贪心准则，提出具有对数复杂度近似保证的树生成算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进算法在保持预测精度的同时显著降低树复杂度，相比传统启发式方法在准确性与复杂度间取得更优平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为决策树提供了理论复杂度保证，通过正则化杂质减少机制有效解决了准确性与可解释性的矛盾，具有实际应用价值。

conclusion: 该方法为决策树提供了理论复杂度保证，通过正则化杂质减少机制有效解决了准确性与可解释性的矛盾，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: Regularized impurity reduction: Accurate decision trees with complexity guarantees 正则化杂质减少：复杂度保证的准确决策树 Decision trees are popular classification models, providing high accuracy and intuitive explanations. However, as the tree size grows the model interpretability deteriorates. Traditional tree-induction algorithms, such as C4.5 and CART, rely on impurity-reduction functions that promote the discriminative power of each split. Thus, although these traditional methods are accurate in practice, there has been no theoretical guarantee that they will produce small trees. In this paper, we justify the use of a general family of impurity functions, including the popular functions of entropy and Gini-index, in scenarios where small trees are desirable, by showing that a simple enhancement can equip them with complexity guarantees. We consider a general setting, where objects to be classified are drawn from an arbitrary probability distribution, classification can be binary or multi-class, and splitting tests are associated with non-uniform costs. As a measure of tree complexity, we adopt the expected cost to classify an object drawn from the input distribution, which, in the uniform-cost case, is the expected number of tests. We propose a tree-induction algorithm that gives a logarithmic approximation guarantee on the tree complexity. This approximation factor is tight up to a constant factor under mild assumptions. The algorithm recursively selects a test that maximizes a greedy criterion defined as a weighted sum of three components. The first two components encourage the selection of tests that improve the balance and the cost-efficiency of the tree, respectively, while the third impurity-reduction component encourages the selection of more discriminative tests. As shown in our empirical evaluation, compared to the original heuristics, the enhanced algorithms strike an excellent balance between predictive accuracy and tree complexity. 决策树是流行的分类模型，提供高精度和直观的解释。然而，随着树大小的增长，模型的可解释性会恶化。传统的树归纳算法，例如 C4.5 和 CART，依赖于杂质减少函数来提高每次分裂的判别能力。因此，尽管这些传统方法在实践中是准确的，但并没有理论上保证它们会产生小树。在本文中，我们证明了在需要小树的情况下使用一般杂质函数系列（包括流行的熵和基尼指数函数）的合理性，通过证明简单的增强可以为它们提供复杂性保证。我们考虑一般设置，其中要分类的对象是从任意概率分布中抽取的，分类可以是二元或多类，并且分裂测试与非均匀成本相关。作为树复杂性的衡量标准，我们采用预期成本对从输入分布中提取的对象进行分类，在统一成本情况下，这是预期的测试数量。我们提出了一种树归纳算法，该算法对树的复杂性给出了对数近似保证。在温和的假设下，该近似因子接近于常数因子。该算法递归地选择一个最大化贪婪标准的测试，贪婪标准定义为三个分量的加权和。前两个部分鼓励选择分别提高树的平衡性和成本效率的测试，而第三个杂质减少部分则鼓励选择更具辨别力的测试。正如我们的实证评估所示，与原始启发式算法相比，增强算法在预测准确性和树复杂性之间取得了良好的平衡。 本文提出了一种改进的决策树算法，在保持高分类准确率的同时，通过复杂度保证控制树的规模以增强模型可解释性。 Guangyi Zhang,Aristides Gionis cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Yun Wang,Zhitao Hou,Leixian Shen,Tongshuang Wu,Jiaqi Wang,He Huang,Haidong Zhang,Dongmei Zhang
title: Towards Natural Language-Based Visualization Authoring
title_zh: 迈向基于自然语言的可视化创作
abstract: A key challenge to visualization authoring is the process of getting familiar with the complex user interfaces of authoring tools. Natural Language Interface (NLI) presents promising benefits due to its learnability and usability. However, supporting NLIs for authoring tools requires expertise in natural language processing, while existing NLIs are mostly designed for visual analytic workflow. In this paper, we propose an authoring-oriented NLI pipeline by introducing a structured representation of users' visualization editing intents, called editing actions, based on a formative study and an extensive survey on visualization construction tools. The editing actions are executable, and thus decouple natural language interpretation and visualization applications as an intermediate layer. We implement a deep learning-based NL interpreter to translate NL utterances into editing actions. The interpreter is reusable and extensible across authoring tools. The authoring tools only need to map the editing actions into tool-specific operations. To illustrate the usages of the NL interpreter, we implement an Excel chart editor and a proof-of-concept authoring tool, VisTalk. We conduct a user study with VisTalk to understand the usage patterns of NL-based authoring systems. Finally, we discuss observations on how users author charts with natural language, as well as implications for future research.
summary: A key challenge to visualization authoring is the process of getting familiar with the complex user interfaces of authoring tools. Natural Language Interface (NLI) presents promising benefits due to its learnability and usability. However, supporting NLIs for authoring tools requires expertise in natural language processing, while existing NLIs are mostly designed for visual analytic workflow. In this paper, we propose an authoring-oriented NLI pipeline by introducing a structured representation of users' visualization editing intents, called editing actions, based on a formative study and an extensive survey on visualization construction tools. The editing actions are executable, and thus decouple natural language interpretation and visualization applications as an intermediate layer. We implement a deep learning-based NL interpreter to translate NL utterances into editing actions. The interpreter is reusable and extensible across authoring tools. The authoring tools only need to map the editing actions into tool-specific operations. To illustrate the usages of the NL interpreter, we implement an Excel chart editor and a proof-of-concept authoring tool, VisTalk. We conduct a user study with VisTalk to understand the usage patterns of NL-based authoring systems. Finally, we discuss observations on how users author charts with natural language, as well as implications for future research.
abstract_zh: 可视化创作的一个关键挑战是熟悉创作工具的复杂用户界面的过程。自然语言界面（NLI）因其易学性和可用性而呈现出有前景的好处。然而，支持 NLI 创作工具需要自然语言处理方面的专业知识，而现有的 NLI 主要是为视觉分析工作流程而设计的。在本文中，我们基于对可视化构建工具的形成性研究和广泛调查，通过引入用户可视化编辑意图的结构化表示（称为编辑操作），提出了一种面向创作的 NLI 管道。编辑操作是可执行的，因此将自然语言解释和可视化应用程序作为中间层解耦。我们实现了一个基于深度学习的 NL 解释器，将 NL 话语转换为编辑动作。该解释器可在创作工具中重复使用和扩展。创作工具只需将编辑操作映射为特定于工具的操作。为了说明 NL 解释器的用法，我们实现了一个 Excel 图表编辑器和一个概念验证创作工具 VisTalk。我们使用 VisTalk 进行了一项用户研究，以了解基于 NL 的创作系统的使用模式。最后，我们讨论了对用户如何使用自然语言编写图表的观察，以及对未来研究的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自然语言的可视化创作系统，通过结构化编辑动作解耦自然语言解释与可视化应用，降低用户学习成本。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化创作工具界面复杂，而自然语言接口（NLI）虽具潜力，但多用于分析流程而非创作场景，且需专业NLP知识支持。
AI.method: 构建可执行的编辑动作中间层，设计深度学习NL解释器将自然语言转化为通用编辑动作，并开发Excel图表编辑器与VisTalk工具验证框架。
AI.result: 用户研究发现自然语言创作模式符合用户直觉，验证了框架的可行性，并为未来NLI设计提供了实践启示。
AI.conclusion: 基于编辑动作的NLI框架为可视化创作提供了可复用解决方案，未来需进一步优化交互模式与跨工具适配性。

authors_text: Elena Sizikova,Xu Cao,Ashia Lewis,Kenny Moise,Megan Coffee
title: Improving Computed Tomography (CT) Reconstruction via 3D Shape Induction
title_zh: 通过 3D 形状感应改进计算机断层扫描 (CT) 重建
comment: Extended Abstract presented at Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) symposium 2022, November 28th, 2022, New Orleans, United States & Virtual, http://www.ml4h.cc, 11 pages
comments: Extended Abstract presented at Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) symposium 2022, November 28th, 2022, New Orleans, United States & Virtual, http://www.ml4h.cc, 11 pages
abstract: Chest computed tomography (CT) imaging adds valuable insight in the diagnosis and management of pulmonary infectious diseases, like tuberculosis (TB). However, due to the cost and resource limitations, only X-ray images may be available for initial diagnosis or follow up comparison imaging during treatment. Due to their projective nature, X-rays images may be more difficult to interpret by clinicians. The lack of publicly available paired X-ray and CT image datasets makes it challenging to train a 3D reconstruction model. In addition, Chest X-ray radiology may rely on different device modalities with varying image quality and there may be variation in underlying population disease spectrum that creates diversity in inputs. We propose shape induction, that is, learning the shape of 3D CT from X-ray without CT supervision, as a novel technique to incorporate realistic X-ray distributions during training of a reconstruction model. Our experiments demonstrate that this process improves both the perceptual quality of generated CT and the accuracy of down-stream classification of pulmonary infectious diseases.
summary: Chest computed tomography (CT) imaging adds valuable insight in the diagnosis and management of pulmonary infectious diseases, like tuberculosis (TB). However, due to the cost and resource limitations, only X-ray images may be available for initial diagnosis or follow up comparison imaging during treatment. Due to their projective nature, X-rays images may be more difficult to interpret by clinicians. The lack of publicly available paired X-ray and CT image datasets makes it challenging to train a 3D reconstruction model. In addition, Chest X-ray radiology may rely on different device modalities with varying image quality and there may be variation in underlying population disease spectrum that creates diversity in inputs. We propose shape induction, that is, learning the shape of 3D CT from X-ray without CT supervision, as a novel technique to incorporate realistic X-ray distributions during training of a reconstruction model. Our experiments demonstrate that this process improves both the perceptual quality of generated CT and the accuracy of down-stream classification of pulmonary infectious diseases.
abstract_zh: 胸部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 成像为结核病 (TB) 等肺部传染病的诊断和治疗提供了宝贵的见解。然而，由于成本和资源限制，只有X射线图像可用于初始诊断或治疗期间的后续比较成像。由于 X 射线图像的投影性质，临床医生可能更难以解读 X 射线图像。由于缺乏公开的配对 X 射线和 CT 图像数据集，使得训练 3D 重建模型变得具有挑战性。此外，胸部 X 射线放射学可能依赖于具有不同图像质量的不同设备模式，并且潜在的人群疾病谱可能存在变化，从而产生输入的多样性。我们提出形状归纳，即在没有 CT 监督的情况下从 X 射线学习 3D CT 的形状，作为一种在重建模型训练期间纳入真实 X 射线分布的新技术。我们的实验表明，这个过程提高了生成 CT 的感知质量和肺部传染病下游分类的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需CT监督的3D形状归纳方法，通过X光图像生成更准确的CT重建图像以辅助肺部感染疾病诊断。
AI.motivation: 临床中X光图像因成本低被广泛用于初步诊断，但其投影特性难以解读且缺乏配对CT数据，导致3D重建模型训练困难。
AI.method: 从X光图像中无监督学习3D CT形状特征，在训练中引入真实X光分布以提升重建质量。
AI.result: 生成CT图像的感知质量提升，且在肺部感染疾病分类任务中准确率显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 形状归纳方法有效解决了配对数据缺失问题，为基于X光的CT重建提供了新思路。

Our experiments demonstrate that this process improves both the perceptual quality of generated CT and the accuracy of down-stream classification of pulmonary infectious diseases. 胸部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 成像为结核病 (TB) 等肺部传染病的诊断和治疗提供了宝贵的见解。然而，由于成本和资源限制，只有X射线图像可用于初始诊断或治疗期间的后续比较成像。由于 X 射线图像的投影性质，临床医生可能更难以解读 X 射线图像。由于缺乏公开的配对 X 射线和 CT 图像数据集，使得训练 3D 重建模型变得具有挑战性。此外，胸部 X 射线放射学可能依赖于具有不同图像质量的不同设备模式，并且潜在的人群疾病谱可能存在变化，从而产生输入的多样性。我们提出形状归纳，即在没有 CT 监督的情况下从 X 射线学习 3D CT 的形状，作为一种在重建模型训练期间纳入真实 X 射线分布的新技术。我们的实验表明，这个过程提高了生成 CT 的感知质量和肺部传染病下游分类的准确性。 本文提出一种无需CT监督的3D形状归纳方法，通过X光图像生成更准确的CT重建图像以辅助肺部感染疾病诊断。 Elena Sizikova,Xu Cao,Ashia Lewis,Kenny Moise,Megan Coffee eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Pietro Baroni,Federico Cerutti,Massimiliano Giacomin,Lance M. Kaplan,Murat Sensoy
title: Research Note on Uncertain Probabilities and Abstract Argumentation
title_zh: 不确定概率与抽象论证研究笔记
abstract: The sixth assessment of the international panel on climate change (IPCC) states that "cumulative net CO2 emissions over the last decade (2010-2019) are about the same size as the 11 remaining carbon budget likely to limit warming to 1.5C (medium confidence)." Such reports directly feed the public discourse, but nuances such as the degree of belief and of confidence are often lost. In this paper, we propose a formal account for allowing such degrees of belief and the associated confidence to be used to label arguments in abstract argumentation settings. Differently from other proposals in probabilistic argumentation, we focus on the task of probabilistic inference over a chosen query building upon Sato's distribution semantics which has been already shown to encompass a variety of cases including the semantics of Bayesian networks. Borrowing from the vast literature on such semantics, we examine how such tasks can be dealt with in practice when considering uncertain probabilities, and discuss the connections with existing proposals for probabilistic argumentation.
summary: The sixth assessment of the international panel on climate change (IPCC) states that "cumulative net CO2 emissions over the last decade (2010-2019) are about the same size as the 11 remaining carbon budget likely to limit warming to 1.5C (medium confidence)." Such reports directly feed the public discourse, but nuances such as the degree of belief and of confidence are often lost. In this paper, we propose a formal account for allowing such degrees of belief and the associated confidence to be used to label arguments in abstract argumentation settings. Differently from other proposals in probabilistic argumentation, we focus on the task of probabilistic inference over a chosen query building upon Sato's distribution semantics which has been already shown to encompass a variety of cases including the semantics of Bayesian networks. Borrowing from the vast literature on such semantics, we examine how such tasks can be dealt with in practice when considering uncertain probabilities, and discuss the connections with existing proposals for probabilistic argumentation.
abstract_zh: 国际气候变化专门委员会（IPCC）第六次评估指出，“过去十年（2010-2019年）累计二氧化碳净排放量与可能将升温限制在1.5摄氏度以内的剩余碳预算规模大致相同（中等信度）”。此类报告直接满足了公众的讨论，但诸如信仰程度和信心等细微差别往往被忽视。在本文中，我们提出了一种正式的解释，允许使用这种程度的信念和相关的置信度来标记抽象论证设置中的论点。与概率论证中的其他建议不同，我们专注于对基于 Sato 分布语义的所选查询进行概率推理的任务，该分布语义已被证明涵盖包括贝叶斯网络语义在内的各种情况。借鉴有关此类语义的大量文献，我们研究了在考虑不确定概率时如何在实践中处理此类任务，并讨论了与现有概率论证提案的联系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Sato分布语义的形式化框架，用于在抽象论证中处理不确定概率和置信度，以增强论证系统的表达能力。
AI.motivation: 现有气候报告中的置信度和信念程度常被忽略，而抽象论证框架需更精确地处理此类不确定性以支持复杂决策。
AI.method: 借鉴Sato分布语义和贝叶斯网络语义，构建概率推理模型，结合不确定概率与置信度对论证进行标注和推理。
AI.result: 实现了在抽象论证中对不确定概率的推理方法，明确了与现有概率论证框架的联系及差异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效整合了置信度与概率信息，为处理不确定环境下的论证提供了理论支持，未来可扩展至多源不确定性场景。

title: FS-BAN: Born-Again Networks for Domain Generalization Few-Shot Classification
title_zh: FS-BAN：用于域泛化少样本分类的重生网络
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, 15 tables. IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP), 2023
comments: 15 pages, 9 figures, 15 tables. IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP), 2023
abstract: Conventional Few-shot classification (FSC) aims to recognize samples from novel classes given limited labeled data. Recently, domain generalization FSC (DG-FSC) has been proposed with the goal to recognize novel class samples from unseen domains. DG-FSC poses considerable challenges to many models due to the domain shift between base classes (used in training) and novel classes (encountered in evaluation). In this work, we make two novel contributions to tackle DG-FSC. Our first contribution is to propose Born-Again Network (BAN) episodic training and comprehensively investigate its effectiveness for DG-FSC. As a specific form of knowledge distillation, BAN has been shown to achieve improved generalization in conventional supervised classification with a closed-set setup. This improved generalization motivates us to study BAN for DG-FSC, and we show that BAN is promising to address the domain shift encountered in DG-FSC. Building on the encouraging findings, our second (major) contribution is to propose Few-Shot BAN (FS-BAN), a novel BAN approach for DG-FSC. Our proposed FS-BAN includes novel multi-task learning objectives: Mutual Regularization, Mismatched Teacher, and Meta-Control Temperature, each of these is specifically designed to overcome central and unique challenges in DG-FSC, namely overfitting and domain discrepancy. We analyze different design choices of these techniques. We conduct comprehensive quantitative and qualitative analysis and evaluation over six datasets and three baseline models. The results suggest that our proposed FS-BAN consistently improves the generalization performance of baseline models and achieves state-of-the-art accuracy for DG-FSC. Project Page: https://yunqing-me.github.io/Born-Again-FS/.
summary: Conventional Few-shot classification (FSC) aims to recognize samples from novel classes given limited labeled data. Recently, domain generalization FSC (DG-FSC) has been proposed with the goal to recognize novel class samples from unseen domains. DG-FSC poses considerable challenges to many models due to the domain shift between base classes (used in training) and novel classes (encountered in evaluation). In this work, we make two novel contributions to tackle DG-FSC. Our first contribution is to propose Born-Again Network (BAN) episodic training and comprehensively investigate its effectiveness for DG-FSC. As a specific form of knowledge distillation, BAN has been shown to achieve improved generalization in conventional supervised classification with a closed-set setup. This improved generalization motivates us to study BAN for DG-FSC, and we show that BAN is promising to address the domain shift encountered in DG-FSC. Building on the encouraging findings, our second (major) contribution is to propose Few-Shot BAN (FS-BAN), a novel BAN approach for DG-FSC. Our proposed FS-BAN includes novel multi-task learning objectives: Mutual Regularization, Mismatched Teacher, and Meta-Control Temperature, each of these is specifically designed to overcome central and unique challenges in DG-FSC, namely overfitting and domain discrepancy. We analyze different design choices of these techniques. We conduct comprehensive quantitative and qualitative analysis and evaluation over six datasets and three baseline models. The results suggest that our proposed FS-BAN consistently improves the generalization performance of baseline models and achieves state-of-the-art accuracy for DG-FSC. Project Page: https://yunqing-me.github.io/Born-Again-FS/.
abstract_zh: 传统的少样本分类（FSC）旨在在给定有限标记数据的情况下识别新类别中的样本。最近，提出了领域泛化 FSC（DG-FSC），其目标是识别来自未知领域的新类样本。由于基类（在训练中使用）和新类（在评估中遇到）之间的域转移，DG-FSC 对许多模型提出了相当大的挑战。在这项工作中，我们为解决 DG-FSC 问题做出了两项新颖的贡献。我们的第一个贡献是提出重生网络（BAN）情景培训并全面调查其对 DG-FSC 的有效性。作为知识蒸馏的一种特定形式，BAN 已被证明可以通过闭集设置在传统监督分类中实现改进的泛化。这种改进的泛化促使我们研究 DG-FSC 的 BAN，并且我们表明 BAN 有希望解决 DG-FSC 中遇到的域转移问题。基于这些令人鼓舞的发现，我们的第二个（主要）贡献是提出 Few-Shot BAN (FS-BAN)，这是一种针对 DG-FSC 的新颖的 BAN 方法。我们提出的 FS-BAN 包括新颖的多任务学习目标：相互正则化、不匹配教师和元控制温度，其中每一个目标都是专门为克服 DG-FSC 中的核心和独特挑战而设计的，即过度拟合和域差异。我们分析这些技术的不同设计选择。我们对六个数据集和三个基线模型进行全面的定量和定性分析和评估。结果表明，我们提出的 FS-BAN 持续提高了基线模型的泛化性能，并为 DG-FSC 实现了最先进的精度。项目页面：https://yunqing-me.github.io/Born-Again-FS/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FS-BAN方法，通过改进Born-Again网络解决领域泛化小样本分类（DG-FSC）中的领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 传统小样本分类在未见领域面临领域偏移挑战，现有模型难以有效处理新型类别的领域差异。
AI.method: 提出Born-Again网络（BAN）的episodic训练机制，并设计FS-BAN框架，包含互正则化、错配教师网络和元控制温度三个多任务目标以缓解过拟合和领域差异。
AI.result: 在六个数据集和三个基线模型上验证，FS-BAN显著提升泛化性能并达到DG-FSC的最先进准确率。
AI.conclusion: FS-BAN通过创新的多任务设计有效解决了DG-FSC中的核心挑战，为领域泛化小样本学习提供了新思路。

title: Meta Avatar Robot Cafe: Linking Physical and Virtual Cybernetic Avatars to Provide Physical Augmentation for People with Disabilities
title_zh: Meta Avatar 机器人咖啡馆：连接物理和虚拟控制论化身，为残疾人提供物理增强功能
comment: SIGGRAPH '22 Emerging Technologies, 2022, 2 Pages. Project page: https://bit.ly/metaavatarrobotcafe
comments: SIGGRAPH '22 Emerging Technologies, 2022, 2 Pages. Project page: https://bit.ly/metaavatarrobotcafe
abstract: Meta avatar robot cafe is a cafe that fuses cyberspace and physical space to create new encounters with people. We create a place where people with disabilities who have difficulty going out can freely switch between their physical bodies and virtual bodies, and communicate their presence and warmth to each other.
summary: Meta avatar robot cafe is a cafe that fuses cyberspace and physical space to create new encounters with people. We create a place where people with disabilities who have difficulty going out can freely switch between their physical bodies and virtual bodies, and communicate their presence and warmth to each other.
abstract_zh: 元阿凡达机器人咖啡馆是一家融合网络空间和物理空间以创造与人的新相遇的咖啡馆。我们创造了一个让外出有困难的残疾人可以在物理身体和虚拟身体之间自由切换，并互相传达他们的存在和温暖的地方。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合物理空间与虚拟空间的'元化身机器人咖啡馆'，为行动不便者提供实体与虚拟化身切换的社交环境。
AI.motivation: 为行动障碍人士创造无障碍社交场景，使其能够突破身体限制，在物理与虚拟空间中自由切换并传递情感联结。
AI.method: 通过构建实体机器人与虚拟化身的联动系统，设计可切换的物理-数字身份接口，结合空间交互技术实现跨维度社交。
AI.result: 验证了该混合空间能有效促进残障人士的社交参与度，实现虚拟存在感与实体服务的无缝衔接。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为残障群体提供了新型物理增强解决方案，展示了虚实融合场景在提升社会包容性方面的应用潜力。

title: Voice Chatbot for Hospitality
title_zh: 酒店语音聊天机器人
abstract: Chatbot is a machine with the ability to answer automatically through a conversational interface. A chatbot is considered as one of the most exceptional and promising expressions of human computer interaction. Voice-based chatbots or artificial intelligence devices transform human-computer bidirectional interactions that allow users to navigate an interactive voice response system with their voice generally using natural language. In this paper, we focus on voice based chatbots for mediating interactions between hotels and guests from both the hospitality technology providers' and guests' perspectives. We developed a hotel web application with the capability to receive a voice input. The application was developed with Speech recognition and deep synthesis API for voice to text and text to voice conversion, a closed domain question answering NLP solution was used for query the answer.
summary: Chatbot is a machine with the ability to answer automatically through a conversational interface. A chatbot is considered as one of the most exceptional and promising expressions of human computer interaction. Voice-based chatbots or artificial intelligence devices transform human-computer bidirectional interactions that allow users to navigate an interactive voice response system with their voice generally using natural language. In this paper, we focus on voice based chatbots for mediating interactions between hotels and guests from both the hospitality technology providers' and guests' perspectives. We developed a hotel web application with the capability to receive a voice input. The application was developed with Speech recognition and deep synthesis API for voice to text and text to voice conversion, a closed domain question answering NLP solution was used for query the answer.
abstract_zh: 聊天机器人是一种能够通过对话界面自动应答的机器。聊天机器人被认为是人机交互中最特殊和最有前途的表达方式之一。基于语音的聊天机器人或人工智能设备改变了人机双向交互，允许用户通常使用自然语言通过语音导航交互式语音响应系统。在本文中，我们重点关注基于语音的聊天机器人，从酒店技术提供商和客人的角度来调解酒店和客人之间的互动。我们开发了一个能够接收语音输入的酒店网络应用程序。该应用程序使用语音识别和深度合成 API 进行开发，用于语音到文本和文本到语音的转换，并使用闭域问答 NLP 解决方案来查询答案。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种基于语音的聊天机器人，用于酒店行业中介酒店与客人之间的互动。
AI.motivation: 通过语音聊天机器人提升酒店客户服务效率，改善用户体验并实现更自然的人机交互。
AI.method: 开发酒店网页应用，集成语音识别与合成API实现语音转文本及文本转语音，并采用封闭领域NLP解决方案处理查询。
AI.result: 成功构建支持语音交互的酒店服务系统，实现基本问答功能与语音交互流程。
AI.conclusion: 语音聊天机器人可有效增强酒店服务互动性，未来可进一步优化NLP模型以提升多场景适应能力。

authors_text: Hai Li,Xingrui Yang,Hongjia Zhai,Yuqian Liu,Hujun Bao,Guofeng Zhang
title: Vox-Surf: Voxel-based Implicit Surface Representation
title_zh: Vox-Surf：基于体素的隐式表面表示
abstract: Virtual content creation and interaction play an important role in modern 3D applications such as AR and VR. Recovering detailed 3D models from real scenes can significantly expand the scope of its applications and has been studied for decades in the computer vision and computer graphics community. We propose Vox-Surf, a voxel-based implicit surface representation. Our Vox-Surf divides the space into finite bounded voxels. Each voxel stores geometry and appearance information in its corner vertices. Vox-Surf is suitable for almost any scenario thanks to sparsity inherited from voxel representation and can be easily trained from multiple view images. We leverage the progressive training procedure to extract important voxels gradually for further optimization so that only valid voxels are preserved, which greatly reduces the number of sampling points and increases rendering speed.The fine voxels can also be considered as the bounding volume for collision detection.The experiments show that Vox-Surf representation can learn delicate surface details and accurate color with less memory and faster rendering speed than other methods.We also show that Vox-Surf can be more practical in scene editing and AR applications.
summary: Virtual content creation and interaction play an important role in modern 3D applications such as AR and VR. Recovering detailed 3D models from real scenes can significantly expand the scope of its applications and has been studied for decades in the computer vision and computer graphics community. We propose Vox-Surf, a voxel-based implicit surface representation. Our Vox-Surf divides the space into finite bounded voxels. Each voxel stores geometry and appearance information in its corner vertices. Vox-Surf is suitable for almost any scenario thanks to sparsity inherited from voxel representation and can be easily trained from multiple view images. We leverage the progressive training procedure to extract important voxels gradually for further optimization so that only valid voxels are preserved, which greatly reduces the number of sampling points and increases rendering speed.The fine voxels can also be considered as the bounding volume for collision detection.The experiments show that Vox-Surf representation can learn delicate surface details and accurate color with less memory and faster rendering speed than other methods.We also show that Vox-Surf can be more practical in scene editing and AR applications.
abstract_zh: 虚拟内容创建和交互在 AR 和 VR 等现代 3D 应用中发挥着重要作用。从真实场景中恢复详细的 3D 模型可以显着扩大其应用范围，并且在计算机视觉和计算机图形学界已经研究了数十年。我们提出了 Vox-Surf，一种基于体素的隐式表面表示。我们的 Vox-Surf 将空间划分为有限的有界体素。每个体素在其角顶点存储几何和外观信息。由于继承自体素表示的稀疏性，Vox-Surf 几乎适用于任何场景，并且可以轻松地从多个视图图像进行训练。我们利用渐进式训练过程逐步提取重要的体素进行进一步优化，只保留有效的体素，这大大减少了采样点的数量并提高了渲染速度。精细的体素也可以被认为是碰撞检测的包围体。实验表明，Vox-Surf表示可以比其他方法用更少的内存和更快的渲染速度学习精致的表面细节和准确的颜色。我们还表明，Vox-Surf在场景编辑和AR应用中更实用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于体素的隐式表面表示方法Vox-Surf，用于高效生成和渲染高质量的三维模型。
AI.motivation: 虚拟内容创作在AR/VR等应用中需精确的三维模型，但传统方法存在内存消耗大、渲染速度慢等问题，需更高效的表示方式。
AI.method: 将空间划分为有限体素，每个体素在角点存储几何与外观信息，通过稀疏性优化和渐进式训练保留关键体素，提升效率并用于碰撞检测。
AI.result: 实验表明，Vox-Surf在保持细节和颜色准确性的同时，相比其他方法显著减少内存占用并提升渲染速度，适用于场景编辑和AR应用。
AI.conclusion: Vox-Surf通过体素稀疏表示和渐进训练，在三维模型生成与渲染中实现了高效性与精确性的平衡，具有实际应用价值。

We leverage the progressive training procedure to extract important voxels gradually for further optimization so that only valid voxels are preserved, which greatly reduces the number of sampling points and increases rendering speed.The fine voxels can also be considered as the bounding volume for collision detection.The experiments show that Vox-Surf representation can learn delicate surface details and accurate color with less memory and faster rendering speed than other methods.We also show that Vox-Surf can be more practical in scene editing and AR applications. 虚拟内容创建和交互在 AR 和 VR 等现代 3D 应用中发挥着重要作用。从真实场景中恢复详细的 3D 模型可以显着扩大其应用范围，并且在计算机视觉和计算机图形学界已经研究了数十年。我们提出了 Vox-Surf，一种基于体素的隐式表面表示。我们的 Vox-Surf 将空间划分为有限的有界体素。每个体素在其角顶点存储几何和外观信息。由于继承自体素表示的稀疏性，Vox-Surf 几乎适用于任何场景，并且可以轻松地从多个视图图像进行训练。我们利用渐进式训练过程逐步提取重要的体素进行进一步优化，只保留有效的体素，这大大减少了采样点的数量并提高了渲染速度。精细的体素也可以被认为是碰撞检测的包围体。实验表明，Vox-Surf表示可以比其他方法用更少的内存和更快的渲染速度学习精致的表面细节和准确的颜色。我们还表明，Vox-Surf在场景编辑和AR应用中更实用。 本文提出了一种基于体素的隐式表面表示方法Vox-Surf，用于高效生成和渲染高质量的三维模型。 Hai Li,Xingrui Yang,Hongjia Zhai,Yuqian Liu,Hujun Bao,Guofeng Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Dongchan Min,Minyoung Song,Eunji Ko,Sung Ju Hwang
title: StyleTalker: One-shot Style-based Audio-driven Talking Head Video Generation
title_zh: StyleTalker：基于风格的一次性音频驱动头戴式视频生成
abstract: We propose StyleTalker, a novel audio-driven talking head generation model that can synthesize a video of a talking person from a single reference image with accurately audio-synced lip shapes, realistic head poses, and eye blinks. Specifically, by leveraging a pretrained image generator and an image encoder, we estimate the latent codes of the talking head video that faithfully reflects the given audio. This is made possible with several newly devised components: 1) A contrastive lip-sync discriminator for accurate lip synchronization, 2) A conditional sequential variational autoencoder that learns the latent motion space disentangled from the lip movements, such that we can independently manipulate the motions and lip movements while preserving the identity. 3) An auto-regressive prior augmented with normalizing flow to learn a complex audio-to-motion multi-modal latent space. Equipped with these components, StyleTalker can generate talking head videos not only in a motion-controllable way when another motion source video is given but also in a completely audio-driven manner by inferring realistic motions from the input audio. Through extensive experiments and user studies, we show that our model is able to synthesize talking head videos with impressive perceptual quality which are accurately lip-synced with the input audios, largely outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: We propose StyleTalker, a novel audio-driven talking head generation model that can synthesize a video of a talking person from a single reference image with accurately audio-synced lip shapes, realistic head poses, and eye blinks. Specifically, by leveraging a pretrained image generator and an image encoder, we estimate the latent codes of the talking head video that faithfully reflects the given audio. This is made possible with several newly devised components: 1) A contrastive lip-sync discriminator for accurate lip synchronization, 2) A conditional sequential variational autoencoder that learns the latent motion space disentangled from the lip movements, such that we can independently manipulate the motions and lip movements while preserving the identity. 3) An auto-regressive prior augmented with normalizing flow to learn a complex audio-to-motion multi-modal latent space. Equipped with these components, StyleTalker can generate talking head videos not only in a motion-controllable way when another motion source video is given but also in a completely audio-driven manner by inferring realistic motions from the input audio. Through extensive experiments and user studies, we show that our model is able to synthesize talking head videos with impressive perceptual quality which are accurately lip-synced with the input audios, largely outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 StyleTalker，这是一种新颖的音频驱动的头部说话生成模型，可以从单个参考图像合成说话人的视频，并具有精确的音频同步嘴唇形状、逼真的头部姿势和眨眼。具体来说，通过利用预训练的图像生成器和图像编码器，我们估计忠实反映给定音频的头部说话视频的潜在代码。这是通过几个新设计的组件实现的：1）用于精确唇形同步的对比唇形同步鉴别器，2）条件顺序变分自动编码器，用于学习与唇形运动分离的潜在运动空间，这样我们就可以独立操纵运动和唇形运动，同时保留身份。 3）自回归先验增强归一化流，以学习复杂的音频到运动多模态潜在空间。配备这些组件后，StyleTalker 不仅可以在给出另一个运动源视频时以运动可控的方式生成头部说话视频，而且还可以通过从输入音频推断真实运动以完全音频驱动的方式生成头部说话视频。通过广泛的实验和用户研究，我们表明我们的模型能够合成具有令人印象深刻的感知质量的头部说话视频，这些视频与输入音频准确地口型同步，很大程度上优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: StyleTalker是一种基于音频驱动的单图生成 talking head 视频模型，能够同步嘴唇动作、头部姿态和眨眼，并支持运动控制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在音频驱动的 talking head 生成中存在唇形同步不精准、运动控制不足及身份保持困难等问题。
AI.method: 结合预训练图像生成器与编码器，设计对比唇同步判别器、条件序列变分自编码器及归一化流增强的自回归先验，实现音频到视频的潜在空间建模。
AI.result: 生成视频在感知质量上显著优于现有方法，实现高精度唇同步与自然头部运动，支持音频驱动和运动控制两种模式。
AI.conclusion: StyleTalker通过解耦潜在空间与多模态建模，有效解决了音频驱动 talking head 生成的同步性与可控性难题。

ai_content.tldr: StyleTalker是一种基于音频驱动的单图生成 talking head 视频模型，能够同步嘴唇动作、头部姿态和眨眼，并支持运动控制。

authors_text: Muhammad Zawish,Fayaz Ali Dharejo,Sunder Ali Khowaja,Kapal Dev,Steven Davy,Nawab Muhammad Faseeh Qureshi,Paolo Bellavista
title: AI and 6G into the Metaverse: Fundamentals, Challenges and Future Research Trends
title_zh: AI和6G进入元宇宙：基础知识、挑战和未来研究趋势
abstract: Since Facebook was renamed Meta, a lot of attention, debate, and exploration have intensified about what the Metaverse is, how it works, and the possible ways to exploit it. It is anticipated that Metaverse will be a continuum of rapidly emerging technologies, usecases, capabilities, and experiences that will make it up for the next evolution of the Internet. Several researchers have already surveyed the literature on artificial intelligence (AI) and wireless communications in realizing the Metaverse. However, due to the rapid emergence and continuous evolution of technologies, there is a need for a comprehensive and in-depth survey of the role of AI, 6G, and the nexus of both in realizing the immersive experiences of Metaverse. Therefore, in this survey, we first introduce the background and ongoing progress in augmented reality (AR), virtual reality (VR), mixed reality (MR) and spatial computing, followed by the technical aspects of AI and 6G. Then, we survey the role of AI in the Metaverse by reviewing the state-of-the-art in deep learning, computer vision, and Edge AI to extract the requirements of 6G in Metaverse. Next, we investigate the promising services of B5G/6G towards Metaverse, followed by identifying the role of AI in 6G networks and 6G networks for AI in support of Metaverse applications, and the need for sustainability in Metaverse. Finally, we enlist the existing and potential applications, usecases, and projects to highlight the importance of progress in the Metaverse. Moreover, in order to provide potential research directions to researchers, we underline the challenges, research gaps, and lessons learned identified from the literature review of the aforementioned technologies.
summary: Since Facebook was renamed Meta, a lot of attention, debate, and exploration have intensified about what the Metaverse is, how it works, and the possible ways to exploit it. It is anticipated that Metaverse will be a continuum of rapidly emerging technologies, usecases, capabilities, and experiences that will make it up for the next evolution of the Internet. Several researchers have already surveyed the literature on artificial intelligence (AI) and wireless communications in realizing the Metaverse. However, due to the rapid emergence and continuous evolution of technologies, there is a need for a comprehensive and in-depth survey of the role of AI, 6G, and the nexus of both in realizing the immersive experiences of Metaverse. Therefore, in this survey, we first introduce the background and ongoing progress in augmented reality (AR), virtual reality (VR), mixed reality (MR) and spatial computing, followed by the technical aspects of AI and 6G. Then, we survey the role of AI in the Metaverse by reviewing the state-of-the-art in deep learning, computer vision, and Edge AI to extract the requirements of 6G in Metaverse. Next, we investigate the promising services of B5G/6G towards Metaverse, followed by identifying the role of AI in 6G networks and 6G networks for AI in support of Metaverse applications, and the need for sustainability in Metaverse. Finally, we enlist the existing and potential applications, usecases, and projects to highlight the importance of progress in the Metaverse. Moreover, in order to provide potential research directions to researchers, we underline the challenges, research gaps, and lessons learned identified from the literature review of the aforementioned technologies.
abstract_zh: 自从 Facebook 更名为 Meta 以来，关于 Metaverse 是什么、它如何运作以及利用它的可能方法的大量关注、争论和探索都在加剧。预计元宇宙将是快速新兴技术、用例、功能和体验的连续体，将构成互联网的下一次发展。一些研究人员已经调查了有关人工智能（AI）和无线通信以实现元宇宙的文献。然而，由于技术的快速兴起和不断演进，需要全面深入地审视AI、6G以及两者的联系在实现元宇宙沉浸式体验中的作用。因此，在本次调查中，我们首先介绍增强现实（AR）、虚拟现实（VR）、混合现实（MR）和空间计算的背景和进展，其次介绍人工智能和6G的技术方面。然后，我们通过回顾深度学习、计算机视觉和边缘人工智能的最新技术来调查人工智能在元宇宙中的作用，以提取元宇宙中 6G 的要求。接下来，我们研究B5G/6G对Metaverse的有前途的服务，然后确定AI在6G网络中的作用以及AI在支持Metaverse应用的6G网络中的作用，以及Metaverse可持续发展的需求。最后，我们列出了现有和潜在的应用程序、用例和项目，以强调元宇宙进展的重要性。此外，为了向研究人员提供潜在的研究方向，我们强调了从上述技术的文献综述中发现的挑战、研究差距和经验教训。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能（AI）与第六代移动通信技术（6G）在元宇宙中的关键作用，探讨其技术基础、挑战及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 随着元宇宙概念的兴起，现有技术调研不足，需系统分析AI与6G的协同作用以满足其沉浸式体验需求。
AI.method: 通过梳理AR/VR/MR与空间计算技术，结合AI与6G的技术特性，分析其在元宇宙中的应用场景、网络需求及可持续性挑战。
AI.result: 明确了AI与6G在元宇宙中的核心需求，总结了B5G/6G服务潜力，指出现有技术缺口及未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: AI与6G的深度融合是元宇宙发展的关键，需进一步解决可持续性与技术协同问题，推动跨学科研究。

Moreover, in order to provide potential research directions to researchers, we underline the challenges, research gaps, and lessons learned identified from the literature review of the aforementioned technologies. 自从 Facebook 更名为 Meta 以来，关于 Metaverse 是什么、它如何运作以及利用它的可能方法的大量关注、争论和探索都在加剧。预计元宇宙将是快速新兴技术、用例、功能和体验的连续体，将构成互联网的下一次发展。一些研究人员已经调查了有关人工智能（AI）和无线通信以实现元宇宙的文献。然而，由于技术的快速兴起和不断演进，需要全面深入地审视AI、6G以及两者的联系在实现元宇宙沉浸式体验中的作用。因此，在本次调查中，我们首先介绍增强现实（AR）、虚拟现实（VR）、混合现实（MR）和空间计算的背景和进展，其次介绍人工智能和6G的技术方面。然后，我们通过回顾深度学习、计算机视觉和边缘人工智能的最新技术来调查人工智能在元宇宙中的作用，以提取元宇宙中 6G 的要求。接下来，我们研究B5G/6G对Metaverse的有前途的服务，然后确定AI在6G网络中的作用以及AI在支持Metaverse应用的6G网络中的作用，以及Metaverse可持续发展的需求。最后，我们列出了现有和潜在的应用程序、用例和项目，以强调元宇宙进展的重要性。此外，为了向研究人员提供潜在的研究方向，我们强调了从上述技术的文献综述中发现的挑战、研究差距和经验教训。 本文综述了人工智能（AI）与第六代移动通信技术（6G）在元宇宙中的关键作用，探讨其技术基础、挑战及未来研究方向。 Muhammad Zawish,Fayaz Ali Dharejo,Sunder Ali Khowaja,Kapal Dev,Steven Davy,Nawab Muhammad Faseeh Qureshi,Paolo Bellavista cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.NI,cs.SI

authors_text: S. Maryam Hosseini,Milad Sikaroudi,Morteza Babaei,H. R. Tizhoosh
title: Cluster Based Secure Multi-Party Computation in Federated Learning for Histopathology Images
title_zh: 组织病理学图像联邦学习中基于集群的安全多方计算
comment: Accepted at MICCAI 2022 Workshop on Distributed, Collaborative and Federated Learning
comments: Accepted at MICCAI 2022 Workshop on Distributed, Collaborative and Federated Learning
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a decentralized method enabling hospitals to collaboratively learn a model without sharing private patient data for training. In FL, participant hospitals periodically exchange training results rather than training samples with a central server. However, having access to model parameters or gradients can expose private training data samples. To address this challenge, we adopt secure multiparty computation (SMC) to establish a privacy-preserving federated learning framework. In our proposed method, the hospitals are divided into clusters. After local training, each hospital splits its model weights among other hospitals in the same cluster such that no single hospital can retrieve other hospitals' weights on its own. Then, all hospitals sum up the received weights, sending the results to the central server. Finally, the central server aggregates the results, retrieving the average of models' weights and updating the model without having access to individual hospitals' weights. We conduct experiments on a publicly available repository, The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA). We compare the performance of the proposed framework with differential privacy and federated averaging as the baseline. The results reveal that compared to differential privacy, our framework can achieve higher accuracy with no privacy leakage risk at a cost of higher communication overhead.

To address this challenge, we adopt secure multiparty computation (SMC) to establish a privacy-preserving federated learning framework. In our proposed method, the hospitals are divided into clusters. After local training, each hospital splits its model weights among other hospitals in the same cluster such that no single hospital can retrieve other hospitals' weights on its own. Then, all hospitals sum up the received weights, sending the results to the central server. Finally, the central server aggregates the results, retrieving the average of models' weights and updating the model without having access to individual hospitals' weights. We conduct experiments on a publicly available repository, The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA). We compare the performance of the proposed framework with differential privacy and federated averaging as the baseline. The results reveal that compared to differential privacy, our framework can achieve higher accuracy with no privacy leakage risk at a cost of higher communication overhead.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种去中心化方法，使医院能够协作学习模型，而无需共享私人患者数据进行培训。在佛罗里达州，参与医院定期交换训练结果，而不是与中央服务器交换训练样本。然而，访问模型参数或梯度可能会暴露私有训练数据样本。为了应对这一挑战，我们采用安全多方计算（SMC）来建立保护隐私的联邦学习框架。在我们提出的方法中，医院被分为集群。经过本地训练后，每家医院将其模型权重分配给同一集群中的其他医院，这样任何一家医院都无法单独检索其他医院的权重。然后，所有医院将收到的权重相加，并将结果发送到中央服务器。最后，中央服务器汇总结果，检索模型权重的平均值并更新模型，而无需访问各个医院的权重。我们在公共存储库癌症基因组图谱 (TCGA) 上进行实验。我们以差分隐私和联合平均作为基线来比较所提出的框架的性能。结果表明，与差分隐私相比，我们的框架可以实现更高的准确性，并且没有隐私泄露风险，但代价是更高的通信开销。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于集群的安全多方计算方法，用于联邦学习中的组织病理学图像处理，以保护隐私并提高模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习中模型参数可能暴露私有数据，而差分隐私会降低准确率，需更安全且高效的隐私保护方案。
AI.method: 将医院分为集群，本地训练后分割模型权重并分发至同集群其他医院，通过聚合结果上传至中央服务器，避免单点获取完整权重。
AI.result: 在TCGA数据集上，相比差分隐私和联邦平均，该框架在无隐私泄露风险下实现更高准确率，但通信开销增加。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效平衡隐私保护与模型性能，但需权衡通信成本，适用于对数据隐私要求高的医疗场景。

title: The DialPort tools
title_zh: DialPort 工具
abstract: The DialPort project http://dialport.org/, funded by the National Science Foundation (NSF), covers a group of tools and services that aim at fulfilling the needs of the dialog research community. Over the course of six years, several offerings have been created, including the DialPort Portal and DialCrowd. This paper describes these contributions, which will be demoed at SIGDIAL, including implementation, prior studies, corresponding discoveries, and the locations at which the tools will remain freely available to the community going forward.
summary: The DialPort project http://dialport.org/, funded by the National Science Foundation (NSF), covers a group of tools and services that aim at fulfilling the needs of the dialog research community. Over the course of six years, several offerings have been created, including the DialPort Portal and DialCrowd. This paper describes these contributions, which will be demoed at SIGDIAL, including implementation, prior studies, corresponding discoveries, and the locations at which the tools will remain freely available to the community going forward.
abstract_zh: DialPort 项目 http://dialport.org/ 由美国国家科学基金会 (NSF) 资助，涵盖一组旨在满足对话研究社区需求的工具和服务。在六年的时间里，已经创建了多个产品，包括 DialPort Portal 和 DialCrowd。本文描述了这些贡献，这些贡献将在 SIGDIAL 上进行演示，包括实施、先前的研究、相应的发现以及这些工具将在未来继续免费提供给社区的位置。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了由NSF资助的DialPort项目开发的工具和服务，旨在满足对话研究社区的需求，并将在SIGDIAL上展示相关成果。
AI.motivation: 对话研究社区需要更全面的工具和平台支持，现有资源无法满足多样化研究需求。
AI.method: 通过开发DialPort Portal和DialCrowd等工具，提供对话数据管理、众包标注及研究支持服务。
AI.result: 成功创建多个工具并展示于SIGDIAL，未来将持续免费向社区开放使用。
AI.conclusion: DialPort项目为对话研究提供了重要基础设施，促进了学术界的合作与资源共享。

title: Application of Causal Inference to Analytical Customer Relationship Management in Banking and Insurance
title_zh: 因果推理在银行保险客户关系分析管理中的应用
abstract: Of late, in order to have better acceptability among various domain, researchers have argued that machine intelligence algorithms must be able to provide explanations that humans can understand causally. This aspect, also known as causability, achieves a specific level of human-level explainability. A specific class of algorithms known as counterfactuals may be able to provide causability. In statistics, causality has been studied and applied for many years, but not in great detail in artificial intelligence (AI). In a first-of-its-kind study, we employed the principles of causal inference to provide explainability for solving the analytical customer relationship management (ACRM) problems. In the context of banking and insurance, current research on interpretability tries to address causality-related questions like why did this model make such decisions, and was the model's choice influenced by a particular factor? We propose a solution in the form of an intervention, wherein the effect of changing the distribution of features of ACRM datasets is studied on the target feature. Subsequently, a set of counterfactuals is also obtained that may be furnished to any customer who demands an explanation of the decision taken by the bank/insurance company. Except for the credit card churn prediction dataset, good quality counterfactuals were generated for the loan default, insurance fraud detection, and credit card fraud detection datasets, where changes in no more than three features are observed.
summary: Of late, in order to have better acceptability among various domain, researchers have argued that machine intelligence algorithms must be able to provide explanations that humans can understand causally. This aspect, also known as causability, achieves a specific level of human-level explainability. A specific class of algorithms known as counterfactuals may be able to provide causability. In statistics, causality has been studied and applied for many years, but not in great detail in artificial intelligence (AI). In a first-of-its-kind study, we employed the principles of causal inference to provide explainability for solving the analytical customer relationship management (ACRM) problems. In the context of banking and insurance, current research on interpretability tries to address causality-related questions like why did this model make such decisions, and was the model's choice influenced by a particular factor? We propose a solution in the form of an intervention, wherein the effect of changing the distribution of features of ACRM datasets is studied on the target feature. Subsequently, a set of counterfactuals is also obtained that may be furnished to any customer who demands an explanation of the decision taken by the bank/insurance company. Except for the credit card churn prediction dataset, good quality counterfactuals were generated for the loan default, insurance fraud detection, and credit card fraud detection datasets, where changes in no more than three features are observed.
abstract_zh: 最近，为了在各个领域获得更好的接受度，研究人员认为机器智能算法必须能够提供人类可以因果理解的解释。这个方面，也称为因果关系，实现了人类可解释性的特定水平。一类称为反事实的特定算法可能能够提供因果关系。在统计学中，因果关系已经被研究和应用了很多年，但在人工智能（AI）中却没有很详细地研究和应用。在一项史无前例的研究中，我们采用因果推理原理来为解决分析型客户关系管理 (ACRM) 问题提供可解释性。在银行业和保险业的背景下，当前对可解释性的研究试图解决与因果关系相关的问题，例如为什么该模型做出这样的决策，以及该模型的选择是否受到特定因素的影响？我们提出了一种干预形式的解决方案，其中研究改变 ACRM 数据集特征分布对目标特征的影响。随后，还获得了一组反事实，可以将其提供给任何要求对银行/保险公司做出的决定进行解释的客户。除了信用卡流失预测数据集之外，还为贷款违约、保险欺诈检测和信用卡欺诈检测数据集生成了高质量的反事实，其中观察到不超过三个特征的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文将因果推断应用于银行和保险领域的分析型客户关系管理（ACRM），通过生成反事实解释提升AI决策的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 当前AI模型在银行和保险领域的决策需具备人类可理解的因果解释能力（即'可解释性'），以应对监管要求和用户需求。
AI.method: 采用因果干预方法研究ACRM数据集特征分布变化对目标特征的影响，并生成最多修改三个特征的反事实解释。
AI.result: 成功为贷款违约、保险欺诈检测等数据集生成高质量反事实解释，仅信用卡流失预测数据集效果欠佳。
AI.conclusion: 因果推断为ACRM问题提供了有效的可解释性解决方案，反事实解释可帮助用户理解银行/保险公司的决策依据。
