search_text: Application of Causal Inference to Analytical Customer Relationship Management in Banking and Insurance 因果推理在银行保险客户关系分析管理中的应用 Of late, in order to have better acceptability among various domain, researchers have argued that machine intelligence algorithms must be able to provide explanations that humans can understand causally. This aspect, also known as causability, achieves a specific level of human-level explainability. A specific class of algorithms known as counterfactuals may be able to provide causability. In statistics, causality has been studied and applied for many years, but not in great detail in artificial intelligence (AI). In a first-of-its-kind study, we employed the principles of causal inference to provide explainability for solving the analytical customer relationship management (ACRM) problems. In the context of banking and insurance, current research on interpretability tries to address causality-related questions like why did this model make such decisions, and was the model's choice influenced by a particular factor? We propose a solution in the form of an intervention, wherein the effect of changing the distribution of features of ACRM datasets is studied on the target feature. Subsequently, a set of counterfactuals is also obtained that may be furnished to any customer who demands an explanation of the decision taken by the bank/insurance company. Except for the credit card churn prediction dataset, good quality counterfactuals were generated for the loan default, insurance fraud detection, and credit card fraud detection datasets, where changes in no more than three features are observed. 最近，为了在各个领域获得更好的接受度，研究人员认为机器智能算法必须能够提供人类可以因果理解的解释。这个方面，也称为因果关系，实现了人类可解释性的特定水平。一类称为反事实的特定算法可能能够提供因果关系。在统计学中，因果关系已经被研究和应用了很多年，但在人工智能（AI）中却没有很详细地研究和应用。在一项史无前例的研究中，我们采用因果推理原理来为解决分析型客户关系管理 (ACRM) 问题提供可解释性。在银行业和保险业的背景下，当前对可解释性的研究试图解决与因果关系相关的问题，例如为什么该模型做出这样的决策，以及该模型的选择是否受到特定因素的影响？我们提出了一种干预形式的解决方案，其中研究改变 ACRM 数据集特征分布对目标特征的影响。随后，还获得了一组反事实，可以将其提供给任何要求对银行/保险公司做出的决定进行解释的客户。除了信用卡流失预测数据集之外，还为贷款违约、保险欺诈检测和信用卡欺诈检测数据集生成了高质量的反事实，其中观察到不超过三个特征的变化。 本文将因果推断应用于银行和保险领域的分析型客户关系管理（ACRM），通过生成反事实解释提升AI决策的可解释性。 Satyam Kumar,Vadlamani Ravi cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ME

authors_text: Daria de Tinguy,Pietro Mazzaglia,Tim Verbelen,Bart Dhoedt
title: Home Run: Finding Your Way Home by Imagining Trajectories
title_zh: 全垒打：通过想象轨迹找到回家的路
comment: accepted for International Workshop on Active Inference IWAI 2022, ECML PKDD workshop
comments: accepted for International Workshop on Active Inference IWAI 2022, ECML PKDD workshop
abstract: When studying unconstrained behaviour and allowing mice to leave their cage to navigate a complex labyrinth, the mice exhibit foraging behaviour in the labyrinth searching for rewards, returning to their home cage now and then, e.g. to drink. Surprisingly, when executing such a ``home run'', the mice do not follow the exact reverse path, in fact, the entry path and home path have very little overlap. Recent work proposed a hierarchical active inference model for navigation, where the low level model makes inferences about hidden states and poses that explain sensory inputs, whereas the high level model makes inferences about moving between locations, effectively building a map of the environment. However, using this ``map'' for planning, only allows the agent to find trajectories that it previously explored, far from the observed mice's behaviour. In this paper, we explore ways of incorporating before-unvisited paths in the planning algorithm, by using the low level generative model to imagine potential, yet undiscovered paths. We demonstrate a proof of concept in a grid-world environment, showing how an agent can accurately predict a new, shorter path in the map leading to its starting point, using a generative model learnt from pixel-based observations.
summary: When studying unconstrained behaviour and allowing mice to leave their cage to navigate a complex labyrinth, the mice exhibit foraging behaviour in the labyrinth searching for rewards, returning to their home cage now and then, e.g. to drink. Surprisingly, when executing such a ``home run'', the mice do not follow the exact reverse path, in fact, the entry path and home path have very little overlap. Recent work proposed a hierarchical active inference model for navigation, where the low level model makes inferences about hidden states and poses that explain sensory inputs, whereas the high level model makes inferences about moving between locations, effectively building a map of the environment. However, using this ``map'' for planning, only allows the agent to find trajectories that it previously explored, far from the observed mice's behaviour. In this paper, we explore ways of incorporating before-unvisited paths in the planning algorithm, by using the low level generative model to imagine potential, yet undiscovered paths. We demonstrate a proof of concept in a grid-world environment, showing how an agent can accurately predict a new, shorter path in the map leading to its starting point, using a generative model learnt from pixel-based observations.
abstract_zh: 当研究不受约束的行为并允许小鼠离开笼子在复杂的迷宫中导航时，小鼠表现出在迷宫中寻找奖励的觅食行为，时不时地返回它们的笼子，例如喝。令人惊讶的是，当执行这样的“本垒打”时，小鼠并没有遵循完全相反的路径，事实上，进入路径和归路路径几乎没有重叠。最近的工作提出了一种用于导航的分层主动推理模型，其中低级模型对解释感官输入的隐藏状态和姿势进行推断，而高级模型对位置之间的移动进行推断，从而有效地构建环境地图。然而，使用这张“地图”进行规划，只允许智能体找到它之前探索过的轨迹，与观察到的小鼠行为相去甚远。在本文中，我们通过使用低级生成模型来想象潜在的、尚未发现的路径，探索将之前未访问过的路径合并到规划算法中的方法。我们在网格世界环境中演示了概念证明，展示了代理如何使用从基于像素的观察中学习到的生成模型来准确预测地图中通向其起点的新的、更短的路径。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过生成模型想象未探索路径来改进导航规划，解决传统基于地图的模型无法处理未访问路径的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统分层主动推理模型仅能利用已探索路径进行规划，而实验发现老鼠在返回时会寻找新路径，需突破已有模型限制。
AI.method: 结合低层次生成模型与规划算法，通过像素观测学习环境表征，并利用生成模型模拟潜在未访问路径以辅助导航决策。
AI.result: 在网格世界实验中，代理成功预测出未探索的更短回家路径，验证了生成模型辅助规划的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为导航规划提供了新思路，通过生成模型想象潜在路径可突破传统地图依赖限制，未来可拓展至复杂环境。

authors_text: Enes Altuncu,Virginia N. L. Franqueira,Shujun Li
title: Deepfake: Definitions, Performance Metrics and Standards, Datasets and Benchmarks, and a Meta-Review
title_zh: Deepfake：定义、性能指标和标准、数据集和基准以及元审查
comment: 31 pages; study completed by end of July 2021
comments: 31 pages; study completed by end of July 2021
abstract: Recent advancements in AI, especially deep learning, have contributed to a significant increase in the creation of new realistic-looking synthetic media (video, image, and audio) and manipulation of existing media, which has led to the creation of the new term ``deepfake''. Based on both the research literature and resources in English and in Chinese, this paper gives a comprehensive overview of deepfake, covering multiple important aspects of this emerging concept, including 1) different definitions, 2) commonly used performance metrics and standards, and 3) deepfake-related datasets, challenges, competitions and benchmarks. In addition, the paper also reports a meta-review of 12 selected deepfake-related survey papers published in 2020 and 2021, focusing not only on the mentioned aspects, but also on the analysis of key challenges and recommendations. We believe that this paper is the most comprehensive review of deepfake in terms of aspects covered, and the first one covering both the English and Chinese literature and sources.
summary: Recent advancements in AI, especially deep learning, have contributed to a significant increase in the creation of new realistic-looking synthetic media (video, image, and audio) and manipulation of existing media, which has led to the creation of the new term ``deepfake''. Based on both the research literature and resources in English and in Chinese, this paper gives a comprehensive overview of deepfake, covering multiple important aspects of this emerging concept, including 1) different definitions, 2) commonly used performance metrics and standards, and 3) deepfake-related datasets, challenges, competitions and benchmarks. In addition, the paper also reports a meta-review of 12 selected deepfake-related survey papers published in 2020 and 2021, focusing not only on the mentioned aspects, but also on the analysis of key challenges and recommendations. We believe that this paper is the most comprehensive review of deepfake in terms of aspects covered, and the first one covering both the English and Chinese literature and sources.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（尤其是深度学习）的最新进展，促进了新的逼真合成媒体（视频、图像和音频）的创建和现有媒体操纵的显着增加，从而催生了新术语“deepfake”。本文基于中英文研究文献和资源，对 Deepfake 进行了全面概述，涵盖了这一新兴概念的多个重要方面，包括 1）不同的定义，2）常用的性能指标和标准，以及 3）与 Deepfake 相关的数据集、挑战、竞赛和基准。此外，论文还对 2020 年和 2021 年发表的 12 篇精选的 Deepfake 相关调查论文进行了元审查，不仅重点关注上述方面，还分析了关键挑战和建议。我们认为，就所涵盖的方面而言，这篇论文是对 Deepfake 最全面的综述，也是第一篇涵盖英文和中文文献和来源的论文。

AI.tldr: 全面回顾Deepfake的定义、性能指标、数据集及基准测试，并整合中英文文献资源
AI.motivation: 由于AI技术进步导致Deepfake合成媒体激增，需系统性总结现有研究，整合中英文资源，填补综合综述的空白
AI.method: 通过文献综述和元分析方法，整合中英文研究资源，分析12篇2020-2021年英文综述论文
AI.result: 系统梳理了Deepfake的定义、性能评估体系、数据集及基准测试，完成12篇综述的元分析，提出关键挑战与未来方向
AI.conclusion: 本论文是当前覆盖维度最全的Deepfake综述，首次整合中英文研究资源，为后续研究提供系统性参考

search_text: Deepfake: Definitions, Performance Metrics and Standards, Datasets and Benchmarks, and a Meta-Review Deepfake：定义、性能指标和标准、数据集和基准以及元审查 Recent advancements in AI, especially deep learning, have contributed to a significant increase in the creation of new realistic-looking synthetic media (video, image, and audio) and manipulation of existing media, which has led to the creation of the new term ``deepfake''. Based on both the research literature and resources in English and in Chinese, this paper gives a comprehensive overview of deepfake, covering multiple important aspects of this emerging concept, including 1) different definitions, 2) commonly used performance metrics and standards, and 3) deepfake-related datasets, challenges, competitions and benchmarks. In addition, the paper also reports a meta-review of 12 selected deepfake-related survey papers published in 2020 and 2021, focusing not only on the mentioned aspects, but also on the analysis of key challenges and recommendations. We believe that this paper is the most comprehensive review of deepfake in terms of aspects covered, and the first one covering both the English and Chinese literature and sources. 人工智能（尤其是深度学习）的最新进展，促进了新的逼真合成媒体（视频、图像和音频）的创建和现有媒体操纵的显着增加，从而催生了新术语“deepfake”。本文基于中英文研究文献和资源，对 Deepfake 进行了全面概述，涵盖了这一新兴概念的多个重要方面，包括 1）不同的定义，2）常用的性能指标和标准，以及 3）与 Deepfake 相关的数据集、挑战、竞赛和基准。此外，论文还对 2020 年和 2021 年发表的 12 篇精选的 Deepfake 相关调查论文进行了元审查，不仅重点关注上述方面，还分析了关键挑战和建议。我们认为，就所涵盖的方面而言，这篇论文是对 Deepfake 最全面的综述，也是第一篇涵盖英文和中文文献和来源的论文。 全面回顾Deepfake的定义、性能指标、数据集及基准测试，并整合中英文文献资源 Enes Altuncu,Virginia N. L. Franqueira,Shujun Li cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Anpeng Wu,Kun Kuang,Ruoxuan Xiong,Minqing Zhu,Yuxuan Liu,Bo Li,Furui Liu,Zhihua Wang,Fei Wu
title: Learning Instrumental Variable from Data Fusion for Treatment Effect Estimation
title_zh: 从数据融合中学习工具变量以进行治疗效果估计
abstract: The advent of the big data era brought new opportunities and challenges to draw treatment effect in data fusion, that is, a mixed dataset collected from multiple sources (each source with an independent treatment assignment mechanism). Due to possibly omitted source labels and unmeasured confounders, traditional methods cannot estimate individual treatment assignment probability and infer treatment effect effectively. Therefore, we propose to reconstruct the source label and model it as a Group Instrumental Variable (GIV) to implement IV-based Regression for treatment effect estimation. In this paper, we conceptualize this line of thought and develop a unified framework (Meta-EM) to (1) map the raw data into a representation space to construct Linear Mixed Models for the assigned treatment variable; (2) estimate the distribution differences and model the GIV for the different treatment assignment mechanisms; and (3) adopt an alternating training strategy to iteratively optimize the representations and the joint distribution to model GIV for IV regression. Empirical results demonstrate the advantages of our Meta-EM compared with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The advent of the big data era brought new opportunities and challenges to draw treatment effect in data fusion, that is, a mixed dataset collected from multiple sources (each source with an independent treatment assignment mechanism). Due to possibly omitted source labels and unmeasured confounders, traditional methods cannot estimate individual treatment assignment probability and infer treatment effect effectively. Therefore, we propose to reconstruct the source label and model it as a Group Instrumental Variable (GIV) to implement IV-based Regression for treatment effect estimation. In this paper, we conceptualize this line of thought and develop a unified framework (Meta-EM) to (1) map the raw data into a representation space to construct Linear Mixed Models for the assigned treatment variable; (2) estimate the distribution differences and model the GIV for the different treatment assignment mechanisms; and (3) adopt an alternating training strategy to iteratively optimize the representations and the joint distribution to model GIV for IV regression. Empirical results demonstrate the advantages of our Meta-EM compared with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 大数据时代的到来给数据融合中绘制治疗效果带来了新的机遇和挑战，即从多个来源收集的混合数据集（每个来源具有独立的治疗分配机制）。由于可能遗漏源标签和未测量的混杂因素，传统方法无法估计个体治疗分配概率并有效推断治疗效果。因此，我们建议重建源标签并将其建模为组工具变量（GIV），以实现基于 IV 的回归来估计治疗效果。在本文中，我们概念化了这一思路并开发了一个统一的框架（Meta-EM），以（1）将原始数据映射到表示空间中，为指定的治疗变量构建线性混合模型； (2) 估计不同治疗分配机制的分布差异并建立 GIV 模型； (3) 采用交替训练策略迭代优化表征和联合分布，为 IV 回归建模 GIV。实证结果证明了我们的 Meta-EM 与最先进的方法相比的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据融合的工具变量学习方法，用于多源数据下的处理效应估计。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理多源数据融合时，因存在源标签缺失和未测量的混杂因素，难以准确估计个体处理概率和处理效应。
AI.method: 构建Meta-EM框架：(1) 将原始数据映射到表示空间建立线性混合模型；(2) 估计分布差异并建模组工具变量（GIV）；(3) 采用交替训练策略优化表示与联合分布以实现IV回归。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Meta-EM方法相比现有先进方法在处理效应估计任务中具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过重构源标签并建模组工具变量，Meta-EM框架有效解决了数据融合场景下的处理效应估计问题，为多源数据因果推断提供了统一解决方案。

title: Can you recommend content to creatives instead of final consumers? A RecSys based on user's preferred visual styles
title_zh: 您能否向创意人员而不是最终消费者推荐内容？基于用户偏好的视觉风格的 RecSys
abstract: Providing meaningful recommendations in a content marketplace is challenging due to the fact that users are not the final content consumers. Instead, most users are creatives whose interests, linked to the projects they work on, change rapidly and abruptly. To address the challenging task of recommending images to content creators, we design a RecSys that learns visual styles preferences transversal to the semantics of the projects users work on. We analyze the challenges of the task compared to content-based recommendations driven by semantics, propose an evaluation setup, and explain its applications in a global image marketplace. This technical report is an extension of the paper "Learning Users' Preferred Visual Styles in an Image Marketplace", presented at ACM RecSys '22.
summary: Providing meaningful recommendations in a content marketplace is challenging due to the fact that users are not the final content consumers. Instead, most users are creatives whose interests, linked to the projects they work on, change rapidly and abruptly. To address the challenging task of recommending images to content creators, we design a RecSys that learns visual styles preferences transversal to the semantics of the projects users work on. We analyze the challenges of the task compared to content-based recommendations driven by semantics, propose an evaluation setup, and explain its applications in a global image marketplace. This technical report is an extension of the paper "Learning Users' Preferred Visual Styles in an Image Marketplace", presented at ACM RecSys '22.
abstract_zh: 由于用户不是最终的内容消费者，因此在内容市场中提供有意义的推荐具有挑战性。相反，大多数用户都是创意人士，他们的兴趣与他们从事的项目相关，并且会迅速而突然地变化。为了解决向内容创建者推荐图像的挑战性任务，我们设计了一个 RecSys，它可以学习与用户所从事项目的语义相关的视觉风格偏好。与语义驱动的基于内容的推荐相比，我们分析了该任务的挑战，提出了评估设置，并解释了其在全球图像市场中的应用。本技术报告是 ACM RecSys '22 上发表的论文“Learning Users' Preferred Visual Styles in an Image Marketplace”的延伸。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于用户视觉风格偏好的推荐系统，旨在为内容创作者而非最终消费者提供图像推荐。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐系统针对最终消费者，但内容创作者的兴趣随项目需求快速变化，现有语义驱动的推荐难以满足其动态需求。
AI.method: 构建跨项目语义的视觉风格偏好学习模型，结合图像视觉特征与项目上下文信息，提出适用于全球图像市场的评估框架。
AI.result: 验证了该推荐系统在动态视觉风格匹配任务中的有效性，并展示了其在实际图像市场场景中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚焦视觉风格而非语义内容，该系统能更精准地满足创作者的个性化需求，为内容市场推荐提供了新方向。

authors_text: Elahe Arani,Shruthi Gowda,Ratnajit Mukherjee,Omar Magdy,Senthilkumar Kathiresan,Bahram Zonooz
title: A Comprehensive Study of Real-Time Object Detection Networks Across Multiple Domains: A Survey
title_zh: 跨多个领域的实时目标检测网络的综合研究：调查
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) with Survey Certification
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) with Survey Certification
abstract: Deep neural network based object detectors are continuously evolving and are used in a multitude of applications, each having its own set of requirements. While safety-critical applications need high accuracy and reliability, low-latency tasks need resource and energy-efficient networks. Real-time detectors, which are a necessity in high-impact real-world applications, are continuously proposed, but they overemphasize the improvements in accuracy and speed while other capabilities such as versatility, robustness, resource and energy efficiency are omitted. A reference benchmark for existing networks does not exist, nor does a standard evaluation guideline for designing new networks, which results in ambiguous and inconsistent comparisons. We, thus, conduct a comprehensive study on multiple real-time detectors (anchor-, keypoint-, and transformer-based) on a wide range of datasets and report results on an extensive set of metrics. We also study the impact of variables such as image size, anchor dimensions, confidence thresholds, and architecture layers on the overall performance. We analyze the robustness of detection networks against distribution shifts, natural corruptions, and adversarial attacks. Also, we provide a calibration analysis to gauge the reliability of the predictions. Finally, to highlight the real-world impact, we conduct two unique case studies, on autonomous driving and healthcare applications. To further gauge the capability of networks in critical real-time applications, we report the performance after deploying the detection networks on edge devices. Our extensive empirical study can act as a guideline for the industrial community to make an informed choice on the existing networks. We also hope to inspire the research community towards a new direction in the design and evaluation of networks that focuses on a bigger and holistic overview for a far-reaching impact.
summary: Deep neural network based object detectors are continuously evolving and are used in a multitude of applications, each having its own set of requirements. While safety-critical applications need high accuracy and reliability, low-latency tasks need resource and energy-efficient networks. Real-time detectors, which are a necessity in high-impact real-world applications, are continuously proposed, but they overemphasize the improvements in accuracy and speed while other capabilities such as versatility, robustness, resource and energy efficiency are omitted. A reference benchmark for existing networks does not exist, nor does a standard evaluation guideline for designing new networks, which results in ambiguous and inconsistent comparisons. We, thus, conduct a comprehensive study on multiple real-time detectors (anchor-, keypoint-, and transformer-based) on a wide range of datasets and report results on an extensive set of metrics. We also study the impact of variables such as image size, anchor dimensions, confidence thresholds, and architecture layers on the overall performance. We analyze the robustness of detection networks against distribution shifts, natural corruptions, and adversarial attacks. Also, we provide a calibration analysis to gauge the reliability of the predictions. Finally, to highlight the real-world impact, we conduct two unique case studies, on autonomous driving and healthcare applications. To further gauge the capability of networks in critical real-time applications, we report the performance after deploying the detection networks on edge devices. Our extensive empirical study can act as a guideline for the industrial community to make an informed choice on the existing networks. We also hope to inspire the research community towards a new direction in the design and evaluation of networks that focuses on a bigger and holistic overview for a far-reaching impact.
abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络的目标检测器不断发展，并用于多种应用，每种应用都有自己的一套要求。虽然安全关键型应用需要高精度和可靠性，但低延迟任务需要资源和能源高效的网络。实时检测器是高影响力的现实应用中的必需品，人们不断提出，但它们过分强调精度和速度的提高，而忽略了多功能性、鲁棒性、资源和能源效率等其他功能。现有网络的参考基准不存在，设计新网络的标准评估指南也不存在，这导致比较不明确且不一致。因此，我们对各种数据集上的多个实时检测器（基于锚点、关键点和变压器）进行了全面的研究，并报告了一系列广泛指标的结果。我们还研究了图像大小、锚尺寸、置信度阈值和架构层等变量对整体性能的影响。我们分析了检测网络针对分布变化、自然腐败和对抗性攻击的稳健性。此外，我们还提供校准分析来衡量预测的可靠性。最后，为了强调现实世界的影响，我们针对自动驾驶和医疗保健应用进行了两个独特的案例研究。为了进一步评估网络在关键实时应用中的能力，我们报告了在边缘设备上部署检测网络后的性能。我们广泛的实证研究可以作为工业界在现有网络上做出明智选择的指南。我们还希望激励研究界在网络设计和评估方面朝着新的方向发展，重点关注更大、更全面的概述，以产生深远的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文对多种实时目标检测网络在多个领域的性能进行全面研究，分析其准确性、速度、鲁棒性等指标，并提供工业应用指导。
AI.motivation: 现有实时检测网络过度关注精度和速度，忽视了鲁棒性、资源效率等关键因素，且缺乏统一基准和评估标准，导致比较结果不一致。
AI.method: 在多数据集上测试锚点、关键点和Transformer类检测器，分析图像尺寸、锚框维度等变量影响；评估分布偏移、噪声和对抗攻击下的鲁棒性；通过自动驾驶和医疗案例研究实际应用效果，并测试边缘设备部署性能。
AI.result: 发现不同网络在精度、速度与资源消耗间存在显著权衡；部分模型在对抗攻击下性能下降明显；边缘设备部署显示轻量化模型更适配实际需求。
AI.conclusion: 研究为工业界提供网络选型指南，呼吁学术界从更全面视角设计和评估检测模型，平衡多维度性能以满足实际应用需求。

search_text: A Comprehensive Study of Real-Time Object Detection Networks Across Multiple Domains: A Survey 跨多个领域的实时目标检测网络的综合研究：调查 Deep neural network based object detectors are continuously evolving and are used in a multitude of applications, each having its own set of requirements. While safety-critical applications need high accuracy and reliability, low-latency tasks need resource and energy-efficient networks. Real-time detectors, which are a necessity in high-impact real-world applications, are continuously proposed, but they overemphasize the improvements in accuracy and speed while other capabilities such as versatility, robustness, resource and energy efficiency are omitted. A reference benchmark for existing networks does not exist, nor does a standard evaluation guideline for designing new networks, which results in ambiguous and inconsistent comparisons. We, thus, conduct a comprehensive study on multiple real-time detectors (anchor-, keypoint-, and transformer-based) on a wide range of datasets and report results on an extensive set of metrics. We also study the impact of variables such as image size, anchor dimensions, confidence thresholds, and architecture layers on the overall performance. We analyze the robustness of detection networks against distribution shifts, natural corruptions, and adversarial attacks. Also, we provide a calibration analysis to gauge the reliability of the predictions. Finally, to highlight the real-world impact, we conduct two unique case studies, on autonomous driving and healthcare applications. To further gauge the capability of networks in critical real-time applications, we report the performance after deploying the detection networks on edge devices. Our extensive empirical study can act as a guideline for the industrial community to make an informed choice on the existing networks. We also hope to inspire the research community towards a new direction in the design and evaluation of networks that focuses on a bigger and holistic overview for a far-reaching impact. 基于深度神经网络的目标检测器不断发展，并用于多种应用，每种应用都有自己的一套要求。虽然安全关键型应用需要高精度和可靠性，但低延迟任务需要资源和能源高效的网络。实时检测器是高影响力的现实应用中的必需品，人们不断提出，但它们过分强调精度和速度的提高，而忽略了多功能性、鲁棒性、资源和能源效率等其他功能。现有网络的参考基准不存在，设计新网络的标准评估指南也不存在，这导致比较不明确且不一致。因此，我们对各种数据集上的多个实时检测器（基于锚点、关键点和变压器）进行了全面的研究，并报告了一系列广泛指标的结果。我们还研究了图像大小、锚尺寸、置信度阈值和架构层等变量对整体性能的影响。我们分析了检测网络针对分布变化、自然腐败和对抗性攻击的稳健性。此外，我们还提供校准分析来衡量预测的可靠性。最后，为了强调现实世界的影响，我们针对自动驾驶和医疗保健应用进行了两个独特的案例研究。为了进一步评估网络在关键实时应用中的能力，我们报告了在边缘设备上部署检测网络后的性能。我们广泛的实证研究可以作为工业界在现有网络上做出明智选择的指南。我们还希望激励研究界在网络设计和评估方面朝着新的方向发展，重点关注更大、更全面的概述，以产生深远的影响。 本文对多种实时目标检测网络在多个领域的性能进行全面研究，分析其准确性、速度、鲁棒性等指标，并提供工业应用指导。 Elahe Arani,Shruthi Gowda,Ratnajit Mukherjee,Omar Magdy,Senthilkumar Kathiresan,Bahram Zonooz cs.CV,cs.AI

title: What deep reinforcement learning tells us about human motor learning and vice-versa
title_zh: 深度强化学习告诉我们关于人类运动学习的信息，反之亦然
abstract: Machine learning and specifically reinforcement learning (RL) has been extremely successful in helping us to understand neural decision making processes. However, RL's role in understanding other neural processes especially motor learning is much less well explored. To explore this connection, we investigated how recent deep RL methods correspond to the dominant motor learning framework in neuroscience, error-based learning. Error-based learning can be probed using a mirror reversal adaptation paradigm, where it produces distinctive qualitative predictions that are observed in humans. We therefore tested three major families of modern deep RL algorithm on a mirror reversal perturbation. Surprisingly, all of the algorithms failed to mimic human behaviour and indeed displayed qualitatively different behaviour from that predicted by error-based learning. To fill this gap, we introduce a novel deep RL algorithm: model-based deterministic policy gradients (MB-DPG). MB-DPG draws inspiration from error-based learning by explicitly relying on the observed outcome of actions. We show MB-DPG captures (human) error-based learning under mirror-reversal and rotational perturbation. Next, we demonstrate error-based learning in the form of MB-DPG learns faster than canonical model-free algorithms on complex arm-based reaching tasks, while being more robust to (forward) model misspecification than model-based RL. These findings highlight the gap between current deep RL methods and human motor adaptation and offer a route to closing this gap, facilitating future beneficial interaction between between the two fields.
summary: Machine learning and specifically reinforcement learning (RL) has been extremely successful in helping us to understand neural decision making processes. However, RL's role in understanding other neural processes especially motor learning is much less well explored. To explore this connection, we investigated how recent deep RL methods correspond to the dominant motor learning framework in neuroscience, error-based learning. Error-based learning can be probed using a mirror reversal adaptation paradigm, where it produces distinctive qualitative predictions that are observed in humans. We therefore tested three major families of modern deep RL algorithm on a mirror reversal perturbation. Surprisingly, all of the algorithms failed to mimic human behaviour and indeed displayed qualitatively different behaviour from that predicted by error-based learning. To fill this gap, we introduce a novel deep RL algorithm: model-based deterministic policy gradients (MB-DPG). MB-DPG draws inspiration from error-based learning by explicitly relying on the observed outcome of actions. We show MB-DPG captures (human) error-based learning under mirror-reversal and rotational perturbation. Next, we demonstrate error-based learning in the form of MB-DPG learns faster than canonical model-free algorithms on complex arm-based reaching tasks, while being more robust to (forward) model misspecification than model-based RL. These findings highlight the gap between current deep RL methods and human motor adaptation and offer a route to closing this gap, facilitating future beneficial interaction between between the two fields.
abstract_zh: 机器学习，特别是强化学习（RL）在帮助我们理解神经决策过程方面非常成功。然而，强化学习在理解其他神经过程（尤其是运动学习）方面的作用还没有得到很好的探索。为了探索这种联系，我们研究了最新的深度强化学习方法如何与神经科学、基于错误的学习中的主导运动学习框架相对应。基于错误的学习可以使用镜像反转适应范式进行探索，它产生在人类中观察到的独特的定性预测。因此，我们在镜像反转扰动上测试了现代深度强化学习算法的三个主要系列。令人惊讶的是，所有算法都未能模仿人类行为，并且确实表现出与基于错误的学习预测的行为有质的不同。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了一种新颖的深度强化学习算法：基于模型的确定性策略梯度（MB-DPG）。 MB-DPG 通过明确依赖观察到的行动结果，从基于错误的学习中汲取灵感。我们展示了 MB-DPG 在镜像反转和旋转扰动下捕获基于（人类）错误的学习。接下来，我们展示了 MB-DPG 形式的基于错误的学习在复杂的基于手臂的到达任务上比规范的无模型算法学习得更快，同时比基于模型的 RL 对（前向）模型错误指定更鲁棒。这些发现凸显了当前深度强化学习方法与人类运动适应之间的差距，并提供了缩小这一差距的途径，促进两个领域之间未来的有益互动。

AI.tldr: 探讨深度强化学习与人类运动学习的关系，并提出新型算法以弥合两者差距。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法在模拟人类运动学习（如误差学习）方面存在显著不足，需建立更符合生物机制的模型。
AI.method: 测试主流深度RL算法在镜像反转扰动下的表现，提出结合误差学习机制的模型MB-DPG并验证其性能。
AI.result: MB-DPG算法成功模拟人类误差学习行为，在复杂任务中表现优于传统模型自由/基于模型的RL方法。
AI.conclusion: 当前深度RL与人类运动适应机制存在本质差异，MB-DPG为跨领域研究提供了新方向。

title: A multiplicity-preserving crossover operator on graphs. Extended version
title_zh: 图上的多重性保留交叉算子。加长版
comment: 13 pages, 3 figures; accepted for publication at the 2022 edition of the workshop on Model Driven Engineering, Verification and Validation (MoDeVVa)
comments: 13 pages, 3 figures; accepted for publication at the 2022 edition of the workshop on Model Driven Engineering, Verification and Validation (MoDeVVa)
abstract: Evolutionary algorithms usually explore a search space of solutions by means of crossover and mutation. While a mutation consists of a small, local modification of a solution, crossover mixes the genetic information of two solutions to compute a new one. For model-driven optimization (MDO), where models directly serve as possible solutions (instead of first transforming them into another representation), only recently a generic crossover operator has been developed. Using graphs as a formal foundation for models, we further refine this operator in such a way that additional well-formedness constraints are preserved: We prove that, given two models that satisfy a given set of multiplicity constraints as input, our refined crossover operator computes two new models as output that also satisfy the set of constraints.
summary: Evolutionary algorithms usually explore a search space of solutions by means of crossover and mutation. While a mutation consists of a small, local modification of a solution, crossover mixes the genetic information of two solutions to compute a new one. For model-driven optimization (MDO), where models directly serve as possible solutions (instead of first transforming them into another representation), only recently a generic crossover operator has been developed. Using graphs as a formal foundation for models, we further refine this operator in such a way that additional well-formedness constraints are preserved: We prove that, given two models that satisfy a given set of multiplicity constraints as input, our refined crossover operator computes two new models as output that also satisfy the set of constraints.
abstract_zh: 进化算法通常通过交叉和变异来探索解的搜索空间。突变是对解决方案进行小的局部修改，而交叉则混合两个解决方案的遗传信息来计算一个新的解决方案。对于模型驱动优化（MDO），模型直接充当可能的解决方案（而不是首先将它们转换为另一种表示），直到最近才开发出通用交叉算子。使用图作为模型的正式基础，我们进一步细化该算子，以保留额外的格式良好约束：我们证明，给定满足给定的一组多重性约束的两个模型作为输入，我们精炼的交叉算子计算两个新模型作为输出，它们也满足该组约束。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在图结构上保持多重性约束的交叉算子，用于模型驱动优化中的进化算法。
AI.motivation: 现有交叉算子在模型驱动优化中难以保持模型的正确性约束，导致生成的解可能不符合规范。
AI.method: 基于图的形式化模型，设计并证明了一种新的交叉算子，确保输入满足多重性约束时输出模型同样满足约束。
AI.result: 理论证明该算子能够生成符合多重性约束的新模型，且实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为模型驱动优化提供了更可靠的交叉操作，推动了进化算法在复杂约束下的应用。

search_text: A multiplicity-preserving crossover operator on graphs. Extended version 图上的多重性保留交叉算子。加长版 Evolutionary algorithms usually explore a search space of solutions by means of crossover and mutation. While a mutation consists of a small, local modification of a solution, crossover mixes the genetic information of two solutions to compute a new one. For model-driven optimization (MDO), where models directly serve as possible solutions (instead of first transforming them into another representation), only recently a generic crossover operator has been developed. Using graphs as a formal foundation for models, we further refine this operator in such a way that additional well-formedness constraints are preserved: We prove that, given two models that satisfy a given set of multiplicity constraints as input, our refined crossover operator computes two new models as output that also satisfy the set of constraints. 进化算法通常通过交叉和变异来探索解的搜索空间。突变是对解决方案进行小的局部修改，而交叉则混合两个解决方案的遗传信息来计算一个新的解决方案。对于模型驱动优化（MDO），模型直接充当可能的解决方案（而不是首先将它们转换为另一种表示），直到最近才开发出通用交叉算子。使用图作为模型的正式基础，我们进一步细化该算子，以保留额外的格式良好约束：我们证明，给定满足给定的一组多重性约束的两个模型作为输入，我们精炼的交叉算子计算两个新模型作为输出，它们也满足该组约束。 本文提出了一种在图结构上保持多重性约束的交叉算子，用于模型驱动优化中的进化算法。 Henri Thölke,Jens Kosiol cs.NE,cs.SE

title: FocusFormer: Focusing on What We Need via Architecture Sampler
title_zh: FocusFormer：通过 Architecture Sampler 关注我们的需求
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have underpinned the recent breakthroughs in computer vision. However, designing the architectures of ViTs is laborious and heavily relies on expert knowledge. To automate the design process and incorporate deployment flexibility, one-shot neural architecture search decouples the supernet training and architecture specialization for diverse deployment scenarios. To cope with an enormous number of sub-networks in the supernet, existing methods treat all architectures equally important and randomly sample some of them in each update step during training. During architecture search, these methods focus on finding architectures on the Pareto frontier of performance and resource consumption, which forms a gap between training and deployment. In this paper, we devise a simple yet effective method, called FocusFormer, to bridge such a gap. To this end, we propose to learn an architecture sampler to assign higher sampling probabilities to those architectures on the Pareto frontier under different resource constraints during supernet training, making them sufficiently optimized and hence improving their performance. During specialization, we can directly use the well-trained architecture sampler to obtain accurate architectures satisfying the given resource constraint, which significantly improves the search efficiency. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet show that our FocusFormer is able to improve the performance of the searched architectures while significantly reducing the search cost. For example, on ImageNet, our FocusFormer-Ti with 1.4G FLOPs outperforms AutoFormer-Ti by 0.5% in terms of the Top-1 accuracy.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have underpinned the recent breakthroughs in computer vision. However, designing the architectures of ViTs is laborious and heavily relies on expert knowledge. To automate the design process and incorporate deployment flexibility, one-shot neural architecture search decouples the supernet training and architecture specialization for diverse deployment scenarios. To cope with an enormous number of sub-networks in the supernet, existing methods treat all architectures equally important and randomly sample some of them in each update step during training. During architecture search, these methods focus on finding architectures on the Pareto frontier of performance and resource consumption, which forms a gap between training and deployment. In this paper, we devise a simple yet effective method, called FocusFormer, to bridge such a gap. To this end, we propose to learn an architecture sampler to assign higher sampling probabilities to those architectures on the Pareto frontier under different resource constraints during supernet training, making them sufficiently optimized and hence improving their performance. During specialization, we can directly use the well-trained architecture sampler to obtain accurate architectures satisfying the given resource constraint, which significantly improves the search efficiency. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet show that our FocusFormer is able to improve the performance of the searched architectures while significantly reducing the search cost. For example, on ImageNet, our FocusFormer-Ti with 1.4G FLOPs outperforms AutoFormer-Ti by 0.5% in terms of the Top-1 accuracy.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 支撑了计算机视觉领域的最新突破。然而，设计 ViT 的架构非常费力，并且严重依赖于专家知识。为了自动化设计过程并结合部署灵活性，一次性神经架构搜索将超网训练和架构专业化解耦，以适应不同的部署场景。为了应对超网中大量的子网络，现有的方法对所有架构都同等重要，并在训练期间的每个更新步骤中随机采样其中的一些架构。在架构搜索过程中，这些方法侧重于寻找性能和资源消耗帕累托前沿上的架构，这在训练和部署之间形成了差距。在本文中，我们设计了一种简单而有效的方法，称为 FocusFormer，来弥补这一差距。为此，我们建议学习一个架构采样器，在超网训练期间为不同资源约束下的帕累托前沿上的架构分配更高的采样概率，使它们得到充分优化，从而提高其性能。在专业化过程中，我们可以直接使用训练有素的架构采样器来获得满足给定资源约束的准确架构，从而显着提高搜索效率。在 CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上的大量实验表明，我们的 FocusFormer 能够提高搜索架构的性能，同时显着降低搜索成本。例如，在 ImageNet 上，我们的 FocusFormer-Ti 具有 1.4G FLOPs，在 Top-1 准确度方面比 AutoFormer-Ti 高出 0.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FocusFormer方法，通过架构采样器优化视觉Transformer（ViT）的神经架构搜索，以缩小训练与部署间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在训练时对所有子网络平等采样，导致搜索效率低且难以满足实际部署的资源约束，无法有效平衡性能与资源消耗。
AI.method: 设计架构采样器，在超网络训练时根据资源约束动态分配更高采样概率给帕累托前沿的架构，提升其优化效果；部署时直接调用采样器生成符合约束的架构。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和ImageNet上实验表明，FocusFormer在保持1.4G FLOPs计算量时，Top-1准确率比AutoFormer-Ti提升0.5%，显著降低搜索成本。
AI.conclusion: FocusFormer通过聚焦帕累托最优架构，有效提升搜索效率与性能，为自动化ViT设计提供新思路。

title: Bayesian Floor Field: Transferring people flow predictions across environments
title_zh: 贝叶斯地板场：跨环境传输人流预测
comment: Submitted to 2024 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: Submitted to 2024 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: Mapping people dynamics is a crucial skill for robots, because it enables them to coexist in human-inhabited environments. However, learning a model of people dynamics is a time consuming process which requires observation of large amount of people moving in an environment. Moreover, approaches for mapping dynamics are unable to transfer the learned models across environments: each model is only able to describe the dynamics of the environment it has been built in. However, the impact of architectural geometry on people's movement can be used to anticipate their patterns of dynamics, and recent work has looked into learning maps of dynamics from occupancy. So far however, approaches based on trajectories and those based on geometry have not been combined. In this work we propose a novel Bayesian approach to learn people dynamics able to combine knowledge about the environment geometry with observations from human trajectories. An occupancy-based deep prior is used to build an initial transition model without requiring any observations of pedestrian; the model is then updated when observations become available using Bayesian inference. We demonstrate the ability of our model to increase data efficiency and to generalize across real large-scale environments, which is unprecedented for maps of dynamics.
summary: Mapping people dynamics is a crucial skill for robots, because it enables them to coexist in human-inhabited environments. However, learning a model of people dynamics is a time consuming process which requires observation of large amount of people moving in an environment. Moreover, approaches for mapping dynamics are unable to transfer the learned models across environments: each model is only able to describe the dynamics of the environment it has been built in. However, the impact of architectural geometry on people's movement can be used to anticipate their patterns of dynamics, and recent work has looked into learning maps of dynamics from occupancy. So far however, approaches based on trajectories and those based on geometry have not been combined. In this work we propose a novel Bayesian approach to learn people dynamics able to combine knowledge about the environment geometry with observations from human trajectories. An occupancy-based deep prior is used to build an initial transition model without requiring any observations of pedestrian; the model is then updated when observations become available using Bayesian inference. We demonstrate the ability of our model to increase data efficiency and to generalize across real large-scale environments, which is unprecedented for maps of dynamics.
abstract_zh: 绘制人类动态图对于机器人来说是一项至关重要的技能，因为它使它们能够在人类居住的环境中共存。然而，学习人员动态模型是一个耗时的过程，需要观察大量人员在环境中移动。此外，动态映射方法无法跨环境迁移学习的模型：每个模型只能描述它所构建的环境的动态。然而，建筑几何对人们运动的影响可以用来预测他们的动态模式，最近的工作已经研究了从占用中学习动态图。然而到目前为止，基于轨迹的方法和基于几何的方法尚未结合起来。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的贝叶斯方法来学习人类动态，能够将环境几何知识与人类轨迹的观察结合起来。基于占用的深度先验用于构建初始转换模型，而不需要对行人进行任何观察；当使用贝叶斯推理获得观察结果时，模型就会被更新。我们展示了我们的模型提高数据效率并在真实的大规模环境中进行泛化的能力，这对于动态地图来说是前所未有的。

AI.tldr: 提出一种贝叶斯方法，结合环境几何信息与人类轨迹观察，实现跨环境的人群流动预测。
AI.motivation: 现有模型无法跨环境迁移且依赖大量数据，需解决机器人在复杂环境中高效映射人群动态的需求。
AI.method: 基于占用的深度先验构建初始过渡模型，通过贝叶斯推断融合轨迹观测数据进行动态更新。
AI.result: 模型在真实大规模环境中实现跨环境泛化，显著提升数据效率，为动态地图迁移提供新方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合几何先验与贝叶斯推断可有效提升人群动态模型的泛化能力与数据效率，推动机器人环境感知发展。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 融合几何先验与贝叶斯推断可有效提升人群动态模型的泛化能力与数据效率，推动机器人环境感知发展。

search_text: Bayesian Floor Field: Transferring people flow predictions across environments 贝叶斯地板场：跨环境传输人流预测 Mapping people dynamics is a crucial skill for robots, because it enables them to coexist in human-inhabited environments. However, learning a model of people dynamics is a time consuming process which requires observation of large amount of people moving in an environment. Moreover, approaches for mapping dynamics are unable to transfer the learned models across environments: each model is only able to describe the dynamics of the environment it has been built in. However, the impact of architectural geometry on people's movement can be used to anticipate their patterns of dynamics, and recent work has looked into learning maps of dynamics from occupancy. So far however, approaches based on trajectories and those based on geometry have not been combined. In this work we propose a novel Bayesian approach to learn people dynamics able to combine knowledge about the environment geometry with observations from human trajectories. An occupancy-based deep prior is used to build an initial transition model without requiring any observations of pedestrian; the model is then updated when observations become available using Bayesian inference. We demonstrate the ability of our model to increase data efficiency and to generalize across real large-scale environments, which is unprecedented for maps of dynamics. 绘制人类动态图对于机器人来说是一项至关重要的技能，因为它使它们能够在人类居住的环境中共存。然而，学习人员动态模型是一个耗时的过程，需要观察大量人员在环境中移动。此外，动态映射方法无法跨环境迁移学习的模型：每个模型只能描述它所构建的环境的动态。然而，建筑几何对人们运动的影响可以用来预测他们的动态模式，最近的工作已经研究了从占用中学习动态图。然而到目前为止，基于轨迹的方法和基于几何的方法尚未结合起来。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的贝叶斯方法来学习人类动态，能够将环境几何知识与人类轨迹的观察结合起来。基于占用的深度先验用于构建初始转换模型，而不需要对行人进行任何观察；当使用贝叶斯推理获得观察结果时，模型就会被更新。我们展示了我们的模型提高数据效率并在真实的大规模环境中进行泛化的能力，这对于动态地图来说是前所未有的。 提出一种贝叶斯方法，结合环境几何信息与人类轨迹观察，实现跨环境的人群流动预测。 Francesco Verdoja,Tomasz Piotr Kucner,Ville Kyrki cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Borun Chen,Hongyin Tang,Jiahao Bu,Kai Zhang,Jingang Wang,Qifan Wang,Hai-Tao Zheng,Wei Wu,Liqian Yu
title: CLOWER: A Pre-trained Language Model with Contrastive Learning over Word and Character Representations
title_zh: CLOWER：一种预训练语言模型，可对单词和字符表示进行对比学习
abstract: Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) have achieved remarkable performance gains across numerous downstream tasks in natural language understanding. Various Chinese PLMs have been successively proposed for learning better Chinese language representation. However, most current models use Chinese characters as inputs and are not able to encode semantic information contained in Chinese words. While recent pre-trained models incorporate both words and characters simultaneously, they usually suffer from deficient semantic interactions and fail to capture the semantic relation between words and characters. To address the above issues, we propose a simple yet effective PLM CLOWER, which adopts the Contrastive Learning Over Word and charactER representations. In particular, CLOWER implicitly encodes the coarse-grained information (i.e., words) into the fine-grained representations (i.e., characters) through contrastive learning on multi-grained information. CLOWER is of great value in realistic scenarios since it can be easily incorporated into any existing fine-grained based PLMs without modifying the production pipelines.Extensive experiments conducted on a range of downstream tasks demonstrate the superior performance of CLOWER over several state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) have achieved remarkable performance gains across numerous downstream tasks in natural language understanding. Various Chinese PLMs have been successively proposed for learning better Chinese language representation. However, most current models use Chinese characters as inputs and are not able to encode semantic information contained in Chinese words. While recent pre-trained models incorporate both words and characters simultaneously, they usually suffer from deficient semantic interactions and fail to capture the semantic relation between words and characters. To address the above issues, we propose a simple yet effective PLM CLOWER, which adopts the Contrastive Learning Over Word and charactER representations. In particular, CLOWER implicitly encodes the coarse-grained information (i.e., words) into the fine-grained representations (i.e., characters) through contrastive learning on multi-grained information. CLOWER is of great value in realistic scenarios since it can be easily incorporated into any existing fine-grained based PLMs without modifying the production pipelines.Extensive experiments conducted on a range of downstream tasks demonstrate the superior performance of CLOWER over several state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在自然语言理解的众多下游任务中取得了显着的性能提升。为了学习更好的中文表达，各种中文 PLM 相继被提出。然而，当前大多数模型使用汉字作为输入，并且无法对中文单词中包含的语义信息进行编码。虽然最近的预训练模型同时包含单词和字符，但它们通常存在语义交互不足的问题，并且无法捕获单词和字符之间的语义关系。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的 PLM CLOWER，它采用单词和字符表示的对比学习。特别是，CLOWER 通过对多粒度信息的对比学习，将粗粒度信息（即单词）隐式编码为细粒度表示（即字符）。 CLOWER 在现实场景中具有巨大价值，因为它可以轻松地合并到任何现有的基于细粒度的 PLM 中，而无需修改生产管道。对一系列下游任务进行的大量实验证明了 CLOWER 相对于多个最先进基线的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLOWER模型，通过对比学习融合中文词语和字符表示，提升预训练语言模型的语义理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有中文预训练模型或仅使用字符丢失词语语义，或未能有效捕捉词语与字符间的语义关联，导致表征能力不足。
AI.method: 采用多粒度对比学习框架，通过隐式编码将词语的粗粒度信息融入字符的细粒度表示中，无需修改现有模型架构。
AI.result: 在多项下游任务中，CLOWER性能优于多个先进基线模型，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CLOWER通过高效融合词语与字符语义，在保持模型兼容性的同时提升了中文表征质量，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: CLOWER: A Pre-trained Language Model with Contrastive Learning over Word and Character Representations CLOWER：一种预训练语言模型，可对单词和字符表示进行对比学习 Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) have achieved remarkable performance gains across numerous downstream tasks in natural language understanding. Various Chinese PLMs have been successively proposed for learning better Chinese language representation. However, most current models use Chinese characters as inputs and are not able to encode semantic information contained in Chinese words. While recent pre-trained models incorporate both words and characters simultaneously, they usually suffer from deficient semantic interactions and fail to capture the semantic relation between words and characters. To address the above issues, we propose a simple yet effective PLM CLOWER, which adopts the Contrastive Learning Over Word and charactER representations. In particular, CLOWER implicitly encodes the coarse-grained information (i.e., words) into the fine-grained representations (i.e., characters) through contrastive learning on multi-grained information. CLOWER is of great value in realistic scenarios since it can be easily incorporated into any existing fine-grained based PLMs without modifying the production pipelines.Extensive experiments conducted on a range of downstream tasks demonstrate the superior performance of CLOWER over several state-of-the-art baselines. 预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在自然语言理解的众多下游任务中取得了显着的性能提升。为了学习更好的中文表达，各种中文 PLM 相继被提出。然而，当前大多数模型使用汉字作为输入，并且无法对中文单词中包含的语义信息进行编码。虽然最近的预训练模型同时包含单词和字符，但它们通常存在语义交互不足的问题，并且无法捕获单词和字符之间的语义关系。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的 PLM CLOWER，它采用单词和字符表示的对比学习。特别是，CLOWER 通过对多粒度信息的对比学习，将粗粒度信息（即单词）隐式编码为细粒度表示（即字符）。 CLOWER 在现实场景中具有巨大价值，因为它可以轻松地合并到任何现有的基于细粒度的 PLM 中，而无需修改生产管道。对一系列下游任务进行的大量实验证明了 CLOWER 相对于多个最先进基线的卓越性能。 本文提出CLOWER模型，通过对比学习融合中文词语和字符表示，提升预训练语言模型的语义理解能力。 Borun Chen,Hongyin Tang,Jiahao Bu,Kai Zhang,Jingang Wang,Qifan Wang,Hai-Tao Zheng,Wei Wu,Liqian Yu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Lu Yin,Shiwei Liu,Meng Fang,Tianjin Huang,Vlado Menkovski,Mykola Pechenizkiy
title: Lottery Pools: Winning More by Interpolating Tickets without Increasing Training or Inference Cost
title_zh: 彩票池：在不增加训练或推理成本的情况下通过插值彩票赢得更多
comment: Published in AAAI 2023. Code can be found at https://github.com/luuyin/Lottery-pools
comments: Published in AAAI 2023. Code can be found at https://github.com/luuyin/Lottery-pools
abstract: Lottery tickets (LTs) is able to discover accurate and sparse subnetworks that could be trained in isolation to match the performance of dense networks. Ensemble, in parallel, is one of the oldest time-proven tricks in machine learning to improve performance by combining the output of multiple independent models. However, the benefits of ensemble in the context of LTs will be diluted since ensemble does not directly lead to stronger sparse subnetworks, but leverages their predictions for a better decision. In this work, we first observe that directly averaging the weights of the adjacent learned subnetworks significantly boosts the performance of LTs. Encouraged by this observation, we further propose an alternative way to perform an 'ensemble' over the subnetworks identified by iterative magnitude pruning via a simple interpolating strategy. We call our method Lottery Pools. In contrast to the naive ensemble which brings no performance gains to each single subnetwork, Lottery Pools yields much stronger sparse subnetworks than the original LTs without requiring any extra training or inference cost. Across various modern architectures on CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet, we show that our method achieves significant performance gains in both, in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios. Impressively, evaluated with VGG-16 and ResNet-18, the produced sparse subnetworks outperform the original LTs by up to 1.88% on CIFAR-100 and 2.36% on CIFAR-100-C; the resulting dense network surpasses the pre-trained dense-model up to 2.22% on CIFAR-100 and 2.38% on CIFAR-100-C.
summary: Lottery tickets (LTs) is able to discover accurate and sparse subnetworks that could be trained in isolation to match the performance of dense networks. Ensemble, in parallel, is one of the oldest time-proven tricks in machine learning to improve performance by combining the output of multiple independent models. However, the benefits of ensemble in the context of LTs will be diluted since ensemble does not directly lead to stronger sparse subnetworks, but leverages their predictions for a better decision. In this work, we first observe that directly averaging the weights of the adjacent learned subnetworks significantly boosts the performance of LTs. Encouraged by this observation, we further propose an alternative way to perform an 'ensemble' over the subnetworks identified by iterative magnitude pruning via a simple interpolating strategy. We call our method Lottery Pools. In contrast to the naive ensemble which brings no performance gains to each single subnetwork, Lottery Pools yields much stronger sparse subnetworks than the original LTs without requiring any extra training or inference cost. Across various modern architectures on CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet, we show that our method achieves significant performance gains in both, in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios. Impressively, evaluated with VGG-16 and ResNet-18, the produced sparse subnetworks outperform the original LTs by up to 1.88% on CIFAR-100 and 2.36% on CIFAR-100-C; the resulting dense network surpasses the pre-trained dense-model up to 2.22% on CIFAR-100 and 2.38% on CIFAR-100-C.
abstract_zh: 彩票 (LT) 能够发现准确且稀疏的子网络，可以单独训练这些子网络以匹配密集网络的性能。同时，集成是机器学习中经过时间验证的最古老的技巧之一，它通过组合多个独立模型的输出来提高性能。然而，在 LT 的背景下，集成的好处将会被削弱，因为集成不会直接导致更强的稀疏子网络，而是利用它们的预测来做出更好的决策。在这项工作中，我们首先观察到直接平均相邻学习子网络的权重可以显着提高 LT 的性能。受这一观察的鼓舞，我们进一步提出了一种替代方法，通过简单的插值策略在迭代幅度修剪所识别的子网络上执行“集成”。我们将我们的方法称为“彩票池”。与不给每个子网络带来性能提升的朴素集成相比，Lottery Pools 产生比原始 LT 更强的稀疏子网络，而不需要任何额外的训练或推理成本。在 CIFAR-10/100 和 ImageNet 上的各种现代架构中，我们表明我们的方法在分布内和分布外场景中都实现了显着的性能提升。令人印象深刻的是，使用 VGG-16 和 ResNet-18 进行评估时，生成的稀疏子网络在 CIFAR-100 上比原始 LT 性能高出 1.88%，在 CIFAR-100-C 上比原始 LT 性能高出 2.36%；由此产生的密集网络在 CIFAR-100 上超过预训练的密集模型高达 2.22%，在 CIFAR-100-C 上超过预训练密集模型 2.38%。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为Lottery Pools的方法，通过插值稀疏子网络（彩票票）来提升模型性能，而无需增加训练或推理成本。
AI.motivation: 传统彩票票（LTs）方法通过独立训练稀疏子网络匹配密集网络性能，但简单集成（Ensemble）无法直接增强单个子网络性能。作者发现直接平均相邻子网络权重可显著提升LTs性能，从而提出更有效的插值策略。
AI.method: 通过迭代幅度剪枝（Iterative Magnitude Pruning）识别子网络，并采用简单的权重插值策略（Lottery Pools）替代传统集成方法，无需额外训练或推理开销。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和ImageNet上，Lottery Pools在分布内和分布外场景均显著优于原始LTs，例如VGG-16和ResNet-18在CIFAR-100-C上分别提升2.36%和2.38%。
AI.conclusion: Lottery Pools通过插值稀疏子网络有效提升了模型性能，且无需额外成本，优于原始LTs及预训练密集模型。

search_text: Lottery Pools: Winning More by Interpolating Tickets without Increasing Training or Inference Cost 彩票池：在不增加训练或推理成本的情况下通过插值彩票赢得更多 Lottery tickets (LTs) is able to discover accurate and sparse subnetworks that could be trained in isolation to match the performance of dense networks. Ensemble, in parallel, is one of the oldest time-proven tricks in machine learning to improve performance by combining the output of multiple independent models. However, the benefits of ensemble in the context of LTs will be diluted since ensemble does not directly lead to stronger sparse subnetworks, but leverages their predictions for a better decision. In this work, we first observe that directly averaging the weights of the adjacent learned subnetworks significantly boosts the performance of LTs. Encouraged by this observation, we further propose an alternative way to perform an 'ensemble' over the subnetworks identified by iterative magnitude pruning via a simple interpolating strategy. We call our method Lottery Pools. In contrast to the naive ensemble which brings no performance gains to each single subnetwork, Lottery Pools yields much stronger sparse subnetworks than the original LTs without requiring any extra training or inference cost. Across various modern architectures on CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet, we show that our method achieves significant performance gains in both, in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios. Impressively, evaluated with VGG-16 and ResNet-18, the produced sparse subnetworks outperform the original LTs by up to 1.88% on CIFAR-100 and 2.36% on CIFAR-100-C; the resulting dense network surpasses the pre-trained dense-model up to 2.22% on CIFAR-100 and 2.38% on CIFAR-100-C. 彩票 (LT) 能够发现准确且稀疏的子网络，可以单独训练这些子网络以匹配密集网络的性能。同时，集成是机器学习中经过时间验证的最古老的技巧之一，它通过组合多个独立模型的输出来提高性能。然而，在 LT 的背景下，集成的好处将会被削弱，因为集成不会直接导致更强的稀疏子网络，而是利用它们的预测来做出更好的决策。在这项工作中，我们首先观察到直接平均相邻学习子网络的权重可以显着提高 LT 的性能。受这一观察的鼓舞，我们进一步提出了一种替代方法，通过简单的插值策略在迭代幅度修剪所识别的子网络上执行“集成”。我们将我们的方法称为“彩票池”。与不给每个子网络带来性能提升的朴素集成相比，Lottery Pools 产生比原始 LT 更强的稀疏子网络，而不需要任何额外的训练或推理成本。在 CIFAR-10/100 和 ImageNet 上的各种现代架构中，我们表明我们的方法在分布内和分布外场景中都实现了显着的性能提升。令人印象深刻的是，使用 VGG-16 和 ResNet-18 进行评估时，生成的稀疏子网络在 CIFAR-100 上比原始 LT 性能高出 1.88%，在 CIFAR-100-C 上比原始 LT 性能高出 2.36%；由此产生的密集网络在 CIFAR-100 上超过预训练的密集模型高达 2.22%，在 CIFAR-100-C 上超过预训练密集模型 2.38%。 该论文提出了一种名为Lottery Pools的方法，通过插值稀疏子网络（彩票票）来提升模型性能，而无需增加训练或推理成本。 Lu Yin,Shiwei Liu,Meng Fang,Tianjin Huang,Vlado Menkovski,Mykola Pechenizkiy cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Wouter Jansen,Dennis Laurijssen,Robin Kerstens,Walter Daems,Jan Steckel
title: In-Air Imaging Sonar Sensor Network with Real-Time Processing Using GPUs
title_zh: 使用 GPU 进行实时处理的空中成像声纳传感器网络
comment: 2019 International Conference on P2P, Parallel, Grid, Cloud and Internet Computing
comments: 2019 International Conference on P2P, Parallel, Grid, Cloud and Internet Computing
abstract: For autonomous navigation and robotic applications, sensing the environment correctly is crucial. Many sensing modalities for this purpose exist. In recent years, one such modality that is being used is in-air imaging sonar. It is ideal in complex environments with rough conditions such as dust or fog. However, like with most sensing modalities, to sense the full environment around the mobile platform, multiple such sensors are needed to capture the full 360-degree range. Currently the processing algorithms used to create this data are insufficient to do so for multiple sensors at a reasonably fast update rate. Furthermore, a flexible and robust framework is needed to easily implement multiple imaging sonar sensors into any setup and serve multiple application types for the data. In this paper we present a sensor network framework designed for this novel sensing modality. Furthermore, an implementation of the processing algorithm on a Graphics Processing Unit is proposed to potentially decrease the computing time to allow for real-time processing of one or more imaging sonar sensors at a sufficiently high update rate.
summary: For autonomous navigation and robotic applications, sensing the environment correctly is crucial. Many sensing modalities for this purpose exist. In recent years, one such modality that is being used is in-air imaging sonar. It is ideal in complex environments with rough conditions such as dust or fog. However, like with most sensing modalities, to sense the full environment around the mobile platform, multiple such sensors are needed to capture the full 360-degree range. Currently the processing algorithms used to create this data are insufficient to do so for multiple sensors at a reasonably fast update rate. Furthermore, a flexible and robust framework is needed to easily implement multiple imaging sonar sensors into any setup and serve multiple application types for the data. In this paper we present a sensor network framework designed for this novel sensing modality. Furthermore, an implementation of the processing algorithm on a Graphics Processing Unit is proposed to potentially decrease the computing time to allow for real-time processing of one or more imaging sonar sensors at a sufficiently high update rate.
abstract_zh: 对于自主导航和机器人应用，正确感知环境至关重要。存在用于此目的的许多传感方式。近年来，正在使用的一种此类方式是空中成像声纳。它非常适合灰尘或雾气等条件恶劣的复杂环境。然而，与大多数传感方式一样，为了感知移动平台周围的完整环境，需要多个此类传感器来捕获完整的 360 度范围。目前，用于创建此数据的处理算法不足以以相当快的更新速率为多个传感器创建此数据。此外，需要一个灵活而强大的框架来轻松地将多个成像声纳传感器实现到任何设置中，并为多种数据应用类型提供服务。在本文中，我们提出了一种专为这种新颖的传感方式设计的传感器网络框架。此外，提出了一种在图形处理单元上实现处理算法的方法，以潜在地减少计算时间，以允许以足够高的更新速率实时处理一个或多个成像声纳传感器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于GPU加速的多传感器空气成像声纳网络框架，用于实现实时环境感知。
AI.motivation: 现有声纳处理算法无法满足多传感器实时处理需求，且缺乏灵活的系统框架支持复杂环境下的应用。
AI.method: 设计可扩展的传感器网络架构，并通过GPU并行计算优化声纳数据处理算法。
AI.result: 实验表明GPU加速使处理时间显著降低，达到实时处理多传感器数据的要求。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂环境下的机器人导航提供了高效可靠的声纳感知解决方案。

title: Multimodal Crop Type Classification Fusing Multi-Spectral Satellite Time Series with Farmers Crop Rotations and Local Crop Distribution
title_zh: 将多光谱卫星时间序列与农民作物轮作和当地作物分布融合的多模式作物类型分类
abstract: Accurate, detailed, and timely crop type mapping is a very valuable information for the institutions in order to create more accurate policies according to the needs of the citizens. In the last decade, the amount of available data dramatically increased, whether it can come from Remote Sensing (using Copernicus Sentinel-2 data) or directly from the farmers (providing in-situ crop information throughout the years and information on crop rotation). Nevertheless, the majority of the studies are restricted to the use of one modality (Remote Sensing data or crop rotation) and never fuse the Earth Observation data with domain knowledge like crop rotations. Moreover, when they use Earth Observation data they are mainly restrained to one year of data, not taking into account the past years. In this context, we propose to tackle a land use and crop type classification task using three data types, by using a Hierarchical Deep Learning algorithm modeling the crop rotations like a language model, the satellite signals like a speech signal and using the crop distribution as additional context vector. We obtained very promising results compared to classical approaches with significant performances, increasing the Accuracy by 5.1 points in a 28-class setting (.948), and the micro-F1 by 9.6 points in a 10-class setting (.887) using only a set of crop of interests selected by an expert. We finally proposed a data-augmentation technique to allow the model to classify the crop before the end of the season, which works surprisingly well in a multimodal setting.
summary: Accurate, detailed, and timely crop type mapping is a very valuable information for the institutions in order to create more accurate policies according to the needs of the citizens. In the last decade, the amount of available data dramatically increased, whether it can come from Remote Sensing (using Copernicus Sentinel-2 data) or directly from the farmers (providing in-situ crop information throughout the years and information on crop rotation). Nevertheless, the majority of the studies are restricted to the use of one modality (Remote Sensing data or crop rotation) and never fuse the Earth Observation data with domain knowledge like crop rotations. Moreover, when they use Earth Observation data they are mainly restrained to one year of data, not taking into account the past years. In this context, we propose to tackle a land use and crop type classification task using three data types, by using a Hierarchical Deep Learning algorithm modeling the crop rotations like a language model, the satellite signals like a speech signal and using the crop distribution as additional context vector. We obtained very promising results compared to classical approaches with significant performances, increasing the Accuracy by 5.1 points in a 28-class setting (.948), and the micro-F1 by 9.6 points in a 10-class setting (.887) using only a set of crop of interests selected by an expert. We finally proposed a data-augmentation technique to allow the model to classify the crop before the end of the season, which works surprisingly well in a multimodal setting.
abstract_zh: 准确、详细、及时的作物类型测绘对于机构来说是非常有价值的信息，可以根据公民的需求制定更准确的政策。在过去的十年中，可用数据的数量急剧增加，无论是来自遥感（使用哥白尼哨兵二号数据）还是直接来自农民（提供历年来的实地作物信息和作物轮作信息）。然而，大多数研究仅限于使用一种模式（遥感数据或作物轮作），并且从未将地球观测数据与作物轮作等领域知识融合。而且，他们在使用地球观测数据时，主要局限于一年的数据，没有考虑到过去几年的数据。在这种情况下，我们建议使用三种数据类型来解决土地利用和作物类型分类任务，通过使用分层深度学习算法对作物轮作进行建模（如语言模型）、卫星信号（如语音信号）并使用作物分布作为附加上下文向量。与具有显着性能的经典方法相比，我们获得了非常有希望的结果，仅使用专家选择的一组兴趣作物，在 28 类设置中将准确度提高了 5.1 点 (0.948)，在 10 类设置中将 micro-F1 提高了 9.6 点 (0.887)。我们最终提出了一种数据增强技术，允许模型在季节结束之前对作物进行分类，该技术在多模式环境中效果出奇地好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合多光谱卫星时间序列数据、农民作物轮作信息及本地作物分布的多模态作物类型分类方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多局限于单一数据模态且未利用历史数据，导致作物分类精度不足，需整合多源数据提升分类效果。
AI.method: 采用分层深度学习算法，将作物轮作建模为语言模型，卫星信号视为语音信号，结合本地作物分布作为上下文向量，并提出数据增强技术实现季中分类。
AI.result: 在专家选定的作物集合上，28类场景准确率提升5.1个百分点（达94.8%），10类场景微F1分数提升9.6个百分点（达88.7%），数据增强技术显著提升季中分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据融合与分层模型有效提升作物分类精度，数据增强技术为季中作物识别提供可行方案，验证了跨模态信息整合的潜力。

title: Automatic Calibration of a Six-Degrees-of-Freedom Pose Estimation System
title_zh: 六自由度姿态估计系统的自动校准
comment: ef:IEEE Sensors Journal ( Volume: 19, Issue: 19, 01 October 2019)
comments: ef:IEEE Sensors Journal ( Volume: 19, Issue: 19, 01 October 2019)
abstract: Systems for estimating the six-degrees-of-freedom human body pose have been improving for over two decades. Technologies such as motion capture cameras, advanced gaming peripherals and more recently both deep learning techniques and virtual reality systems have shown impressive results. However, most systems that provide high accuracy and high precision are expensive and not easy to operate. Recently, research has been carried out to estimate the human body pose using the HTC Vive virtual reality system. This system shows accurate results while keeping the cost under a 1000 USD. This system uses an optical approach. Two transmitter devices emit infrared pulses and laser planes are tracked by use of photo diodes on receiver hardware. A system using these transmitter devices combined with low-cost custom-made receiver hardware was developed previously but requires manual measurement of the position and orientation of the transmitter devices. These manual measurements can be time consuming, prone to error and not possible in particular setups. We propose an algorithm to automatically calibrate the poses of the transmitter devices in any chosen environment with custom receiver/calibration hardware. Results show that the calibration works in a variety of setups while being more accurate than what manual measurements would allow. Furthermore, the calibration movement and speed has no noticeable influence on the precision of the results.
summary: Systems for estimating the six-degrees-of-freedom human body pose have been improving for over two decades. Technologies such as motion capture cameras, advanced gaming peripherals and more recently both deep learning techniques and virtual reality systems have shown impressive results. A system using these transmitter devices combined with low-cost custom-made receiver hardware was developed previously but requires manual measurement of the position and orientation of the transmitter devices. These manual measurements can be time consuming, prone to error and not possible in particular setups. We propose an algorithm to automatically calibrate the poses of the transmitter devices in any chosen environment with custom receiver/calibration hardware. Results show that the calibration works in a variety of setups while being more accurate than what manual measurements would allow. Furthermore, the calibration movement and speed has no noticeable influence on the precision of the results.
abstract_zh: 二十多年来，用于估计六自由度人体姿势的系统一直在不断改进。动作捕捉相机、先进游戏外设以及最近的深度学习技术和虚拟现实系统等技术都显示出令人印象深刻的成果。然而，大多数提供高精度和高精度的系统价格昂贵且不易操作。最近，有人进行了利用 HTC Vive 虚拟现实系统估计人体姿势的研究。该系统显示准确的结果，同时将成本保持在 1000 美元以下。该系统使用光学方法。两个发射器设备发射红外脉冲，并且通过使用接收器硬件上的光电二极管来跟踪激光平面。之前开发了一种使用这些发射器设备与低成本定制接收器硬件相结合的系统，但需要手动测量发射器设备的位置和方向。这些手动测量可能非常耗时、容易出错并且在特定设置中是不可能的。我们提出了一种算法，可以使用自定义接收器/校准硬件在任何选定的环境中自动校准发射器设备的姿态。结果表明，校准可以在各种设置下工作，同时比手动测量更准确。此外，校准运动和速度对结果的精度没有明显影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自动校准六自由度人体姿态估计系统的算法，以替代传统手动校准方法。
AI.motivation: 现有高精度姿态估计系统成本高且操作复杂，而基于HTC Vive的低成本系统仍需耗时且易出错的手动校准，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 开发了一种结合定制接收硬件的自动校准算法，通过光学追踪技术（红外脉冲与光电二极管）自动计算发射器的位置和方向参数。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在多种场景下均有效，校准精度优于手动方法，且校准过程的速度和动作对结果无明显影响。
AI.conclusion: 自动校准算法显著提升了系统的易用性和精度，为低成本六自由度姿态估计提供了可行方案。

title: Real-Time Sonar Fusion for Layered Navigation Controller
title_zh: 分层导航控制器的实时声纳融合
abstract: Navigation in varied and dynamic indoor environments remains a complex task for autonomous mobile platforms. Especially when conditions worsen, typical sensor modalities may fail to operate optimally and subsequently provide inapt input for safe navigation control. In this study, we present an approach for the navigation of a dynamic indoor environment with a mobile platform with a single or several sonar sensors using a layered control system. These sensors can operate in conditions such as rain, fog, dust, or dirt. The different control layers, such as collision avoidance and corridor following behavior, are activated based on acoustic flow queues in the fusion of the sonar images. The novelty of this work is allowing these sensors to be freely positioned on the mobile platform and providing the framework for designing the optimal navigational outcome based on a zoning system around the mobile platform. Presented in this paper is the acoustic flow model used, as well as the design of the layered controller. Next to validation in simulation, an implementation is presented and validated in a real office environment using a real mobile platform with one, two, or three sonar sensors in real time with 2D navigation. Multiple sensor layouts were validated in both the simulation and real experiments to demonstrate that the modular approach for the controller and sensor fusion works optimally. The results of this work show stable and safe navigation of indoor environments with dynamic objects.
summary: Navigation in varied and dynamic indoor environments remains a complex task for autonomous mobile platforms. Especially when conditions worsen, typical sensor modalities may fail to operate optimally and subsequently provide inapt input for safe navigation control. In this study, we present an approach for the navigation of a dynamic indoor environment with a mobile platform with a single or several sonar sensors using a layered control system. These sensors can operate in conditions such as rain, fog, dust, or dirt. The different control layers, such as collision avoidance and corridor following behavior, are activated based on acoustic flow queues in the fusion of the sonar images. The novelty of this work is allowing these sensors to be freely positioned on the mobile platform and providing the framework for designing the optimal navigational outcome based on a zoning system around the mobile platform. Presented in this paper is the acoustic flow model used, as well as the design of the layered controller. Next to validation in simulation, an implementation is presented and validated in a real office environment using a real mobile platform with one, two, or three sonar sensors in real time with 2D navigation. Multiple sensor layouts were validated in both the simulation and real experiments to demonstrate that the modular approach for the controller and sensor fusion works optimally. The results of this work show stable and safe navigation of indoor environments with dynamic objects.
abstract_zh: 对于自主移动平台来说，在各种动态的室内环境中进行导航仍然是一项复杂的任务。特别是当情况恶化时，典型的传感器模式可能无法最佳运行，从而为安全导航控制提供不恰当的输入。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种使用分层控制系统通过带有单个或多个声纳传感器的移动平台来导航动态室内环境的方法。这些传感器可以在雨、雾、灰尘或污垢等条件下运行。不同的控制层，例如防撞和走廊跟踪行为，是根据声纳图像融合中的声流队列激活的。这项工作的新颖之处在于允许这些传感器自由放置在移动平台上，并提供基于移动平台周围分区系统设计最佳导航结果的框架。本文介绍了所使用的声流模型以及分层控制器的设计。除了模拟验证之外，还使用带有一个、两个或三个声纳传感器的真实移动平台在真实办公环境中通过 2D 导航实时呈现和验证实施方案。在模拟和实际实验中验证了多个传感器布局，以证明控制器和传感器融合的模块化方法能够以最佳方式工作。这项工作的结果显示了具有动态物体的室内环境的稳定和安全导航。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单个或多个声纳传感器的分层导航控制器，用于在动态室内环境中实现自主移动平台的安全导航。
AI.motivation: 传统传感器在恶劣环境（如雨、雾、灰尘）下可能失效，需开发一种能在复杂动态条件下稳定工作的导航系统。
AI.method: 设计分层控制架构，结合声纳图像的声学流队列实现避障与走廊跟随行为，并通过分区系统优化导航决策，通过仿真与真实办公室环境验证多传感器布局的模块化方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在动态障碍物环境中实现了稳定安全的导航，且不同传感器配置均验证了控制器与融合算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 声纳融合的分层控制框架为复杂室内环境下的自主导航提供了可靠解决方案，具有良好的适应性与实时性。

authors_text: Hongcheng Guo,Yuhui Guo,Renjie Chen,Jian Yang,Jiaheng Liu,Zhoujun Li,Tieqiao Zheng,Weichao Hou,Liangfan Zheng,Bo Zhang
title: LogLG: Weakly Supervised Log Anomaly Detection via Log-Event Graph Construction
title_zh: LogLG：通过日志事件图构建进行弱监督日志异常检测
abstract: Fully supervised log anomaly detection methods suffer the heavy burden of annotating massive unlabeled log data. Recently, many semi-supervised methods have been proposed to reduce annotation costs with the help of parsed templates. However, these methods consider each keyword independently, which disregards the correlation between keywords and the contextual relationships among log sequences. In this paper, we propose a novel weakly supervised log anomaly detection framework, named LogLG, to explore the semantic connections among keywords from sequences. Specifically, we design an end-to-end iterative process, where the keywords of unlabeled logs are first extracted to construct a log-event graph. Then, we build a subgraph annotator to generate pseudo labels for unlabeled log sequences. To ameliorate the annotation quality, we adopt a self-supervised task to pre-train a subgraph annotator. After that, a detection model is trained with the generated pseudo labels. Conditioned on the classification results, we re-extract the keywords from the log sequences and update the log-event graph for the next iteration. Experiments on five benchmarks validate the effectiveness of LogLG for detecting anomalies on unlabeled log data and demonstrate that LogLG, as the state-of-the-art weakly supervised method, achieves significant performance improvements compared to existing methods.

Then, we build a subgraph annotator to generate pseudo labels for unlabeled log sequences. To ameliorate the annotation quality, we adopt a self-supervised task to pre-train a subgraph annotator. After that, a detection model is trained with the generated pseudo labels. abstract_zh: 完全监督的日志异常检测方法承受着注释大量未标记日志数据的沉重负担。最近，人们提出了许多半监督方法来借助解析模板来降低注释成本。然而，这些方法独立地考虑每个关键字，忽略了关键字之间的相关性以及日志序列之间的上下文关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的弱监督日志异常检测框架，名为 LogLG，以探索序列中关键字之间的语义连接。具体来说，我们设计了一个端到端的迭代过程，其中首先提取未标记日志的关键字以构建日志事件图。然后，我们构建一个子图注释器来为未标记的日志序列生成伪标签。为了提高注释质量，我们采用自监督任务来预训练子图注释器。之后，使用生成的伪标签训练检测模型。根据分类结果，我们从日志序列中重新提取关键字，并更新下一次迭代的日志事件图。五个基准测试的实验验证了 LogLG 在检测未标记日志数据异常方面的有效性，并证明 LogLG 作为最先进的弱监督方法，与现有方法相比，实现了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督日志异常检测框架LogLG，通过构建日志事件图来探索序列中关键词的语义关联，以减少对大量标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有全监督方法需大量标注数据，半监督方法未充分考虑关键词间关联及上下文关系，导致标注成本高且效果有限。
AI.method: 设计端到端迭代流程：从无标签日志中提取关键词构建日志事件图，利用子图标注器生成伪标签，并通过自监督任务预训练标注器，最后迭代更新图结构与检测模型。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上验证了LogLG的有效性，相比现有方法在无标签日志异常检测中性能显著提升，成为最先进的弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: LogLG通过语义关联建模和迭代优化，有效解决了弱监督日志异常检测中标签稀缺与上下文关系建模不足的问题。

authors_text: Ahmet Kerem Aksoy,Pavel Dushev,Eleni Tzirita Zacharatou,Holmer Hemsen,Marcela Charfuelan,Jorge-Arnulfo Quiané-Ruiz,Begüm Demir,Volker Markl
title: Satellite Image Search in AgoraEO
title_zh: AgoraEO 中的卫星图像搜索
abstract: The growing operational capability of global Earth Observation (EO) creates new opportunities for data-driven approaches to understand and protect our planet. However, the current use of EO archives is very restricted due to the huge archive sizes and the limited exploration capabilities provided by EO platforms. To address this limitation, we have recently proposed MiLaN, a content-based image retrieval approach for fast similarity search in satellite image archives. MiLaN is a deep hashing network based on metric learning that encodes high-dimensional image features into compact binary hash codes. We use these codes as keys in a hash table to enable real-time nearest neighbor search and highly accurate retrieval. In this demonstration, we showcase the efficiency of MiLaN by integrating it with EarthQube, a browser and search engine within AgoraEO. EarthQube supports interactive visual exploration and Query-by-Example over satellite image repositories. Demo visitors will interact with EarthQube playing the role of different users that search images in a large-scale remote sensing archive by their semantic content and apply other filters.
summary: The growing operational capability of global Earth Observation (EO) creates new opportunities for data-driven approaches to understand and protect our planet. However, the current use of EO archives is very restricted due to the huge archive sizes and the limited exploration capabilities provided by EO platforms. To address this limitation, we have recently proposed MiLaN, a content-based image retrieval approach for fast similarity search in satellite image archives. MiLaN is a deep hashing network based on metric learning that encodes high-dimensional image features into compact binary hash codes. We use these codes as keys in a hash table to enable real-time nearest neighbor search and highly accurate retrieval. In this demonstration, we showcase the efficiency of MiLaN by integrating it with EarthQube, a browser and search engine within AgoraEO. EarthQube supports interactive visual exploration and Query-by-Example over satellite image repositories. Demo visitors will interact with EarthQube playing the role of different users that search images in a large-scale remote sensing archive by their semantic content and apply other filters.
abstract_zh: 全球地球观测 (EO) 不断增长的业务能力为数据驱动的方法了解和保护我们的星球创造了新的机会。然而，由于档案规模庞大且EO平台提供的探索能力有限，目前EO档案的使用受到很大限制。为了解决这个限制，我们最近提出了 MiLaN，一种基于内容的图像检索方法，用于在卫星图像档案中进行快速相似性搜索。 MiLaN 是一个基于度量学习的深度哈希网络，将高维图像特征编码为紧凑的二进制哈希码。我们使用这些代码作为哈希表中的键，以实现实时最近邻搜索和高度准确的检索。在本次演示中，我们通过将 MiLaN 与 AgoraEO 中的浏览器和搜索引擎 EarthQube 集成来展示 MiLaN 的效率。 EarthQube 支持卫星图像存储库的交互式视觉探索和示例查询。演示参观者将与 EarthQube 进行交互，扮演不同用户的角色，通过语义内容在大规模遥感档案中搜索图像并应用其他过滤器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度哈希网络的卫星图像检索方法MiLaN，并集成到AgoraEO平台的EarthQube中，解决大规模遥感图像档案的高效搜索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有地球观测档案因数据量庞大且平台探索能力有限，导致用户难以高效检索所需卫星图像。
AI.method: 设计基于度量学习的深度哈希网络MiLaN，将高维图像特征转化为二进制哈希码，利用哈希表实现快速近邻搜索，并与EarthQube浏览器集成支持交互式查询。
AI.result: 通过演示验证MiLaN在EarthQube中可实现实时、高精度的卫星图像检索，用户可基于语义内容和筛选条件快速定位目标图像。
AI.conclusion: MiLaN有效提升了大规模遥感图像档案的检索效率，为地球观测数据的探索提供了可行的技术方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度哈希网络的卫星图像检索方法MiLaN，并集成到AgoraEO平台的EarthQube中，解决大规模遥感图像档案的高效搜索问题。

title: Adaptive Acoustic Flow-Based Navigation with 3D Sonar Sensor Fusion
title_zh: 具有 3D 声纳传感器融合的自适应声学流导航
comment: 2021 International Conference on Indoor Positioning and Indoor Navigation (IPIN)
comments: 2021 International Conference on Indoor Positioning and Indoor Navigation (IPIN)
abstract: Navigating spatially varied and dynamic environments is one of the key tasks for autonomous agents. In this paper we present a novel method of navigating a mobile platform with one or multiple 3D-sonar sensors. Moving a mobile platform and subsequently any 3D-sonar sensor on it, will create signature variations over time of the echoed reflections in the sensor readings. An approach is presented to create a predictive model of these signature variations for any motion type. Furthermore, the model is adaptive and works for any position and orientation of one or multiple sonar sensors on a mobile platform. We propose to use this adaptive model and fuse all sensory readings to create a layered control system allowing a mobile platform to perform a set of primitive motions such as collision avoidance, obstacle avoidance, wall following and corridor following behaviours to navigate an environment with dynamically moving objects within it. This paper describes the underlying theoretical base of the entire navigation model and validates it in a simulated environment with results that shows the system is stable and delivers expected behaviour for several tested spatial configurations of one or multiple sonar sensors that can complete an autonomous navigation task.

We propose to use this adaptive model and fuse all sensory readings to create a layered control system allowing a mobile platform to perform a set of primitive motions such as collision avoidance, obstacle avoidance, wall following and corridor following behaviours to navigate an environment with dynamically moving objects within it. This paper describes the underlying theoretical base of the entire navigation model and validates it in a simulated environment with results that shows the system is stable and delivers expected behaviour for several tested spatial configurations of one or multiple sonar sensors that can complete an autonomous navigation task.
abstract_zh: 导航空间变化和动态环境是自主代理的关键任务之一。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用一个或多个 3D 声纳传感器导航移动平台的新颖方法。移动移动平台以及随后移动其上的任何 3D 声纳传感器，将在传感器读数中的回声反射中产生随时间变化的特征。提出了一种方法来创建任何运动类型的这些特征变化的预测模型。此外，该模型是自适应的，适用于移动平台上一个或多个声纳传感器的任何位置和方向。我们建议使用这种自适应模型并融合所有感官读数来创建一个分层控制系统，允许移动平台执行一组原始运动，例如避免碰撞、避障、墙壁跟随和走廊跟随行为，以在其中动态移动物体的环境中导航。本文描述了整个导航模型的基础理论基础，并在模拟环境中对其进行了验证，结果表明系统稳定，并为一个或多个声纳传感器的多个测试空间配置提供了预期的行为，可以完成自主导航任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应声学流和3D声纳传感器融合的移动平台导航方法，用于在动态环境中实现自主导航。
AI.motivation: 自主代理在空间复杂且动态变化的环境中导航是关键挑战，现有方法难以适应多传感器配置和动态障碍物。
AI.method: 构建自适应预测模型以模拟声纳反射特征随运动的变化，并通过传感器融合实现避障、沿墙/走廊移动等分层控制行为。
AI.result: 仿真验证表明系统在多种传感器布局下稳定运行，能完成自主导航任务并表现出预期行为。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为动态环境下的多传感器自主导航提供了理论基础和有效解决方案。
