search_text: Adaptive Acoustic Flow-Based Navigation with 3D Sonar Sensor Fusion 具有 3D 声纳传感器融合的自适应声学流导航 Navigating spatially varied and dynamic environments is one of the key tasks for autonomous agents. In this paper we present a novel method of navigating a mobile platform with one or multiple 3D-sonar sensors. Moving a mobile platform and subsequently any 3D-sonar sensor on it, will create signature variations over time of the echoed reflections in the sensor readings. An approach is presented to create a predictive model of these signature variations for any motion type. Furthermore, the model is adaptive and works for any position and orientation of one or multiple sonar sensors on a mobile platform. We propose to use this adaptive model and fuse all sensory readings to create a layered control system allowing a mobile platform to perform a set of primitive motions such as collision avoidance, obstacle avoidance, wall following and corridor following behaviours to navigate an environment with dynamically moving objects within it. This paper describes the underlying theoretical base of the entire navigation model and validates it in a simulated environment with results that shows the system is stable and delivers expected behaviour for several tested spatial configurations of one or multiple sonar sensors that can complete an autonomous navigation task. 导航空间变化和动态环境是自主代理的关键任务之一。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用一个或多个 3D 声纳传感器导航移动平台的新颖方法。移动移动平台以及随后移动其上的任何 3D 声纳传感器，将在传感器读数中的回声反射中产生随时间变化的特征。提出了一种方法来创建任何运动类型的这些特征变化的预测模型。此外，该模型是自适应的，适用于移动平台上一个或多个声纳传感器的任何位置和方向。我们建议使用这种自适应模型并融合所有感官读数来创建一个分层控制系统，允许移动平台执行一组原始运动，例如避免碰撞、避障、墙壁跟随和走廊跟随行为，以在其中动态移动物体的环境中导航。本文描述了整个导航模型的基础理论基础，并在模拟环境中对其进行了验证，结果表明系统稳定，并为一个或多个声纳传感器的多个测试空间配置提供了预期的行为，可以完成自主导航任务。 本文提出了一种基于自适应声学流和3D声纳传感器融合的移动平台导航方法，用于在动态环境中实现自主导航。 Wouter Jansen,Dennis Laurijssen,Jan Steckel cs.RO

title: Multimodal Across Domains Gaze Target Detection
title_zh: 跨域多模态注视目标检测
comment: Accepted to 24th ACM International Conference on Multimodal Interaction (ICMI 2022)
comments: Accepted to 24th ACM International Conference on Multimodal Interaction (ICMI 2022)
abstract: This paper addresses the gaze target detection problem in single images captured from the third-person perspective. We present a multimodal deep architecture to infer where a person in a scene is looking. This spatial model is trained on the head images of the person-of- interest, scene and depth maps representing rich context information. Our model, unlike several prior art, do not require supervision of the gaze angles, do not rely on head orientation information and/or location of the eyes of person-of-interest. Extensive experiments demonstrate the stronger performance of our method on multiple benchmark datasets. We also investigated several variations of our method by altering joint-learning of multimodal data. Some variations outperform a few prior art as well. First time in this paper, we inspect domain adaption for gaze target detection, and we empower our multimodal network to effectively handle the domain gap across datasets. The code of the proposed method is available at https://github.com/francescotonini/multimodal-across-domains-gaze-target-detection.
summary: This paper addresses the gaze target detection problem in single images captured from the third-person perspective. We present a multimodal deep architecture to infer where a person in a scene is looking. This spatial model is trained on the head images of the person-of- interest, scene and depth maps representing rich context information. Our model, unlike several prior art, do not require supervision of the gaze angles, do not rely on head orientation information and/or location of the eyes of person-of-interest. Extensive experiments demonstrate the stronger performance of our method on multiple benchmark datasets. We also investigated several variations of our method by altering joint-learning of multimodal data. Some variations outperform a few prior art as well. First time in this paper, we inspect domain adaption for gaze target detection, and we empower our multimodal network to effectively handle the domain gap across datasets. The code of the proposed method is available at https://github.com/francescotonini/multimodal-across-domains-gaze-target-detection.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了从第三人称视角捕获的单个图像中的注视目标检测问题。我们提出了一种多模式深度架构来推断场景中的人正在看哪里。该空间模型是在感兴趣的人的头部图像、代表丰富上下文信息的场景和深度图上进行训练的。与几种现有技术不同，我们的模型不需要注视角度的监督，不依赖于头部方向信息和/或感兴趣的人的眼睛的位置。大量的实验证明我们的方法在多个基准数据集上具有更强的性能。我们还通过改变多模态数据的联合学习来研究我们方法的几种变体。一些变体也优于一些现有技术。在本文中，我们第一次检查凝视目标检测的领域适应，并且使我们的多模态网络能够有效处理跨数据集的领域差距。该方法的代码可在 https://github.com/francescotonini/multimodal-across-domains-gaze-target-detection 获取。

AI.tldr: 从第三人称视角单图像中检测注视目标
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖于注视角度、头部方向等监督信息，本文旨在提出无需这些信息的更鲁棒的检测方法
AI.method: 采用多模态深度网络，结合人物图像、场景和深度图，通过联合学习和跨领域适应处理不同数据集的差异
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法，部分变体超越了先前技术，首次应用领域适应提升跨数据集性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在无需监督信息的情况下有效，跨领域适应增强泛化能力，代码已开源

authors_text: Daniel Franzen,Saskia Nuñez von Voigt,Peter Sörries,Florian Tschorsch,Claudia Müller-Birn
title: "Am I Private and If So, how Many?" - Communicating Privacy Guarantees of Differential Privacy with Risk Communication Formats
title_zh: “我是私人的吗？如果是，有多少？” - 通过风险沟通格式传达差异隐私的隐私保证
comment: Accepted to ACM CCS 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.04061
comments: Accepted to ACM CCS 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.04061
abstract: Decisions about sharing personal information are not trivial, since there are many legitimate and important purposes for such data collection, but often the collected data can reveal sensitive information about individuals. Privacy-preserving technologies, such as differential privacy (DP), can be employed to protect the privacy of individuals and, furthermore, provide mathematically sound guarantees on the maximum privacy risk. However, they can only support informed privacy decisions, if individuals understand the provided privacy guarantees. This article proposes a novel approach for communicating privacy guarantees to support individuals in their privacy decisions when sharing data. For this, we adopt risk communication formats from the medical domain in conjunction with a model for privacy guarantees of DP to create quantitative privacy risk notifications. We conducted a crowd-sourced study with 343 participants to evaluate how well our notifications conveyed the privacy risk information and how confident participants were about their own understanding of the privacy risk. Our findings suggest that these new notifications can communicate the objective information similarly well to currently used qualitative notifications, but left individuals less confident in their understanding. We also discovered that several of our notifications and the currently used qualitative notification disadvantage individuals with low numeracy: these individuals appear overconfident compared to their actual understanding of the associated privacy risks and are, therefore, less likely to seek the needed additional information before an informed decision. The promising results allow for multiple directions in future research, for example, adding visual aids or tailoring privacy risk communication to characteristics of the individuals.
summary: Decisions about sharing personal information are not trivial, since there are many legitimate and important purposes for such data collection, but often the collected data can reveal sensitive information about individuals. Privacy-preserving technologies, such as differential privacy (DP), can be employed to protect the privacy of individuals and, furthermore, provide mathematically sound guarantees on the maximum privacy risk. However, they can only support informed privacy decisions, if individuals understand the provided privacy guarantees. This article proposes a novel approach for communicating privacy guarantees to support individuals in their privacy decisions when sharing data. For this, we adopt risk communication formats from the medical domain in conjunction with a model for privacy guarantees of DP to create quantitative privacy risk notifications. We conducted a crowd-sourced study with 343 participants to evaluate how well our notifications conveyed the privacy risk information and how confident participants were about their own understanding of the privacy risk. Our findings suggest that these new notifications can communicate the objective information similarly well to currently used qualitative notifications, but left individuals less confident in their understanding. We also discovered that several of our notifications and the currently used qualitative notification disadvantage individuals with low numeracy: these individuals appear overconfident compared to their actual understanding of the associated privacy risks and are, therefore, less likely to seek the needed additional information before an informed decision. The promising results allow for multiple directions in future research, for example, adding visual aids or tailoring privacy risk communication to characteristics of the individuals.
abstract_zh: 关于共享个人信息的决定并非微不足道，因为此类数据收集有许多合法且重要的目的，但收集的数据通常可能会泄露有关个人的敏感信息。隐私保护技术，例如差分隐私（DP），可以用来保护个人的隐私，此外，还可以为最大隐私风险提供数学上可靠的保证。然而，只有当个人理解所提供的隐私保证时，他们才能支持知情的隐私决策。本文提出了一种传达隐私保证的新颖方法，以支持个人在共享数据时做出隐私决策。为此，我们采用医疗领域的风险沟通格式，结合DP的隐私保障模型，创建量化的隐私风险通知。我们对 343 名参与者进行了一项众包研究，以评估我们的通知传达隐私风险信息的效果以及参与者对自己对隐私风险的理解的信心程度。我们的研究结果表明，这些新通知可以与当前使用的定性通知类似地传达客观信息，但使个人对自己的理解缺乏信心。我们还发现，我们的一些通知和当前使用的定性通知对计算能力较低的个人不利：与他们对相关隐私风险的实际理解相比，这些人显得过于自信，因此在做出明智的决定之前不太可能寻求所需的额外信息。这些有希望的结果为未来的研究提供了多个方向，例如，添加视觉辅助工具或根据个人特征定制隐私风险沟通。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合医疗风险沟通格式与差分隐私模型的新型隐私风险通知方法，旨在帮助用户更清晰理解数据共享的隐私风险。
AI.motivation: 尽管差分隐私技术能提供数学化的隐私保障，但用户往往难以理解相关风险，导致无法基于充分信息做出隐私决策。
AI.method: 采用医疗领域风险沟通框架设计定量隐私风险通知，结合差分隐私理论模型，并通过343人参与的众包研究评估其信息传达效果与用户理解自信度。
AI.result: 定量通知与现有定性通知在信息传达效果相当，但用户理解自信度更低；低数理能力者易出现理解自信与实际认知不匹配现象。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为隐私风险沟通提供新方向，未来可探索增加可视化辅助或个性化适配以提升用户理解效果。

tldr: 本文提出一种结合医疗风险沟通格式与差分隐私模型的新型隐私风险通知方法，旨在帮助用户更清晰理解数据共享的隐私风险。
motivation: 尽管差分隐私技术能提供数学化的隐私保障，但用户往往难以理解相关风险，导致无法基于充分信息做出隐私决策。
method: 采用医疗领域风险沟通框架设计定量隐私风险通知，结合差分隐私理论模型，并通过343人参与的众包研究评估其信息传达效果与用户理解自信度。
result: 定量通知与现有定性通知在信息传达效果相当，但用户理解自信度更低；低数理能力者易出现理解自信与实际认知不匹配现象。
conclusion: 该方法为隐私风险沟通提供新方向，未来可探索增加可视化辅助或个性化适配以提升用户理解效果。
search_text: "Am I Private and If So, how Many?" - Communicating Privacy Guarantees of Differential Privacy with Risk Communication Formats “我是私人的吗？如果是，有多少？” - 通过风险沟通格式传达差异隐私的隐私保证 Decisions about sharing personal information are not trivial, since there are many legitimate and important purposes for such data collection, but often the collected data can reveal sensitive information about individuals. Privacy-preserving technologies, such as differential privacy (DP), can be employed to protect the privacy of individuals and, furthermore, provide mathematically sound guarantees on the maximum privacy risk. However, they can only support informed privacy decisions, if individuals understand the provided privacy guarantees. This article proposes a novel approach for communicating privacy guarantees to support individuals in their privacy decisions when sharing data. For this, we adopt risk communication formats from the medical domain in conjunction with a model for privacy guarantees of DP to create quantitative privacy risk notifications. We conducted a crowd-sourced study with 343 participants to evaluate how well our notifications conveyed the privacy risk information and how confident participants were about their own understanding of the privacy risk. Our findings suggest that these new notifications can communicate the objective information similarly well to currently used qualitative notifications, but left individuals less confident in their understanding. We also discovered that several of our notifications and the currently used qualitative notification disadvantage individuals with low numeracy: these individuals appear overconfident compared to their actual understanding of the associated privacy risks and are, therefore, less likely to seek the needed additional information before an informed decision. The promising results allow for multiple directions in future research, for example, adding visual aids or tailoring privacy risk communication to characteristics of the individuals. 关于共享个人信息的决定并非微不足道，因为此类数据收集有许多合法且重要的目的，但收集的数据通常可能会泄露有关个人的敏感信息。隐私保护技术，例如差分隐私（DP），可以用来保护个人的隐私，此外，还可以为最大隐私风险提供数学上可靠的保证。然而，只有当个人理解所提供的隐私保证时，他们才能支持知情的隐私决策。本文提出了一种传达隐私保证的新颖方法，以支持个人在共享数据时做出隐私决策。为此，我们采用医疗领域的风险沟通格式，结合DP的隐私保障模型，创建量化的隐私风险通知。我们对 343 名参与者进行了一项众包研究，以评估我们的通知传达隐私风险信息的效果以及参与者对自己对隐私风险的理解的信心程度。我们的研究结果表明，这些新通知可以与当前使用的定性通知类似地传达客观信息，但使个人对自己的理解缺乏信心。我们还发现，我们的一些通知和当前使用的定性通知对计算能力较低的个人不利：与他们对相关隐私风险的实际理解相比，这些人显得过于自信，因此在做出明智的决定之前不太可能寻求所需的额外信息。这些有希望的结果为未来的研究提供了多个方向，例如，添加视觉辅助工具或根据个人特征定制隐私风险沟通。 本文提出一种结合医疗风险沟通格式与差分隐私模型的新型隐私风险通知方法，旨在帮助用户更清晰理解数据共享的隐私风险。 Daniel Franzen,Saskia Nuñez von Voigt,Peter Sörries,Florian Tschorsch,Claudia Müller-Birn cs.HC,cs.CR

authors_text: Hui Li,Zidong Guo,Seon-Min Rhee,Seungju Han,Jae-Joon Han
title: Towards Accurate Facial Landmark Detection via Cascaded Transformers
title_zh: 通过级联变压器实现准确的面部标志检测
abstract: Accurate facial landmarks are essential prerequisites for many tasks related to human faces. In this paper, an accurate facial landmark detector is proposed based on cascaded transformers. We formulate facial landmark detection as a coordinate regression task such that the model can be trained end-to-end. With self-attention in transformers, our model can inherently exploit the structured relationships between landmarks, which would benefit landmark detection under challenging conditions such as large pose and occlusion. During cascaded refinement, our model is able to extract the most relevant image features around the target landmark for coordinate prediction, based on deformable attention mechanism, thus bringing more accurate alignment. In addition, we propose a novel decoder that refines image features and landmark positions simultaneously. With few parameter increasing, the detection performance improves further. Our model achieves new state-of-the-art performance on several standard facial landmark detection benchmarks, and shows good generalization ability in cross-dataset evaluation.
summary: Accurate facial landmarks are essential prerequisites for many tasks related to human faces. In this paper, an accurate facial landmark detector is proposed based on cascaded transformers. We formulate facial landmark detection as a coordinate regression task such that the model can be trained end-to-end. With self-attention in transformers, our model can inherently exploit the structured relationships between landmarks, which would benefit landmark detection under challenging conditions such as large pose and occlusion. During cascaded refinement, our model is able to extract the most relevant image features around the target landmark for coordinate prediction, based on deformable attention mechanism, thus bringing more accurate alignment. In addition, we propose a novel decoder that refines image features and landmark positions simultaneously. With few parameter increasing, the detection performance improves further. Our model achieves new state-of-the-art performance on several standard facial landmark detection benchmarks, and shows good generalization ability in cross-dataset evaluation.
abstract_zh: 准确的面部标志是许多与人脸相关的任务的必要先决条件。本文提出了一种基于级联变压器的精确面部标志检测器。我们将面部标志检测制定为坐标回归任务，以便可以端到端地训练模型。通过 Transformer 中的自注意力，我们的模型可以本质上利用地标之间的结构化关系，这将有利于在大姿势和遮挡等具有挑战性的条件下进行地标检测。在级联细化过程中，我们的模型能够基于可变形注意机制提取目标地标周围最相关的图像特征进行坐标预测，从而带来更准确的对齐。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的解码器，可以同时细化图像特征和地标位置。随着参数的增加，检测性能进一步提高。我们的模型在几个标准面部标志检测基准上实现了新的最先进的性能，并在跨数据集评估中表现出良好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于级联变压器的精确面部关键点检测方法，通过坐标回归和特征优化提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统面部关键点检测方法在复杂场景（如大角度姿态或遮挡）下表现不足，需探索更有效的特征建模与优化策略。
AI.method: 采用级联变压器架构，结合自注意力机制捕捉关键点间结构关系，并通过可变形注意力机制提取目标区域特征，同时设计联合优化解码器。
AI.result: 在多个标准数据集上达到新SOTA性能，且在跨数据集测试中展现良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 级联变压器框架通过分阶段特征优化和联合解码有效提升了关键点检测精度，为复杂场景下的面部分析提供了新思路。

title: Time-lapse image classification using a diffractive neural network
title_zh: 使用衍射神经网络进行延时图像分类
abstract: Diffractive deep neural networks (D2NNs) define an all-optical computing framework comprised of spatially engineered passive surfaces that collectively process optical input information by modulating the amplitude and/or the phase of the propagating light. Diffractive optical networks complete their computational tasks at the speed of light propagation through a thin diffractive volume, without any external computing power while exploiting the massive parallelism of optics. Diffractive networks were demonstrated to achieve all-optical classification of objects and perform universal linear transformations. Here we demonstrate, for the first time, a "time-lapse" image classification scheme using a diffractive network, significantly advancing its classification accuracy and generalization performance on complex input objects by using the lateral movements of the input objects and/or the diffractive network, relative to each other. In a different context, such relative movements of the objects and/or the camera are routinely being used for image super-resolution applications; inspired by their success, we designed a time-lapse diffractive network to benefit from the complementary information content created by controlled or random lateral shifts. We numerically explored the design space and performance limits of time-lapse diffractive networks, revealing a blind testing accuracy of 62.03% on the optical classification of objects from the CIFAR-10 dataset. This constitutes the highest inference accuracy achieved so far using a single diffractive network on the CIFAR-10 dataset. Time-lapse diffractive networks will be broadly useful for the spatio-temporal analysis of input signals using all-optical processors.
summary: Diffractive deep neural networks (D2NNs) define an all-optical computing framework comprised of spatially engineered passive surfaces that collectively process optical input information by modulating the amplitude and/or the phase of the propagating light. Diffractive optical networks complete their computational tasks at the speed of light propagation through a thin diffractive volume, without any external computing power while exploiting the massive parallelism of optics. Diffractive networks were demonstrated to achieve all-optical classification of objects and perform universal linear transformations. Here we demonstrate, for the first time, a "time-lapse" image classification scheme using a diffractive network, significantly advancing its classification accuracy and generalization performance on complex input objects by using the lateral movements of the input objects and/or the diffractive network, relative to each other. In a different context, such relative movements of the objects and/or the camera are routinely being used for image super-resolution applications; inspired by their success, we designed a time-lapse diffractive network to benefit from the complementary information content created by controlled or random lateral shifts. We numerically explored the design space and performance limits of time-lapse diffractive networks, revealing a blind testing accuracy of 62.03% on the optical classification of objects from the CIFAR-10 dataset. This constitutes the highest inference accuracy achieved so far using a single diffractive network on the CIFAR-10 dataset. Time-lapse diffractive networks will be broadly useful for the spatio-temporal analysis of input signals using all-optical processors.
abstract_zh: 衍射深度神经网络 (D2NN) 定义了一个由空间工程无源表面组成的全光学计算框架，这些表面通过调制传播光的振幅和/或相位来共同处理光学输入信息。衍射光学网络以光传播速度通过薄衍射体积完成其计算任务，无需任何外部计算能力，同时利用光学的大规模并行性。衍射网络被证明可以实现物体的全光学分类并执行通用线性变换。在这里，我们首次演示了使用衍射网络的“延时”图像分类方案，通过使用输入对象和/或衍射网络相对于彼此的横向运动，显着提高了其对复杂输入对象的分类精度和泛化性能。在不同的背景下，物体和/或相机的这种相对运动通常用于图像超分辨率应用；受他们成功的启发，我们设计了一个延时衍射网络，以受益于受控或随机横向位移创建的补充信息内容。我们以数值方式探索了延时衍射网络的设计空间和性能限制，揭示了 CIFAR-10 数据集中物体光学分类的盲测准确率为 62.03%。这是迄今为止在 CIFAR-10 数据集上使用单个衍射网络实现的最高推理精度。延时衍射网络将广泛用于使用全光处理器对输入信号进行时空分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于衍射神经网络的时间流逝图像分类方法，通过利用输入对象与衍射网络之间的相对横向运动提升分类精度。
AI.motivation: 传统衍射神经网络在处理复杂对象时存在分类精度和泛化能力不足的问题，受图像超分辨率技术中运动信息利用的启发，提出通过时间流逝机制增强信息互补性。
AI.method: 设计时间流逝衍射网络架构，通过数值模拟探索其设计空间与性能极限，利用受控或随机横向位移生成互补信息进行光学分类。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上实现62.03%的盲测分类准确率，创下单一衍射网络在此数据集上的最高推理准确率记录。
AI.conclusion: 时间流逝衍射网络为全光处理器实现时空信号分析提供了新范式，具有广泛的应用前景。

We numerically explored the design space and performance limits of time-lapse diffractive networks, revealing a blind testing accuracy of 62.03% on the optical classification of objects from the CIFAR-10 dataset. This constitutes the highest inference accuracy achieved so far using a single diffractive network on the CIFAR-10 dataset. Time-lapse diffractive networks will be broadly useful for the spatio-temporal analysis of input signals using all-optical processors. 衍射深度神经网络 (D2NN) 定义了一个由空间工程无源表面组成的全光学计算框架，这些表面通过调制传播光的振幅和/或相位来共同处理光学输入信息。衍射光学网络以光传播速度通过薄衍射体积完成其计算任务，无需任何外部计算能力，同时利用光学的大规模并行性。衍射网络被证明可以实现物体的全光学分类并执行通用线性变换。在这里，我们首次演示了使用衍射网络的“延时”图像分类方案，通过使用输入对象和/或衍射网络相对于彼此的横向运动，显着提高了其对复杂输入对象的分类精度和泛化性能。在不同的背景下，物体和/或相机的这种相对运动通常用于图像超分辨率应用；受他们成功的启发，我们设计了一个延时衍射网络，以受益于受控或随机横向位移创建的补充信息内容。我们以数值方式探索了延时衍射网络的设计空间和性能限制，揭示了 CIFAR-10 数据集中物体光学分类的盲测准确率为 62.03%。这是迄今为止在 CIFAR-10 数据集上使用单个衍射网络实现的最高推理精度。延时衍射网络将广泛用于使用全光处理器对输入信号进行时空分析。 本文提出了一种基于衍射神经网络的时间流逝图像分类方法，通过利用输入对象与衍射网络之间的相对横向运动提升分类精度。 Md Sadman Sakib Rahman,Aydogan Ozcan physics.optics,cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Hisaichi Shibata,Shouhei Hanaoka,Yukihiro Nomura,Naoto Hayashi,Osamu Abe
title: Aging prediction using deep generative model toward the development of preventive medicine
title_zh: 使用深度生成模型进行衰老预测以促进预防医学的发展
abstract: From birth to death, we all experience surprisingly ubiquitous changes over time due to aging. If we can predict aging in the digital domain, that is, the digital twin of the human body, we would be able to detect lesions in their very early stages, thereby enhancing the quality of life and extending the life span. We observed that none of the previously developed digital twins of the adult human body explicitly trained longitudinal conversion rules between volumetric medical images with deep generative models, potentially resulting in poor prediction performance of, for example, ventricular volumes. Here, we establish a new digital twin of an adult human body that adopts longitudinally acquired head computed tomography (CT) images for training, enabling prediction of future volumetric head CT images from a single present volumetric head CT image. We, for the first time, adopt one of the three-dimensional flow-based deep generative models to realize this sequential three-dimensional digital twin. We show that our digital twin outperforms the latest methods of prediction of ventricular volumes in relatively short terms.
summary: From birth to death, we all experience surprisingly ubiquitous changes over time due to aging. If we can predict aging in the digital domain, that is, the digital twin of the human body, we would be able to detect lesions in their very early stages, thereby enhancing the quality of life and extending the life span. We observed that none of the previously developed digital twins of the adult human body explicitly trained longitudinal conversion rules between volumetric medical images with deep generative models, potentially resulting in poor prediction performance of, for example, ventricular volumes. Here, we establish a new digital twin of an adult human body that adopts longitudinally acquired head computed tomography (CT) images for training, enabling prediction of future volumetric head CT images from a single present volumetric head CT image. We, for the first time, adopt one of the three-dimensional flow-based deep generative models to realize this sequential three-dimensional digital twin. We show that our digital twin outperforms the latest methods of prediction of ventricular volumes in relatively short terms.
abstract_zh: 从出生到死亡，随着时间的推移，我们都会因衰老而经历令人惊讶的普遍变化。如果我们能够在数字领域预测衰老，即人体的数字孪生，我们就能够在早期阶段发现病变，从而提高生活质量并延长寿命。我们观察到，之前开发的成人人体数字双胞胎都没有明确训练体积医学图像与深度生成模型之间的纵向转换规则，这可能导致心室体积等预测性能不佳。在这里，我们建立了一个新的成人人体数字孪生，采用纵向采集的头部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像进行训练，从而能够根据单个当前的头部立体 CT 图像预测未来的头部立体 CT 图像。我们首次采用基于三维流的深度生成模型之一来实现这种顺序三维数字孪生。我们证明，我们的数字孪生在相对较短的时间内优于最新的心室容积预测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度生成模型构建人体数字孪生体，通过预测未来头部CT图像实现衰老预测，以促进预防医学发展。
AI.motivation: 现有数字孪生体未明确训练纵向医学图像转换规则，导致如脑室体积预测等关键指标性能不足，需提升预测精度以实现早期病变检测。
AI.method: 采用纵向头部CT图像训练三维流基深度生成模型，首次构建顺序三维数字孪生体，实现单帧CT图像到未来CT图像的预测。
AI.result: 该模型在短期预测中显著优于现有方法，尤其在脑室体积预测任务上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为预防医学提供了更精准的衰老预测工具，有助于早期疾病干预与寿命延长。

title: Cin{é}matique d'une Proth{è}se de Main Myo{é}lectrique Accessible avec Actionneur Unique et R{é}tropulsion Passive du Pouce
title_zh: 电影 d'une Proth{è}se de Main Myo{é}lectrique Accessible avec Actionneur Unique et R{é}tropulsion Passive du Pouce
comment: in French language. Congrès Français de Mécanique, Aug 2022, Nantes, France
comments: in French language. Congrès Français de Mécanique, Aug 2022, Nantes, France
abstract: This work proposes a new kinematics of a myoelectric hand prosthesis with a single actuator, allowing to realize the tridigital grip but also the lateral grip. Inspired by tridigital prostheses, which are simpler, more robust and less expensive than polydigital prostheses, this new kinematics aims at proposing an accessible prosthesis (affordable, easy-to-use, robust, easy-to-repair). Cables are used instead of a rigid rod to transmit the movement bewteen the upper fingers and the thumb. The methods and design choices are detailed in this article. To conclude, the evaluation of the prototype by an experimented user leads to a first discussion of the results.
summary: This work proposes a new kinematics of a myoelectric hand prosthesis with a single actuator, allowing to realize the tridigital grip but also the lateral grip. Inspired by tridigital prostheses, which are simpler, more robust and less expensive than polydigital prostheses, this new kinematics aims at proposing an accessible prosthesis (affordable, easy-to-use, robust, easy-to-repair). Cables are used instead of a rigid rod to transmit the movement bewteen the upper fingers and the thumb. The methods and design choices are detailed in this article. To conclude, the evaluation of the prototype by an experimented user leads to a first discussion of the results.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种带有单个执行器的肌电手假肢的新运动学，可以实现三指握力，也可以实现横向握力。受三指假肢的启发，三指假肢比多指假肢更简单、更坚固且更便宜，这种新的运动学旨在提出一种易于使用的假肢（经济实惠、易于使用、坚固、易于修复）。使用电缆代替刚性杆来传递上手指和拇指之间的运动。本文详细介绍了方法和设计选择。总之，实验用户对原型的评估导致了对结果的第一次讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用单一驱动器和被动拇指回弹机制的肌电假手新运动学设计，旨在实现三指握持和侧向握持。
AI.motivation: 现有手指假肢复杂且昂贵，而三指假肢更简单、坚固且成本低，因此需开发一种经济实惠且易于使用的新型假手方案。
AI.method: 采用电缆替代刚性杆传递运动，通过单驱动器控制三指闭合，并设计被动回弹机构实现拇指自然回退。
AI.result: 原型机经专业用户测试，验证了三指握持和侧向握持功能的可行性，但需进一步优化性能。
AI.conclusion: 该设计为可负担的假手提供了新方向，平衡了功能性、成本与易用性，后续需完善机械结构与控制策略。

authors_text: Fabian Isensee,Constantin Ulrich,Tassilo Wald,Klaus H. Maier-Hein
title: Extending nnU-Net is all you need
title_zh: 扩展 nnU-Net 就是您所需要的
comment: Fabian Isensee, Constantin Ulrich and Tassilo Wald contributed equally
comments: Fabian Isensee, Constantin Ulrich and Tassilo Wald contributed equally
abstract: Semantic segmentation is one of the most popular research areas in medical image computing. Perhaps surprisingly, despite its conceptualization dating back to 2018, nnU-Net continues to provide competitive out-of-the-box solutions for a broad variety of segmentation problems and is regularly used as a development framework for challenge-winning algorithms. Here we use nnU-Net to participate in the AMOS2022 challenge, which comes with a unique set of tasks: not only is the dataset one of the largest ever created and boasts 15 target structures, but the competition also requires submitted solutions to handle both MRI and CT scans. Through careful modification of nnU-net's hyperparameters, the addition of residual connections in the encoder and the design of a custom postprocessing strategy, we were able to substantially improve upon the nnU-Net baseline. Our final ensemble achieves Dice scores of 90.13 for Task 1 (CT) and 89.06 for Task 2 (CT+MRI) in a 5-fold cross-validation on the provided training cases.
summary: Semantic segmentation is one of the most popular research areas in medical image computing. Perhaps surprisingly, despite its conceptualization dating back to 2018, nnU-Net continues to provide competitive out-of-the-box solutions for a broad variety of segmentation problems and is regularly used as a development framework for challenge-winning algorithms. Here we use nnU-Net to participate in the AMOS2022 challenge, which comes with a unique set of tasks: not only is the dataset one of the largest ever created and boasts 15 target structures, but the competition also requires submitted solutions to handle both MRI and CT scans. Through careful modification of nnU-net's hyperparameters, the addition of residual connections in the encoder and the design of a custom postprocessing strategy, we were able to substantially improve upon the nnU-Net baseline. Our final ensemble achieves Dice scores of 90.13 for Task 1 (CT) and 89.06 for Task 2 (CT+MRI) in a 5-fold cross-validation on the provided training cases.
abstract_zh: 语义分割是医学图像计算中最流行的研究领域之一。也许令人惊讶的是，尽管 nnU-Net 的概念可以追溯到 2018 年，但它继续为各种分割问题提供有竞争力的开箱即用解决方案，并经常用作赢得挑战的算法的开发框架。在这里，我们使用 nnU-Net 参加 AMOS2022 挑战赛，该挑战赛附带一组独特的任务：不仅该数据集是有史以来最大的数据集之一并拥有 15 个目标结构，而且竞赛还要求提交解决方案来处理 MRI 和 CT 扫描。通过仔细修改 nnU-net 的超参数、在编码器中添加残差连接以及设计自定义后处理策略，我们能够在 nnU-Net 基线的基础上进行大幅改进。在对所提供的训练案例进行 5 倍交叉验证时，我们最终的集成在任务 1 (CT) 中获得了 90.13 的 Dice 分数，在任务 2 (CT+MRI) 中获得了 89.06 的 Dice 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文通过改进nnU-Net模型，解决医疗图像分割中的复杂任务，包括处理CT和MRI多模态数据。
AI.motivation: 尽管nnU-Net自2018年以来表现优异，但面对AMOS2022挑战赛的大规模数据集和多模态需求，需进一步优化其性能。
AI.method: 调整nnU-Net超参数，编码器中引入残差连接，并设计定制化后处理策略，最终通过五折交叉验证集成模型。
AI.result: 在AMOS2022挑战赛中，Task1（CT）Dice得分为90.13，Task2（CT+MRI）Dice得分为89.06。
AI.conclusion: 通过合理扩展nnU-Net架构，可有效应对复杂医疗图像分割任务，为类似挑战提供可行解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过改进nnU-Net模型，解决医疗图像分割中的复杂任务，包括处理CT和MRI多模态数据。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管nnU-Net自2018年以来表现优异，但面对AMOS2022挑战赛的大规模数据集和多模态需求，需进一步优化其性能。

search_text: Extending nnU-Net is all you need 扩展 nnU-Net 就是您所需要的 Semantic segmentation is one of the most popular research areas in medical image computing. Perhaps surprisingly, despite its conceptualization dating back to 2018, nnU-Net continues to provide competitive out-of-the-box solutions for a broad variety of segmentation problems and is regularly used as a development framework for challenge-winning algorithms. Here we use nnU-Net to participate in the AMOS2022 challenge, which comes with a unique set of tasks: not only is the dataset one of the largest ever created and boasts 15 target structures, but the competition also requires submitted solutions to handle both MRI and CT scans. Through careful modification of nnU-net's hyperparameters, the addition of residual connections in the encoder and the design of a custom postprocessing strategy, we were able to substantially improve upon the nnU-Net baseline. Our final ensemble achieves Dice scores of 90.13 for Task 1 (CT) and 89.06 for Task 2 (CT+MRI) in a 5-fold cross-validation on the provided training cases. 语义分割是医学图像计算中最流行的研究领域之一。也许令人惊讶的是，尽管 nnU-Net 的概念可以追溯到 2018 年，但它继续为各种分割问题提供有竞争力的开箱即用解决方案，并经常用作赢得挑战的算法的开发框架。在这里，我们使用 nnU-Net 参加 AMOS2022 挑战赛，该挑战赛附带一组独特的任务：不仅该数据集是有史以来最大的数据集之一并拥有 15 个目标结构，而且竞赛还要求提交解决方案来处理 MRI 和 CT 扫描。通过仔细修改 nnU-net 的超参数、在编码器中添加残差连接以及设计自定义后处理策略，我们能够在 nnU-Net 基线的基础上进行大幅改进。在对所提供的训练案例进行 5 倍交叉验证时，我们最终的集成在任务 1 (CT) 中获得了 90.13 的 Dice 分数，在任务 2 (CT+MRI) 中获得了 89.06 的 Dice 分数。 本文通过改进nnU-Net模型，解决医疗图像分割中的复杂任务，包括处理CT和MRI多模态数据。 Fabian Isensee,Constantin Ulrich,Tassilo Wald,Klaus H. Maier-Hein eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Semantic Driven Energy based Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 基于语义驱动能量的分布外检测
comment: accepted at International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
comments: accepted at International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
abstract: Detecting Out-of-Distribution (OOD) samples in real world visual applications like classification or object detection has become a necessary precondition in today's deployment of Deep Learning systems. Many techniques have been proposed, of which Energy based OOD methods have proved to be promising and achieved impressive performance. We propose semantic driven energy based method, which is an end-to-end trainable system and easy to optimize. We distinguish in-distribution samples from out-distribution samples with an energy score coupled with a representation score. We achieve it by minimizing the energy for in-distribution samples and simultaneously learn respective class representations that are closer and maximizing energy for out-distribution samples and pushing their representation further out from known class representation. Moreover, we propose a novel loss function which we call Cluster Focal Loss(CFL) that proved to be simple yet very effective in learning better class wise cluster center representations. We find that, our novel approach enhances outlier detection and achieve state-of-the-art as an energy-based model on common benchmarks. On CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 trained WideResNet, our model significantly reduces the relative average False Positive Rate(at True Positive Rate of 95%) by 67.2% and 57.4% respectively, compared to the existing energy based approaches. Further, we extend our framework for object detection and achieve improved performance.
summary: Detecting Out-of-Distribution (OOD) samples in real world visual applications like classification or object detection has become a necessary precondition in today's deployment of Deep Learning systems. Many techniques have been proposed, of which Energy based OOD methods have proved to be promising and achieved impressive performance. We propose semantic driven energy based method, which is an end-to-end trainable system and easy to optimize. We distinguish in-distribution samples from out-distribution samples with an energy score coupled with a representation score. We achieve it by minimizing the energy for in-distribution samples and simultaneously learn respective class representations that are closer and maximizing energy for out-distribution samples and pushing their representation further out from known class representation. Moreover, we propose a novel loss function which we call Cluster Focal Loss(CFL) that proved to be simple yet very effective in learning better class wise cluster center representations. We find that, our novel approach enhances outlier detection and achieve state-of-the-art as an energy-based model on common benchmarks. On CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 trained WideResNet, our model significantly reduces the relative average False Positive Rate(at True Positive Rate of 95%) by 67.2% and 57.4% respectively, compared to the existing energy based approaches. Further, we extend our framework for object detection and achieve improved performance.
abstract_zh: 在分类或对象检测等现实世界视觉应用中检测分布外 (OOD) 样本已成为当今深度学习系统部署的必要先决条件。人们已经提出了许多技术，其中基于能量的 OOD 方法已被证明是有前途的并取得了令人印象深刻的性能。我们提出了基于语义驱动的能量的方法，这是一个端到端的可训练系统并且易于优化。我们通过能量得分和表示得分来区分分布内样本和分布外样本。我们通过最小化分布内样本的能量并同时学习更接近的各个类表示来实现它，并最大化分布外样本的能量并将其表示进一步远离已知的类表示。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，我们称之为簇焦点损失（CFL），事实证明它很简单，但在学习更好的类明智簇中心表示方面非常有效。我们发现，我们的新颖方法增强了异常值检测，并在通用基准上实现了最先进的基于能量的模型。在 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 训练的 WideResNet 上，与现有的基于能量的方法相比，我们的模型将相对平均误报率（真阳性率为 95%）分别显着降低了 67.2% 和 57.4%。此外，我们扩展了对象检测框架并提高了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义驱动能量的分布外检测方法，通过结合能量分数与表示分数提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有能量基分布外检测方法在实际应用中存在性能瓶颈，需引入语义信息增强模型对分布外样本的判别能力。
AI.method: 设计端到端可训练框架，通过最小化分布内样本能量并最大化分布外样本能量，结合聚类焦点损失（CFL）优化类别表示学习。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上，较现有方法分别降低67.2%和57.4%的相对平均假阳性率，达到能量基模型最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 语义驱动能量方法有效提升分布外检测性能，CFL损失函数设计具有普适性，框架可扩展至目标检测等任务。

title: Object Detection in Aerial Images with Uncertainty-Aware Graph Network
title_zh: 使用不确定性感知图网络进行航空图像中的对象检测
abstract: In this work, we propose a novel uncertainty-aware object detection framework with a structured-graph, where nodes and edges are denoted by objects and their spatial-semantic similarities, respectively. Specifically, we aim to consider relationships among objects for effectively contextualizing them. To achieve this, we first detect objects and then measure their semantic and spatial distances to construct an object graph, which is then represented by a graph neural network (GNN) for refining visual CNN features for objects. However, refining CNN features and detection results of every object are inefficient and may not be necessary, as that include correct predictions with low uncertainties. Therefore, we propose to handle uncertain objects by not only transferring the representation from certain objects (sources) to uncertain objects (targets) over the directed graph, but also improving CNN features only on objects regarded as uncertain with their representational outputs from the GNN. Furthermore, we calculate a training loss by giving larger weights on uncertain objects, to concentrate on improving uncertain object predictions while maintaining high performances on certain objects. We refer to our model as Uncertainty-Aware Graph network for object DETection (UAGDet). We then experimentally validate ours on the challenging large-scale aerial image dataset, namely DOTA, that consists of lots of objects with small to large sizes in an image, on which ours improves the performance of the existing object detection network.
summary: In this work, we propose a novel uncertainty-aware object detection framework with a structured-graph, where nodes and edges are denoted by objects and their spatial-semantic similarities, respectively. Specifically, we aim to consider relationships among objects for effectively contextualizing them. To achieve this, we first detect objects and then measure their semantic and spatial distances to construct an object graph, which is then represented by a graph neural network (GNN) for refining visual CNN features for objects. However, refining CNN features and detection results of every object are inefficient and may not be necessary, as that include correct predictions with low uncertainties. Therefore, we propose to handle uncertain objects by not only transferring the representation from certain objects (sources) to uncertain objects (targets) over the directed graph, but also improving CNN features only on objects regarded as uncertain with their representational outputs from the GNN. Furthermore, we calculate a training loss by giving larger weights on uncertain objects, to concentrate on improving uncertain object predictions while maintaining high performances on certain objects. We refer to our model as Uncertainty-Aware Graph network for object DETection (UAGDet). We then experimentally validate ours on the challenging large-scale aerial image dataset, namely DOTA, that consists of lots of objects with small to large sizes in an image, on which ours improves the performance of the existing object detection network.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有结构化图的新颖的不确定性感知对象检测框架，其中节点和边分别由对象及其空间语义相似性表示。具体来说，我们的目标是考虑对象之间的关系，以有效地将它们置于上下文中。为了实现这一目标，我们首先检测对象，然后测量它们的语义和空间距离以构建对象图，然后由图神经网络（GNN）表示以细化对象的视觉 CNN 特征。然而，细化每个对象的 CNN 特征和检测结果效率低下，而且可能没有必要，因为这包括不确定性较低的正确预测。因此，我们建议不仅通过在有向图上将表示从某些对象（源）转移到不确定对象（目标）来处理不确定对象，而且仅针对 GNN 的表示输出被视为不确定的对象改进 CNN 特征。此外，我们通过对不确定对象赋予更大的权重来计算训练损失，以集中精力改进不确定对象的预测，同时保持对某些对象的高性能。我们将我们的模型称为对象检测的不确定性感知图网络（UAGDet）。然后，我们在具有挑战性的大型航空图像数据集（即 DOTA）上进行实验验证，该数据集由图像中大小不一的大量物体组成，我们的数据集提高了现有物体检测网络的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性感知图网络的航拍图像目标检测框架，通过构建对象图并利用图神经网络优化特征表示，提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测方法在处理航拍图像中存在尺度差异大、复杂背景干扰等问题，且未有效区分确定性与不确定性预测，导致效率与精度不足。
AI.method: 构建对象图表示物体及其空间语义关系，通过图神经网络（GNN）优化CNN特征。对不确定目标进行表示迁移与特征优化，设计加权损失函数聚焦提升不确定目标检测效果，提出UAGDet模型。
AI.result: 在包含多尺度物体的DOTA数据集上实验验证，相比现有方法显著提升了航拍图像目标检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性感知的图网络结构，有效优化了复杂场景下目标检测精度，同时保持对确定性目标的高检测性能。

search_text: Object Detection in Aerial Images with Uncertainty-Aware Graph Network 使用不确定性感知图网络进行航空图像中的对象检测 In this work, we propose a novel uncertainty-aware object detection framework with a structured-graph, where nodes and edges are denoted by objects and their spatial-semantic similarities, respectively. Specifically, we aim to consider relationships among objects for effectively contextualizing them. To achieve this, we first detect objects and then measure their semantic and spatial distances to construct an object graph, which is then represented by a graph neural network (GNN) for refining visual CNN features for objects. However, refining CNN features and detection results of every object are inefficient and may not be necessary, as that include correct predictions with low uncertainties. Therefore, we propose to handle uncertain objects by not only transferring the representation from certain objects (sources) to uncertain objects (targets) over the directed graph, but also improving CNN features only on objects regarded as uncertain with their representational outputs from the GNN. Furthermore, we calculate a training loss by giving larger weights on uncertain objects, to concentrate on improving uncertain object predictions while maintaining high performances on certain objects. We refer to our model as Uncertainty-Aware Graph network for object DETection (UAGDet). We then experimentally validate ours on the challenging large-scale aerial image dataset, namely DOTA, that consists of lots of objects with small to large sizes in an image, on which ours improves the performance of the existing object detection network. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有结构化图的新颖的不确定性感知对象检测框架，其中节点和边分别由对象及其空间语义相似性表示。具体来说，我们的目标是考虑对象之间的关系，以有效地将它们置于上下文中。为了实现这一目标，我们首先检测对象，然后测量它们的语义和空间距离以构建对象图，然后由图神经网络（GNN）表示以细化对象的视觉 CNN 特征。然而，细化每个对象的 CNN 特征和检测结果效率低下，而且可能没有必要，因为这包括不确定性较低的正确预测。因此，我们建议不仅通过在有向图上将表示从某些对象（源）转移到不确定对象（目标）来处理不确定对象，而且仅针对 GNN 的表示输出被视为不确定的对象改进 CNN 特征。此外，我们通过对不确定对象赋予更大的权重来计算训练损失，以集中精力改进不确定对象的预测，同时保持对某些对象的高性能。我们将我们的模型称为对象检测的不确定性感知图网络（UAGDet）。然后，我们在具有挑战性的大型航空图像数据集（即 DOTA）上进行实验验证，该数据集由图像中大小不一的大量物体组成，我们的数据集提高了现有物体检测网络的性能。 本文提出了一种基于不确定性感知图网络的航拍图像目标检测框架，通过构建对象图并利用图神经网络优化特征表示，提升检测性能。 Jongha Kim,Jinheon Baek,Sung Ju Hwang cs.CV

title: Efficient Self-Supervision using Patch-based Contrastive Learning for Histopathology Image Segmentation
title_zh: 使用基于补丁的对比学习进行组织病理学图像分割的有效自我监督
comment: Version of this article (without Appendices) is accepted for an oral presentation at the 6th Northern Lights Deep Learning Conference, 2023, Tromsø, Norway. 15 pages, 8 figures. Source code at https://github.com/nickeopti/bach-contrastive-segmentation
comments: Version of this article (without Appendices) is accepted for an oral presentation at the 6th Northern Lights Deep Learning Conference, 2023, Tromsø, Norway. 15 pages, 8 figures. Source code at https://github.com/nickeopti/bach-contrastive-segmentation
abstract: Learning discriminative representations of unlabelled data is a challenging task. Contrastive self-supervised learning provides a framework to learn meaningful representations using learned notions of similarity measures from simple pretext tasks. In this work, we propose a simple and efficient framework for self-supervised image segmentation using contrastive learning on image patches, without using explicit pretext tasks or any further labeled fine-tuning. A fully convolutional neural network (FCNN) is trained in a self-supervised manner to discern features in the input images and obtain confidence maps which capture the network's belief about the objects belonging to the same class. Positive- and negative- patches are sampled based on the average entropy in the confidence maps for contrastive learning. Convergence is assumed when the information separation between the positive patches is small, and the positive-negative pairs is large. The proposed model only consists of a simple FCNN with 10.8k parameters and requires about 5 minutes to converge on the high resolution microscopy datasets, which is orders of magnitude smaller than the relevant self-supervised methods to attain similar performance. We evaluate the proposed method for the task of segmenting nuclei from two histopathology datasets, and show comparable performance with relevant self-supervised and supervised methods.
summary: Learning discriminative representations of unlabelled data is a challenging task. Contrastive self-supervised learning provides a framework to learn meaningful representations using learned notions of similarity measures from simple pretext tasks. In this work, we propose a simple and efficient framework for self-supervised image segmentation using contrastive learning on image patches, without using explicit pretext tasks or any further labeled fine-tuning. A fully convolutional neural network (FCNN) is trained in a self-supervised manner to discern features in the input images and obtain confidence maps which capture the network's belief about the objects belonging to the same class. Positive- and negative- patches are sampled based on the average entropy in the confidence maps for contrastive learning. Convergence is assumed when the information separation between the positive patches is small, and the positive-negative pairs is large. The proposed model only consists of a simple FCNN with 10.8k parameters and requires about 5 minutes to converge on the high resolution microscopy datasets, which is orders of magnitude smaller than the relevant self-supervised methods to attain similar performance. We evaluate the proposed method for the task of segmenting nuclei from two histopathology datasets, and show comparable performance with relevant self-supervised and supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 学习未标记数据的判别表示是一项具有挑战性的任务。对比自监督学习提供了一个框架，可以使用从简单借口任务中学到的相似性度量概念来学习有意义的表示。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单而有效的框架，用于使用图像块的对比学习进行自监督图像分割，而不使用显式的借口任务或任何进一步的标记微调。全卷积神经网络（FCNN）以自监督的方式进行训练，以识别输入图像中的特征并获得置信图，该置信图捕获网络对属于同一类的对象的信念。根据对比学习的置信图中的平均熵对正和负补丁进行采样。当正块之间的信息分离很小时并且正负对很大时，假设收敛。所提出的模型仅由具有 10.8k 参数的简单 FCNN 组成，需要约 5 分钟才能收敛于高分辨率显微镜数据集，这比获得类似性能的相关自监督方法小几个数量级。我们评估了所提出的从两个组织病理学数据集中分割细胞核的任务的方法，并显示出与相关自监督和监督方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于块对比学习的高效自监督方法，用于组织病理学图像分割，无需显式预训练任务或标注数据。
AI.motivation: 组织病理学图像分割依赖标注数据，但标注成本高且耗时，传统自监督方法参数多、收敛慢，需改进效率。
AI.method: 设计轻量级全卷积网络（FCNN），通过置信图生成特征，基于熵值采样正负块进行对比学习，无需预训练任务。
AI.result: 在两个组织病理学数据集上实现与监督和自监督方法相当的分割性能，参数量仅10.8k，收敛时间约5分钟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持性能的同时显著降低计算资源需求，为病理图像分割提供高效自监督解决方案。

authors_text: Svetlana Pavlitskaya,Nikolai Polley,Michael Weber,J. Marius Zöllner
title: Adversarial Vulnerability of Temporal Feature Networks for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于目标检测的时间特征网络的对抗漏洞
comment: Accepted for publication at ECCV 2022 SAIAD workshop
comments: Accepted for publication at ECCV 2022 SAIAD workshop
abstract: Taking into account information across the temporal domain helps to improve environment perception in autonomous driving. However, it has not been studied so far whether temporally fused neural networks are vulnerable to deliberately generated perturbations, i.e. adversarial attacks, or whether temporal history is an inherent defense against them. In this work, we study whether temporal feature networks for object detection are vulnerable to universal adversarial attacks. We evaluate attacks of two types: imperceptible noise for the whole image and locally-bound adversarial patch. In both cases, perturbations are generated in a white-box manner using PGD. Our experiments confirm, that attacking even a portion of a temporal input suffices to fool the network. We visually assess generated perturbations to gain insights into the functioning of attacks. To enhance the robustness, we apply adversarial training using 5-PGD. Our experiments on KITTI and nuScenes datasets demonstrate, that a model robustified via K-PGD is able to withstand the studied attacks while keeping the mAP-based performance comparable to that of an unattacked model.
summary: Taking into account information across the temporal domain helps to improve environment perception in autonomous driving. However, it has not been studied so far whether temporally fused neural networks are vulnerable to deliberately generated perturbations, i.e. adversarial attacks, or whether temporal history is an inherent defense against them. In this work, we study whether temporal feature networks for object detection are vulnerable to universal adversarial attacks. We evaluate attacks of two types: imperceptible noise for the whole image and locally-bound adversarial patch. In both cases, perturbations are generated in a white-box manner using PGD. Our experiments confirm, that attacking even a portion of a temporal input suffices to fool the network. We visually assess generated perturbations to gain insights into the functioning of attacks. To enhance the robustness, we apply adversarial training using 5-PGD. Our experiments on KITTI and nuScenes datasets demonstrate, that a model robustified via K-PGD is able to withstand the studied attacks while keeping the mAP-based performance comparable to that of an unattacked model.
abstract_zh: 考虑跨时域的信息有助于改善自动驾驶中的环境感知。然而，到目前为止，尚未研究时间融合神经网络是否容易受到故意产生的扰动（即对抗性攻击）的影响，或者时间历史是否是针对它们的固有防御。在这项工作中，我们研究了用于对象检测的时间特征网络是否容易受到普遍对抗性攻击。我们评估两种类型的攻击：整个图像的难以察觉的噪声和局部限制的对抗性补丁。在这两种情况下，扰动都是使用 PGD 以白盒方式生成的。我们的实验证实，即使攻击时间输入的一部分也足以欺骗网络。我们直观地评估生成的扰动，以深入了解攻击的功能。为了增强鲁棒性，我们使用 5-PGD 进行对抗性训练。我们在 KITTI 和 nuScenes 数据集上的实验表明，通过 K-PGD 增强的模型能够承受所研究的攻击，同时保持基于 mAP 的性能与未受攻击的模型相当。

AI.tldr: 研究时序特征网络在目标检测中的对抗脆弱性，并探索对抗训练的鲁棒性提升方法。
AI.motivation: 时序信息融合可提升自动驾驶环境感知，但其对抗攻击脆弱性尚未明确，需验证时序历史是否具备天然防御能力。
AI.method: 采用白盒PGD方法生成全局不可感知噪声和局部对抗补丁攻击，通过视觉分析攻击机制，并使用5-PGD对抗训练增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明攻击部分时序输入即可欺骗网络，而经K-PGD训练的模型在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上保持性能的同时有效抵御攻击。
AI.conclusion: 时序特征网络存在对抗脆弱性，但通过对抗训练可显著提升鲁棒性而不牺牲检测性能。

title: Learning an Efficient Multimodal Depth Completion Model
title_zh: 学习高效的多模态深度完成模型
comment: To appear in ECCV 2022 workshop and codes are available at https://github.com/dwHou/EMDC-PyTorch
comments: To appear in ECCV 2022 workshop and codes are available at https://github.com/dwHou/EMDC-PyTorch
abstract: With the wide application of sparse ToF sensors in mobile devices, RGB image-guided sparse depth completion has attracted extensive attention recently, but still faces some problems. First, the fusion of multimodal information requires more network modules to process different modalities. But the application scenarios of sparse ToF measurements usually demand lightweight structure and low computational cost. Second, fusing sparse and noisy depth data with dense pixel-wise RGB data may introduce artifacts. In this paper, a light but efficient depth completion network is proposed, which consists of a two-branch global and local depth prediction module and a funnel convolutional spatial propagation network. The two-branch structure extracts and fuses cross-modal features with lightweight backbones. The improved spatial propagation module can refine the completed depth map gradually. Furthermore, corrected gradient loss is presented for the depth completion problem. Experimental results demonstrate the proposed method can outperform some state-of-the-art methods with a lightweight architecture. The proposed method also wins the championship in the MIPI2022 RGB+TOF depth completion challenge.
summary: With the wide application of sparse ToF sensors in mobile devices, RGB image-guided sparse depth completion has attracted extensive attention recently, but still faces some problems. First, the fusion of multimodal information requires more network modules to process different modalities. But the application scenarios of sparse ToF measurements usually demand lightweight structure and low computational cost. Second, fusing sparse and noisy depth data with dense pixel-wise RGB data may introduce artifacts. In this paper, a light but efficient depth completion network is proposed, which consists of a two-branch global and local depth prediction module and a funnel convolutional spatial propagation network. The two-branch structure extracts and fuses cross-modal features with lightweight backbones. The improved spatial propagation module can refine the completed depth map gradually. Furthermore, corrected gradient loss is presented for the depth completion problem. Experimental results demonstrate the proposed method can outperform some state-of-the-art methods with a lightweight architecture. The proposed method also wins the championship in the MIPI2022 RGB+TOF depth completion challenge.
abstract_zh: 随着稀疏ToF传感器在移动设备中的广泛应用，RGB图像引导的稀疏深度补全最近引起了广泛的关注，但仍然面临一些问题。首先，多模态信息的融合需要更多的网络模块来处理不同的模态。但稀疏ToF测量的应用场景通常需要轻量级结构和低计算成本。其次，将稀疏和嘈杂的深度数据与密集的像素级 RGB 数据融合可能会引入伪影。本文提出了一种轻量但高效的深度补全网络，该网络由两分支全局和局部深度预测模块和漏斗卷积空间传播网络组成。两分支结构提取跨模态特征并将其与轻量级主干融合。改进的空间传播模块可以逐渐细化完成的深度图。此外，针对深度补全问题提出了校正的梯度损失。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以优于一些具有轻量级架构的最先进方法。该方法还在MIPI2022 RGB+TOF深度完成挑战赛中获得冠军。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的多模态深度补全模型，结合RGB图像与稀疏ToF传感器数据，解决轻量化结构与深度图优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在融合多模态信息时网络复杂度高且易引入伪影，而移动设备场景需要轻量化低计算成本的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计双分支全局-局部深度预测模块与漏斗卷积空间传播网络，采用轻量级主干提取跨模态特征，并通过改进的空间传播模块逐步优化深度图，结合修正梯度损失函数。
AI.result: 在保持轻量化架构下优于现有先进方法，在MIPI2022 RGB+TOF深度补全挑战赛中夺冠。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了模型效率与深度补全精度，适用于移动设备等资源受限场景。

search_text: Learning an Efficient Multimodal Depth Completion Model 学习高效的多模态深度完成模型 With the wide application of sparse ToF sensors in mobile devices, RGB image-guided sparse depth completion has attracted extensive attention recently, but still faces some problems. First, the fusion of multimodal information requires more network modules to process different modalities. But the application scenarios of sparse ToF measurements usually demand lightweight structure and low computational cost. Second, fusing sparse and noisy depth data with dense pixel-wise RGB data may introduce artifacts. In this paper, a light but efficient depth completion network is proposed, which consists of a two-branch global and local depth prediction module and a funnel convolutional spatial propagation network. The two-branch structure extracts and fuses cross-modal features with lightweight backbones. The improved spatial propagation module can refine the completed depth map gradually. Furthermore, corrected gradient loss is presented for the depth completion problem. Experimental results demonstrate the proposed method can outperform some state-of-the-art methods with a lightweight architecture. authors_text: Zhangyang Xiong,Dong Du,Yushuang Wu,Jingqi Dong,Di Kang,Linchao Bao,Xiaoguang Han
title: PIFu for the Real World: A Self-supervised Framework to Reconstruct Dressed Human from Single-view Images
title_zh: 真实世界的 PIFu：从单视图图像重建着装人类的自监督框架
abstract: It is very challenging to accurately reconstruct sophisticated human geometry caused by various poses and garments from a single image. Recently, works based on pixel-aligned implicit function (PIFu) have made a big step and achieved state-of-the-art fidelity on image-based 3D human digitization. However, the training of PIFu relies heavily on expensive and limited 3D ground truth data (i.e. synthetic data), thus hindering its generalization to more diverse real world images. In this work, we propose an end-to-end self-supervised network named SelfPIFu to utilize abundant and diverse in-the-wild images, resulting in largely improved reconstructions when tested on unconstrained in-the-wild images. At the core of SelfPIFu is the depth-guided volume-/surface-aware signed distance fields (SDF) learning, which enables self-supervised learning of a PIFu without access to GT mesh. The whole framework consists of a normal estimator, a depth estimator, and a SDF-based PIFu and better utilizes extra depth GT during training. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our self-supervised framework and the superiority of using depth as input. On synthetic data, our Intersection-Over-Union (IoU) achieves to 93.5%, 18% higher compared with PIFuHD. For in-the-wild images, we conduct user studies on the reconstructed results, the selection rate of our results is over 68% compared with other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: It is very challenging to accurately reconstruct sophisticated human geometry caused by various poses and garments from a single image. Recently, works based on pixel-aligned implicit function (PIFu) have made a big step and achieved state-of-the-art fidelity on image-based 3D human digitization. However, the training of PIFu relies heavily on expensive and limited 3D ground truth data (i.e. synthetic data), thus hindering its generalization to more diverse real world images. In this work, we propose an end-to-end self-supervised network named SelfPIFu to utilize abundant and diverse in-the-wild images, resulting in largely improved reconstructions when tested on unconstrained in-the-wild images. At the core of SelfPIFu is the depth-guided volume-/surface-aware signed distance fields (SDF) learning, which enables self-supervised learning of a PIFu without access to GT mesh. The whole framework consists of a normal estimator, a depth estimator, and a SDF-based PIFu and better utilizes extra depth GT during training. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our self-supervised framework and the superiority of using depth as input. On synthetic data, our Intersection-Over-Union (IoU) achieves to 93.5%, 18% higher compared with PIFuHD. For in-the-wild images, we conduct user studies on the reconstructed results, the selection rate of our results is over 68% compared with other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 从单个图像中准确地重建由各种姿势和服装引起的复杂的人体几何形状是非常具有挑战性的。最近，基于像素对齐隐函数（PIFu）的工作在基于图像的 3D 人体数字化方面取得了重大进展，并实现了最先进的保真度。然而，PIFu 的训练严重依赖昂贵且有限的 3D 地面真实数据（即合成数据），从而阻碍了其推广到更多样化的现实世界图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 SelfPIFu 的端到端自监督网络，以利用丰富多样的野外图像，在不受约束的野外图像上进行测试时，可以大大改善重建效果。 SelfPIFu 的核心是深度引导的体积/表面感知有符号距离场 (SDF) 学习，它可以在不访问 GT 网格的情况下实现 PIFu 的自我监督学习。整个框架由一个普通估计器、一个深度估计器和一个基于SDF的PIFu组成，并且在训练期间更好地利用额外深度GT。大量的实验证明了我们的自我监督框架的有效性以及使用深度作为输入的优越性。在综合数据上，我们的 Intersection-Over-Union (IoU) 达到 93.5%，比 PIFuHD 高 18%。对于野外图像，我们对重建结果进行用户研究，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们结果的选择率超过 68%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督框架SelfPIFu，用于从单视角图像中重建穿着衣物的人体几何结构，以解决传统PIFu方法依赖合成数据导致的现实场景泛化不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有PIFu方法依赖昂贵且有限的3D真实值数据（合成数据），难以适应多样化的现实世界图像，亟需利用真实场景数据提升重建效果。
AI.method: 通过深度引导的体素/表面感知有符号距离场（SDF）学习，结合法线估计器、深度估计器和基于SDF的PIFu网络，实现无需地面真实网格的自监督训练。
AI.result: 在合成数据上IoU达到93.5%（较PIFuHD提升18%），在真实场景中用户研究显示其重建结果选择率超过68%（优于其他最先进方法）。
AI.conclusion: 自监督框架结合深度输入显著提升了现实场景中人体重建的准确性，验证了深度引导SDF学习的有效性。

authors_text: Paul Kremer,Hamed Rahimi Nohooji,Jose Luis Sanchez-Lopez,Holger Voos
title: TRIGGER: A Lightweight Universal Jamming Gripper for Aerial Grasping
title_zh: TRIGGER：用于空中抓取的轻型通用干扰夹具
abstract: This work introduces TRIGGER, the first lighTweight univeRsal jammInG Gripper for aErial gRasping. TRIGGER is an omnidirectional, landing-capable aerial grasping system with resilience and robustness to collisions and inherent passive compliance. In particular, this work presents the design, fabrication, and experimental validation of a novel, intelligent, modular, universal jamming gripper specifically designed for aerial applications. Leveraging recent developments in particle jamming and soft granular materials, TRIGGER produces 15N of holding force with only a relatively small activation force of 2.5N. Experiments show the relationship between fill ratio and activation force and reveal that adding an additive to the membrane's silicone mixture improves the holding force by up to 52%. The concept is validated by mounting TRIGGER onto a multicopter performing a pick-and-release task under laboratory conditions. Based on the experimental data, a model for robotic simulators is introduced to facilitate future controller developments.
summary: This work introduces TRIGGER, the first lighTweight univeRsal jammInG Gripper for aErial gRasping. TRIGGER is an omnidirectional, landing-capable aerial grasping system with resilience and robustness to collisions and inherent passive compliance. In particular, this work presents the design, fabrication, and experimental validation of a novel, intelligent, modular, universal jamming gripper specifically designed for aerial applications. Leveraging recent developments in particle jamming and soft granular materials, TRIGGER produces 15N of holding force with only a relatively small activation force of 2.5N. Experiments show the relationship between fill ratio and activation force and reveal that adding an additive to the membrane's silicone mixture improves the holding force by up to 52%. The concept is validated by mounting TRIGGER onto a multicopter performing a pick-and-release task under laboratory conditions. Based on the experimental data, a model for robotic simulators is introduced to facilitate future controller developments.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了 TRIGGER，这是第一个用于空中抓取的轻型通用干扰夹具。 TRIGGER 是一种全向、可着陆的空中抓取系统，具有抗碰撞能力和鲁棒性以及固有的被动合规性。特别是，这项工作介绍了一种专为航空应用设计的新颖、智能、模块化、通用干扰夹具的设计、制造和实验验证。利用粒子干扰和软颗粒材料的最新发展，TRIGGER 仅需 2.5N 的相对较小的激活力即可产生 15N 的保持力。实验显示了填充率和活化力之间的关系，并表明在膜的有机硅混合物中添加添加剂可将保持力提高高达 52%。通过将 TRIGGER 安装到在实验室条件下执行拾取和释放任务的多旋翼飞行器上，验证了这一概念。基于实验数据，引入了机器人模拟器的模型，以促进未来控制器的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRIGGER，一种专为无人机空中抓取设计的轻量级通用夹持器，通过颗粒阻尼和软材料实现高抓持力与碰撞鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统空中抓取装置存在重量大、适应性差、抗碰撞能力弱等问题，亟需轻量化且通用的解决方案以提升无人机操作灵活性。
AI.method: 基于颗粒阻尼原理设计模块化夹持器，通过实验优化填充率与硅胶添加剂比例，并在多旋翼无人机上验证抓取性能，建立仿真模型支持控制器开发。
AI.result: TRIGGER以2.5N激活力实现15N抓持力，添加改性剂后抓持力提升52%，成功完成无人机实验室抓取任务，验证了设计有效性。
AI.conclusion: TRIGGER为无人机空中抓取提供了轻量化、高适应性的新型夹持方案，其模块化设计与仿真模型可推动相关应用发展。

search_text: TRIGGER: A Lightweight Universal Jamming Gripper for Aerial Grasping TRIGGER：用于空中抓取的轻型通用干扰夹具 This work introduces TRIGGER, the first lighTweight univeRsal jammInG Gripper for aErial gRasping. TRIGGER is an omnidirectional, landing-capable aerial grasping system with resilience and robustness to collisions and inherent passive compliance. In particular, this work presents the design, fabrication, and experimental validation of a novel, intelligent, modular, universal jamming gripper specifically designed for aerial applications. Leveraging recent developments in particle jamming and soft granular materials, TRIGGER produces 15N of holding force with only a relatively small activation force of 2.5N. Experiments show the relationship between fill ratio and activation force and reveal that adding an additive to the membrane's silicone mixture improves the holding force by up to 52%. The concept is validated by mounting TRIGGER onto a multicopter performing a pick-and-release task under laboratory conditions. Based on the experimental data, a model for robotic simulators is introduced to facilitate future controller developments. 这项工作介绍了 TRIGGER，这是第一个用于空中抓取的轻型通用干扰夹具。 TRIGGER 是一种全向、可着陆的空中抓取系统，具有抗碰撞能力和鲁棒性以及固有的被动合规性。特别是，这项工作介绍了一种专为航空应用设计的新颖、智能、模块化、通用干扰夹具的设计、制造和实验验证。利用粒子干扰和软颗粒材料的最新发展，TRIGGER 仅需 2.5N 的相对较小的激活力即可产生 15N 的保持力。实验显示了填充率和活化力之间的关系，并表明在膜的有机硅混合物中添加添加剂可将保持力提高高达 52%。通过将 TRIGGER 安装到在实验室条件下执行拾取和释放任务的多旋翼飞行器上，验证了这一概念。基于实验数据，引入了机器人模拟器的模型，以促进未来控制器的开发。 本文提出TRIGGER，一种专为无人机空中抓取设计的轻量级通用夹持器，通过颗粒阻尼和软材料实现高抓持力与碰撞鲁棒性。 Paul Kremer,Hamed Rahimi Nohooji,Jose Luis Sanchez-Lopez,Holger Voos cs.RO

title: A Low-Cost Lane-Following Algorithm for Cyber-Physical Robots
title_zh: 一种低成本的网络物理机器人车道跟踪算法
abstract: Duckiebots are low-cost mobile robots that are widely used in the fields of research and education. Although there are existing self-driving algorithms for the Duckietown platform, they are either too complex or perform too poorly to navigate a multi-lane track. Moreover, it is essential to give memory and computational resources to a Duckiebot so it can perform additional tasks such as out-of-distribution input detection. In order to satisfy these constraints, we built a low-cost autonomous driving algorithm capable of driving on a two-lane track. The algorithm uses traditional computer vision techniques to identify the central lane on the track and obtain the relevant steering angle. The steering is then controlled by a PID controller that smoothens the movement of the Duckiebot. The performance of the algorithm was compared to that of the NeurIPS 2018 AI Driving Olympics (AIDO) finalists, and it outperformed all but one finalists. The two main contributions of our algorithm are its low computational requirements and very quick set-up, with ongoing efforts to make it more reliable.
summary: Duckiebots are low-cost mobile robots that are widely used in the fields of research and education. Although there are existing self-driving algorithms for the Duckietown platform, they are either too complex or perform too poorly to navigate a multi-lane track. Moreover, it is essential to give memory and computational resources to a Duckiebot so it can perform additional tasks such as out-of-distribution input detection. In order to satisfy these constraints, we built a low-cost autonomous driving algorithm capable of driving on a two-lane track. The algorithm uses traditional computer vision techniques to identify the central lane on the track and obtain the relevant steering angle. The steering is then controlled by a PID controller that smoothens the movement of the Duckiebot. The performance of the algorithm was compared to that of the NeurIPS 2018 AI Driving Olympics (AIDO) finalists, and it outperformed all but one finalists. The two main contributions of our algorithm are its low computational requirements and very quick set-up, with ongoing efforts to make it more reliable.
abstract_zh: Duckiebots 是低成本的移动机器人，广泛应用于研究和教育领域。尽管 Duckietown 平台已有自动驾驶算法，但它们要么太复杂，要么性能太差，无法在多车道赛道上导航。此外，必须为 Duckiebot 提供内存和计算资源，以便它可以执行额外的任务，例如分布外输入检测。为了满足这些限制，我们构建了一种能够在双车道轨道上行驶的低成本自动驾驶算法。该算法利用传统的计算机视觉技术来识别赛道上的中央车道并获得相关的转向角度。然后，转向由 PID 控制器控制，使 Duckiebot 的运动平稳。该算法的性能与 NeurIPS 2018 年人工智能驾驶奥运会 (AIDO​​) 决赛选手的性能进行了比较，结果显示，除了一名决赛选手之外，它的表现优于所有决赛选手。我们的算法的两个主要贡献是其低计算要求和非常快速的设置，并不断努力使其更加可靠。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种低成本的车道跟随算法，使Duckiebot机器人能够在双车道上实现自主导航。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶算法复杂度高或性能不足，且需为Duckiebot分配资源执行其他任务，需更高效且计算量小的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用传统计算机视觉技术识别车道中心并计算转向角，通过PID控制器实现平滑转向控制。
AI.result: 算法在NeurIPS 2018 AIDO比赛中表现优于除一个之外的所有决赛选手。
AI.conclusion: 该算法以低计算需求和快速部署为优势，未来将重点提升其可靠性。

title: Depth Map Decomposition for Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 单目深度估计的深度图分解
abstract: We propose a novel algorithm for monocular depth estimation that decomposes a metric depth map into a normalized depth map and scale features. The proposed network is composed of a shared encoder and three decoders, called G-Net, N-Net, and M-Net, which estimate gradient maps, a normalized depth map, and a metric depth map, respectively. M-Net learns to estimate metric depths more accurately using relative depth features extracted by G-Net and N-Net. The proposed algorithm has the advantage that it can use datasets without metric depth labels to improve the performance of metric depth estimation. Experimental results on various datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithm not only provides competitive performance to state-of-the-art algorithms but also yields acceptable results even when only a small amount of metric depth data is available for its training.
summary: We propose a novel algorithm for monocular depth estimation that decomposes a metric depth map into a normalized depth map and scale features. The proposed network is composed of a shared encoder and three decoders, called G-Net, N-Net, and M-Net, which estimate gradient maps, a normalized depth map, and a metric depth map, respectively. M-Net learns to estimate metric depths more accurately using relative depth features extracted by G-Net and N-Net. The proposed algorithm has the advantage that it can use datasets without metric depth labels to improve the performance of metric depth estimation. Experimental results on various datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithm not only provides competitive performance to state-of-the-art algorithms but also yields acceptable results even when only a small amount of metric depth data is available for its training.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于单目深度估计的新颖算法，它将度量深度图分解为归一化深度图和尺度特征。所提出的网络由一个共享编码器和三个解码器（称为 G-Net、N-Net 和 M-Net）组成，分别估计梯度图、归一化深度图和度量深度图。 M-Net 学习使用 G-Net 和 N-Net 提取的相对深度特征来更准确地估计度量深度。该算法的优点是可以使用没有度量深度标签的数据集来提高度量深度估计的性能。各种数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的算法不仅为最先进的算法提供了有竞争力的性能，而且即使只有少量的度量深度数据可用于其训练，也能产生可接受的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种单目深度估计算法，通过将度量深度图分解为归一化深度图和尺度特征来提升估计精度
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量带标签数据，而该算法能利用无标签数据提升性能，减少对标注数据的依赖
AI.method: 使用共享编码器和三个解码器（G-Net、N-Net、M-Net）分解深度图，M-Net结合梯度和归一化特征估计度量深度
AI.result: 在多个数据集上表现与SOTA算法相当，且在少量标注数据下仍能取得可接受结果
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分解深度图提升估计精度，有效利用无标签数据，具有较高的数据效率

title: CRCNet: Few-shot Segmentation with Cross-Reference and Region-Global Conditional Networks
title_zh: CRCNet：具有交叉参考和区域全局条件网络的小样本分割
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2003.10658
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2003.10658
abstract: Few-shot segmentation aims to learn a segmentation model that can be generalized to novel classes with only a few training images. In this paper, we propose a Cross-Reference and Local-Global Conditional Networks (CRCNet) for few-shot segmentation. Unlike previous works that only predict the query image's mask, our proposed model concurrently makes predictions for both the support image and the query image. Our network can better find the co-occurrent objects in the two images with a cross-reference mechanism, thus helping the few-shot segmentation task. To further improve feature comparison, we develop a local-global conditional module to capture both global and local relations. We also develop a mask refinement module to refine the prediction of the foreground regions recurrently. Experiments on the PASCAL VOC 2012, MS COCO, and FSS-1000 datasets show that our network achieves new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Few-shot segmentation aims to learn a segmentation model that can be generalized to novel classes with only a few training images. In this paper, we propose a Cross-Reference and Local-Global Conditional Networks (CRCNet) for few-shot segmentation. Unlike previous works that only predict the query image's mask, our proposed model concurrently makes predictions for both the support image and the query image. Our network can better find the co-occurrent objects in the two images with a cross-reference mechanism, thus helping the few-shot segmentation task. To further improve feature comparison, we develop a local-global conditional module to capture both global and local relations. We also develop a mask refinement module to refine the prediction of the foreground regions recurrently. Experiments on the PASCAL VOC 2012, MS COCO, and FSS-1000 datasets show that our network achieves new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 少镜头分割旨在学习一种分割模型，该模型可以推广到仅需要少量训练图像的新类别。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于少样本分割的交叉引用和局部全局条件网络（CRCNet）。与之前仅预测查询图像掩模的工作不同，我们提出的模型同时对支持图像和查询图像进行预测。我们的网络可以通过交叉引用机制更好地找到两幅图像中的共现对象，从而有助于少镜头分割任务。为了进一步改进特征比较，我们开发了一个局部-全局条件模块来捕获全局和局部关系。我们还开发了一个掩模细化模块来反复细化前景区域的预测。 PASCAL VOC 2012、MS COCO 和 FSS-1000 数据集上的实验表明，我们的网络实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出CRCNet，用于少样本分割，通过跨参考和区域-全局条件网络提升模型性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅预测查询图像，无法有效利用支持图像信息，导致分割效果有限，需同时预测两者以提升性能
AI.method: 采用跨参考机制捕捉共现物体，结合局部-全局条件模块增强特征比较，并通过掩码优化模块递归细化前景区域预测
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012、MS COCO和FSS-1000数据集上实现新的最先进性能
AI.conclusion: CRCNet通过联合预测和模块设计有效提升少样本分割性能，验证了方法的有效性

title: How good are deep models in understanding the generated images?
title_zh: 深度模型在理解生成的图像方面有多好？
abstract: My goal in this paper is twofold: to study how well deep models can understand the images generated by DALL-E 2 and Midjourney, and to quantitatively evaluate these generative models. Two sets of generated images are collected for object recognition and visual question answering (VQA) tasks. On object recognition, the best model, out of 10 state-of-the-art object recognition models, achieves about 60\% and 80\% top-1 and top-5 accuracy, respectively. These numbers are much lower than the best accuracy on the ImageNet dataset (91\% and 99\%). On VQA, the OFA model scores 77.3\% on answering 241 binary questions across 50 images. This model scores 94.7\% on the binary VQA-v2 dataset. Humans are able to recognize the generated images and answer questions on them easily. We conclude that a) deep models struggle to understand the generated content, and may do better after fine-tuning, and b) there is a large distribution shift between the generated images and the real photographs. The distribution shift appears to be category-dependent. Data is available at: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1n2nCiaXtYJRRF2R73-LNE3zggeU_HeH0/view?usp=sharing.
summary: My goal in this paper is twofold: to study how well deep models can understand the images generated by DALL-E 2 and Midjourney, and to quantitatively evaluate these generative models. Two sets of generated images are collected for object recognition and visual question answering (VQA) tasks. On object recognition, the best model, out of 10 state-of-the-art object recognition models, achieves about 60\% and 80\% top-1 and top-5 accuracy, respectively. These numbers are much lower than the best accuracy on the ImageNet dataset (91\% and 99\%). On VQA, the OFA model scores 77.3\% on answering 241 binary questions across 50 images. This model scores 94.7\% on the binary VQA-v2 dataset. Humans are able to recognize the generated images and answer questions on them easily. We conclude that a) deep models struggle to understand the generated content, and may do better after fine-tuning, and b) there is a large distribution shift between the generated images and the real photographs. The distribution shift appears to be category-dependent. Data is available at: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1n2nCiaXtYJRRF2R73-LNE3zggeU_HeH0/view?usp=sharing.
abstract_zh: 我在本文中的目标有两个：研究深度模型如何更好地理解 DALL-E 2 和 Midjourney 生成的图像，并定量评估这些生成模型。收集两组生成的图像用于对象识别和视觉问答 (VQA) 任务。在物体识别方面，10 个最先进的物体识别模型中最好的模型分别达到了约 60% 和 80% 的 top-1 和 top-5 准确度。这些数字远低于 ImageNet 数据集上的最佳准确率（91\% 和 99\%）。在 VQA 上，OFA 模型在回答 50 个图像中的 241 个二元问题时得分为 77.3%。该模型在二进制 VQA-v2 数据集上得分为 94.7%。人类能够识别生成的图像并轻松回答有关图像的问题。我们的结论是：a）深度模型很难理解生成的内容，并且在微调后可能会做得更好；b）生成的图像和真实照片之间存在很大的分布变化。分布变化似乎与类别相关。数据可在以下网址获取：https://drive.google.com/file/d/1n2nCiaXtYJRRF2R73-LNE3zggeU_HeH0/view?usp=sharing。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度模型对DALL-E 2和Midjourney生成图像的理解能力，并对这些生成模型进行了定量评估。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成模型在图像生成方面取得了显著进展，但它们生成的图像是否能被深度模型准确理解仍不清楚，因此本文旨在探讨这一问题。
AI.method: 本文收集了两组生成图像，用于进行目标识别和视觉问答（VQA）任务。使用了10种最先进的目标识别模型和OFA模型进行评估。
AI.result: 在目标识别任务中，最佳模型在生成图像上的top-1和top-5准确率分别为约60%和80%，远低于ImageNet数据集上的最佳准确率（91%和99%）。在VQA任务中，OFA模型在二元问题上的得分是77.3%，而在VQA-v2数据集上得分是94.7%。人类能够轻松识别生成图像并回答相关问题。
AI.conclusion: 深度模型在理解生成图像方面存在困难，可能需要微调才能改进；生成图像与真实照片之间存在较大的分布偏移，且这种偏移具有类别依赖性。

authors_text: Tianwei Chen,Noa Garcia,Mayu Otani,Chenhui Chu,Yuta Nakashima,Hajime Nagahara
title: Learning More May Not Be Better: Knowledge Transferability in Vision and Language Tasks
title_zh: 学得越多未必越好：视觉和语言任务中的知识可转移性
abstract: Is more data always better to train vision-and-language models? We study knowledge transferability in multi-modal tasks. The current tendency in machine learning is to assume that by joining multiple datasets from different tasks their overall performance will improve. However, we show that not all the knowledge transfers well or has a positive impact on related tasks, even when they share a common goal. We conduct an exhaustive analysis based on hundreds of cross-experiments on 12 vision-and-language tasks categorized in 4 groups. Whereas tasks in the same group are prone to improve each other, results show that this is not always the case. Other factors such as dataset size or pre-training stage have also a great impact on how well the knowledge is transferred.
summary: Is more data always better to train vision-and-language models? We study knowledge transferability in multi-modal tasks. The current tendency in machine learning is to assume that by joining multiple datasets from different tasks their overall performance will improve. However, we show that not all the knowledge transfers well or has a positive impact on related tasks, even when they share a common goal. We conduct an exhaustive analysis based on hundreds of cross-experiments on 12 vision-and-language tasks categorized in 4 groups. Whereas tasks in the same group are prone to improve each other, results show that this is not always the case. Other factors such as dataset size or pre-training stage have also a great impact on how well the knowledge is transferred.
abstract_zh: 训练视觉和语言模型的数据越多越好吗？我们研究多模式任务中的知识可转移性。机器学习当前的趋势是假设通过连接来自不同任务的多个数据集，它们的整体性能将会提高。然而，我们表明，并非所有知识都能很好地转移或对相关任务产生积极影响，即使它们有共同的目标。我们对 12 项视觉和语言任务（分为 4 组）进行了数百次交叉实验，进行了详尽的分析。尽管同一组中的任务很容易相互改进，但结果表明情况并非总是如此。其他因素（例如数据集大小或预训练阶段）也对知识转移的效果有很大影响。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究视觉与语言任务中的知识迁移现象，探讨在多模态任务中增加数据是否总能提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习趋势认为多任务数据集联合训练能提升性能，但作者质疑并非所有知识都能有效迁移，需验证知识迁移的条件与限制。
AI.method: 通过在12个视觉-语言任务（分为4组）上进行数百次跨实验，分析任务间知识迁移效果，同时考察数据集规模与预训练阶段的影响。
AI.result: 同一组任务间知识迁移效果显著，但跨组迁移未必有效；数据集规模和预训练阶段对迁移效果有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 增加数据未必提升性能，知识迁移效果取决于任务相关性、数据规模及预训练阶段等因素，需谨慎选择迁移策略。

ai_content.tldr: 本论文研究视觉与语言任务中的知识迁移现象，探讨在多模态任务中增加数据是否总能提升模型性能。
ai_content.motivation: 当前机器学习趋势认为多任务数据集联合训练能提升性能，但作者质疑并非所有知识都能有效迁移，需验证知识迁移的条件与限制。
ai_content.method: 通过在12个视觉-语言任务（分为4组）上进行数百次跨实验，分析任务间知识迁移效果，同时考察数据集规模与预训练阶段的影响。
ai_content.result: 同一组任务间知识迁移效果显著，但跨组迁移未必有效；数据集规模和预训练阶段对迁移效果有显著影响。
ai_content.conclusion: 增加数据未必提升性能，知识迁移效果取决于任务相关性、数据规模及预训练阶段等因素，需谨慎选择迁移策略。
