search_text: Learning More May Not Be Better: Knowledge Transferability in Vision and Language Tasks 学得越多未必越好：视觉和语言任务中的知识可转移性 Is more data always better to train vision-and-language models? We study knowledge transferability in multi-modal tasks. The current tendency in machine learning is to assume that by joining multiple datasets from different tasks their overall performance will improve. However, we show that not all the knowledge transfers well or has a positive impact on related tasks, even when they share a common goal. We conduct an exhaustive analysis based on hundreds of cross-experiments on 12 vision-and-language tasks categorized in 4 groups. Whereas tasks in the same group are prone to improve each other, results show that this is not always the case. Other factors such as dataset size or pre-training stage have also a great impact on how well the knowledge is transferred. 训练视觉和语言模型的数据越多越好吗？我们研究多模式任务中的知识可转移性。机器学习当前的趋势是假设通过连接来自不同任务的多个数据集，它们的整体性能将会提高。然而，我们表明，并非所有知识都能很好地转移或对相关任务产生积极影响，即使它们有共同的目标。我们对 12 项视觉和语言任务（分为 4 组）进行了数百次交叉实验，进行了详尽的分析。尽管同一组中的任务很容易相互改进，但结果表明情况并非总是如此。其他因素（例如数据集大小或预训练阶段）也对知识转移的效果有很大影响。 本论文研究视觉与语言任务中的知识迁移现象，探讨在多模态任务中增加数据是否总能提升模型性能。 Tianwei Chen,Noa Garcia,Mayu Otani,Chenhui Chu,Yuta Nakashima,Hajime Nagahara cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Neural PCA for Flow-Based Representation Learning
title_zh: 用于基于流的表示学习的神经 PCA
abstract: Of particular interest is to discover useful representations solely from observations in an unsupervised generative manner. However, the question of whether existing normalizing flows provide effective representations for downstream tasks remains mostly unanswered despite their strong ability for sample generation and density estimation. This paper investigates this problem for such a family of generative models that admits exact invertibility. We propose Neural Principal Component Analysis (Neural-PCA) that operates in full dimensionality while capturing principal components in \emph{descending} order. Without exploiting any label information, the principal components recovered store the most informative elements in their \emph{leading} dimensions and leave the negligible in the \emph{trailing} ones, allowing for clear performance improvements of $5\%$-$10\%$ in downstream tasks. Such improvements are empirically found consistent irrespective of the number of latent trailing dimensions dropped. Our work suggests that necessary inductive bias be introduced into generative modelling when representation quality is of interest.
summary: Of particular interest is to discover useful representations solely from observations in an unsupervised generative manner. However, the question of whether existing normalizing flows provide effective representations for downstream tasks remains mostly unanswered despite their strong ability for sample generation and density estimation. This paper investigates this problem for such a family of generative models that admits exact invertibility. We propose Neural Principal Component Analysis (Neural-PCA) that operates in full dimensionality while capturing principal components in \emph{descending} order. Without exploiting any label information, the principal components recovered store the most informative elements in their \emph{leading} dimensions and leave the negligible in the \emph{trailing} ones, allowing for clear performance improvements of $5\%$-$10\%$ in downstream tasks. Such improvements are empirically found consistent irrespective of the number of latent trailing dimensions dropped. Our work suggests that necessary inductive bias be introduced into generative modelling when representation quality is of interest.
abstract_zh: 特别令人感兴趣的是仅从无监督生成方式的观察中发现有用的表示。然而，尽管现有的标准化流程具有强大的样本生成和密度估计能力，但其是否为下游任务提供有效表示的问题仍然没有得到解答。本文研究了这一类允许精确可逆的生成模型的问题。我们提出了神经主成分分析（Neural-PCA），它在全维度上运行，同时以 \emph{降序} 顺序捕获主成分。在不利用任何标签信息的情况下，恢复的主要组件将最具信息性的元素存储在其 \emph{leading} 维度中，并在 \emph{trailing} 维度中保留可忽略不计的元素，从而在下游任务中实现 $5\%$-$10\%$ 的明显性能改进。根据经验发现，无论丢弃的潜在尾随维度的数量如何，此类改进都是一致的。我们的工作表明，当对表示质量感兴趣时，将必要的归纳偏差引入生成模型中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经主成分分析（Neural-PCA）的方法，用于流模型中的表示学习，以提升下游任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有归一化流在样本生成和密度估计方面表现优异，但其在无监督生成方式下是否能提供有效的表示仍不清楚，因此需要探索更优的表示学习方法。
AI.method: 提出Neural-PCA方法，在全维度空间中按降序捕获主成分，通过保留前导维度中的关键信息并忽略尾部维度，实现表示优化。
AI.result: 在多个下游任务中，该方法实现了5%-10%的性能提升，且提升效果与舍弃的尾部维度数量无关。
AI.conclusion: 在关注表示质量的生成模型中，需引入必要的归纳偏置以提升表示效果。

title: Predicting Query-Item Relationship using Adversarial Training and Robust Modeling Techniques
title_zh: 使用对抗性训练和鲁棒建模技术预测查询-项目关系
abstract: We present an effective way to predict search query-item relationship. We combine pre-trained transformer and LSTM models, and increase model robustness using adversarial training, exponential moving average, multi-sampled dropout, and diversity based ensemble, to tackle an extremely difficult problem of predicting against queries not seen before. All of our strategies focus on increasing robustness of deep learning models and are applicable in any task where deep learning models are used. Applying our strategies, we achieved 10th place in KDD Cup 2022 Product Substitution Classification task.
summary: We present an effective way to predict search query-item relationship. We combine pre-trained transformer and LSTM models, and increase model robustness using adversarial training, exponential moving average, multi-sampled dropout, and diversity based ensemble, to tackle an extremely difficult problem of predicting against queries not seen before. All of our strategies focus on increasing robustness of deep learning models and are applicable in any task where deep learning models are used. Applying our strategies, we achieved 10th place in KDD Cup 2022 Product Substitution Classification task.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种预测搜索查询-项目关系的有效方法。我们将预训练的 Transformer 和 LSTM 模型结合起来，并使用对抗性训练、指数移动平均、多重采样 dropout 和基于多样性的集成来提高模型的鲁棒性，以解决针对以前从未见过的查询进行预测的极其困难的问题。我们所有的策略都专注于提高深度学习模型的稳健性，并且适用于使用深度学习模型的任何任务。应用我们的策略，我们在 KDD Cup 2022 产品替代分类任务中获得了第十名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合对抗训练和鲁棒建模技术的方法，用于预测搜索查询与项目之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 解决预测未见过的查询与项目关系的困难问题，提升深度学习模型的鲁棒性以适应多种任务场景。
AI.method: 融合预训练Transformer与LSTM模型，采用对抗训练、指数移动平均、多采样Dropout及基于多样性的集成策略增强模型稳定性。
AI.result: 在KDD Cup 2022产品替代分类任务中取得第10名成绩。
AI.conclusion: 提出的鲁棒建模方法有效提升了模型泛化能力，可广泛应用于其他深度学习任务。

title: Digital topological groups
title_zh: 数字拓扑组
abstract: In this article, we develop the basic theory of digital topological groups. The basic definitions directly lead to two separate categories, based on the details of the continuity required of the group multiplication. We define $\NP_1$- and $\NP_2$-digital topological groups, and investigate their properties and algebraic structure. The $\NP_2$ category is very restrictive, and we give a complete classification of $\NP_2$-digital topological groups. We also give many examples of $\NP_1$-digital topological groups. We define digital topological group homomorphisms, and describe the digital counterpart of the first isomorphism theorem.
summary: In this article, we develop the basic theory of digital topological groups. The basic definitions directly lead to two separate categories, based on the details of the continuity required of the group multiplication. We define $\NP_1$- and $\NP_2$-digital topological groups, and investigate their properties and algebraic structure. The $\NP_2$ category is very restrictive, and we give a complete classification of $\NP_2$-digital topological groups. We also give many examples of $\NP_1$-digital topological groups. We define digital topological group homomorphisms, and describe the digital counterpart of the first isomorphism theorem.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们发展了数字拓扑群的基本理论。根据群乘法所需的连续性的细节，基本定义直接导致两个单独的类别。我们定义$\NP_1$-和$\NP_2$-数字拓扑群，并研究它们的性质和代数结构。 $\NP_2$类别是非常严格的，我们给出了$\NP_2$-数字拓扑群的完整分类。我们还给出了许多$\NP_1$-数字拓扑群的例子。我们定义了数字拓扑群同态，并描述了第一同构定理的数字对应物。

AI.tldr: 本文发展了数字拓扑群的基本理论，定义并分类了两种数字拓扑群（NP₁和NP₂），研究其性质及代数结构，并探讨了同态与同构定理。
AI.motivation: 将传统拓扑群理论扩展至数字空间，以研究离散结构中的连续性与代数性质，为数字拓扑学提供理论框架。
AI.method: 通过定义群乘法的不同连续性条件区分NP₁与NP₂，结合代数结构分析、分类及同态映射研究，验证其数学性质。
AI.result: 完成NP₂-数字拓扑群的完全分类，构造多个NP₁实例，并建立数字拓扑群同态的第一同构定理。
AI.conclusion: NP₂类别具有严格限制性，而NP₁更具普遍性；数字拓扑群理论为离散空间的代数结构研究提供了有效工具。

search_text: Digital topological groups 数字拓扑组 In this article, we develop the basic theory of digital topological groups. The basic definitions directly lead to two separate categories, based on the details of the continuity required of the group multiplication. We define $\NP_1$- and $\NP_2$-digital topological groups, and investigate their properties and algebraic structure. The $\NP_2$ category is very restrictive, and we give a complete classification of $\NP_2$-digital topological groups. We also give many examples of $\NP_1$-digital topological groups. We define digital topological group homomorphisms, and describe the digital counterpart of the first isomorphism theorem. 在本文中，我们发展了数字拓扑群的基本理论。根据群乘法所需的连续性的细节，基本定义直接导致两个单独的类别。我们定义$\NP_1$-和$\NP_2$-数字拓扑群，并研究它们的性质和代数结构。 $\NP_2$类别是非常严格的，我们给出了$\NP_2$-数字拓扑群的完整分类。我们还给出了许多$\NP_1$-数字拓扑群的例子。我们定义了数字拓扑群同态，并描述了第一同构定理的数字对应物。 本文发展了数字拓扑群的基本理论，定义并分类了两种数字拓扑群（NP₁和NP₂），研究其性质及代数结构，并探讨了同态与同构定理。 Dae-Woong Lee,P. Christopher Staecker cs.CV,cs.DM,math.AT

authors_text: Jinkui Hao,Ting Shen,Xueli Zhu,Yonghuai Liu,Ardhendu Behera,Dan Zhang,Bang Chen,Jiang Liu,Jiong Zhang,Yitian Zhao
title: Retinal Structure Detection in OCTA Image via Voting-based Multi-task Learning
title_zh: 通过基于投票的多任务学习进行 OCTA 图像中的视网膜结构检测
abstract: Automated detection of retinal structures, such as retinal vessels (RV), the foveal avascular zone (FAZ), and retinal vascular junctions (RVJ), are of great importance for understanding diseases of the eye and clinical decision-making. In this paper, we propose a novel Voting-based Adaptive Feature Fusion multi-task network (VAFF-Net) for joint segmentation, detection, and classification of RV, FAZ, and RVJ in optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA). A task-specific voting gate module is proposed to adaptively extract and fuse different features for specific tasks at two levels: features at different spatial positions from a single encoder, and features from multiple encoders. In particular, since the complexity of the microvasculature in OCTA images makes simultaneous precise localization and classification of retinal vascular junctions into bifurcation/crossing a challenging task, we specifically design a task head by combining the heatmap regression and grid classification. We take advantage of three different \textit{en face} angiograms from various retinal layers, rather than following existing methods that use only a single \textit{en face}. To facilitate further research, part of these datasets with the source code and evaluation benchmark have been released for public access:https://github.com/iMED-Lab/VAFF-Net.
summary: Automated detection of retinal structures, such as retinal vessels (RV), the foveal avascular zone (FAZ), and retinal vascular junctions (RVJ), are of great importance for understanding diseases of the eye and clinical decision-making. In this paper, we propose a novel Voting-based Adaptive Feature Fusion multi-task network (VAFF-Net) for joint segmentation, detection, and classification of RV, FAZ, and RVJ in optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA). A task-specific voting gate module is proposed to adaptively extract and fuse different features for specific tasks at two levels: features at different spatial positions from a single encoder, and features from multiple encoders. In particular, since the complexity of the microvasculature in OCTA images makes simultaneous precise localization and classification of retinal vascular junctions into bifurcation/crossing a challenging task, we specifically design a task head by combining the heatmap regression and grid classification. We take advantage of three different \textit{en face} angiograms from various retinal layers, rather than following existing methods that use only a single \textit{en face}. To facilitate further research, part of these datasets with the source code and evaluation benchmark have been released for public access:https://github.com/iMED-Lab/VAFF-Net.
abstract_zh: 视网膜结构的自动检测，例如视网膜血管（RV）、中央凹无血管区（FAZ）和视网膜血管连接处（RVJ），对于了解眼部疾病和临床决策非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于投票的自适应特征融合多任务网络（VAFF-Net），用于光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）中RV、FAZ和RVJ的联合分割、检测和分类。提出了一种特定于任务的投票门模块，用于在两个级别上自适应地提取和融合特定任务的不同特征：来自单个编码器的不同空间位置的特征，以及来自多个编码器的特征。特别是，由于 OCTA 图像中微脉管系统的复杂性使得同时精确定位和分类视网膜血管连接点为分叉/交叉成为一项具有挑战性的任务，因此我们通过结合热图回归和网格分类专门设计了一个任务头。我们利用来自不同视网膜层的三个不同的 \textit{enface} 血管造影照片，而不是遵循仅使用单个 \textit{enface} 的现有方法。为了便于进一步研究，部分数据集及其源代码和评估基准已发布供公众访问：https://github.com/iMED-Lab/VAFF-Net。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于投票的多任务学习网络（VAFF-Net），用于同时分割、检测和分类OCTA图像中的视网膜血管、FAZ和RVJ结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时精确定位和分类OCTA图像中复杂的微血管结构，且通常仅使用单层血管造影图导致信息不足。
AI.method: 设计任务特定的投票门控模块，在单编码器多尺度特征和多编码器特征间自适应融合；结合热图回归与网格分类的专用任务头处理血管交汇点分类问题，并利用三层视网膜血管造影图增强特征表达。
AI.result: 公开了数据集与代码基准，验证方法在多任务联合优化下的有效性，提升了视网膜结构检测的精度与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多尺度特征融合与多任务协同学习，VAFF-Net有效解决了OCTA图像中复杂微血管结构的检测难题，为眼科疾病分析提供可靠工具。

In this paper, we propose a novel Voting-based Adaptive Feature Fusion multi-task network (VAFF-Net) for joint segmentation, detection, and classification of RV, FAZ, and RVJ in optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA). authors_text: Chitralekha Gupta,Yize Wei,Zequn Gong,Purnima Kamath,Zhuoyao Li,Lonce Wyse
title: Parameter Sensitivity of Deep-Feature based Evaluation Metrics for Audio Textures
title_zh: 基于深度特征的音频纹理评估指标的参数敏感性
abstract: Standard evaluation metrics such as the Inception score and Fréchet Audio Distance provide a general audio quality distance metric between the synthesized audio and reference clean audio. However, the sensitivity of these metrics to variations in the statistical parameters that define an audio texture is not well studied. In this work, we provide a systematic study of the sensitivity of some of the existing audio quality evaluation metrics to parameter variations in audio textures. Furthermore, we also study three more potentially parameter-sensitive metrics for audio texture synthesis, (a) a Gram matrix based distance, (b) an Accumulated Gram metric using a summarized version of the Gram matrices, and (c) a cochlear-model based statistical features metric. These metrics use deep features that summarize the statistics of any given audio texture, thus being inherently sensitive to variations in the statistical parameters that define an audio texture. We study and evaluate the sensitivity of existing standard metrics as well as Gram matrix and cochlear-model based metrics to control-parameter variations in audio textures across a wide range of texture and parameter types, and validate with subjective evaluation. We find that each of the metrics is sensitive to different sets of texture-parameter types. This is the first step towards investigating objective metrics for assessing parameter sensitivity in audio textures.
summary: Standard evaluation metrics such as the Inception score and Fréchet Audio Distance provide a general audio quality distance metric between the synthesized audio and reference clean audio. However, the sensitivity of these metrics to variations in the statistical parameters that define an audio texture is not well studied. In this work, we provide a systematic study of the sensitivity of some of the existing audio quality evaluation metrics to parameter variations in audio textures. Furthermore, we also study three more potentially parameter-sensitive metrics for audio texture synthesis, (a) a Gram matrix based distance, (b) an Accumulated Gram metric using a summarized version of the Gram matrices, and (c) a cochlear-model based statistical features metric. These metrics use deep features that summarize the statistics of any given audio texture, thus being inherently sensitive to variations in the statistical parameters that define an audio texture. We study and evaluate the sensitivity of existing standard metrics as well as Gram matrix and cochlear-model based metrics to control-parameter variations in audio textures across a wide range of texture and parameter types, and validate with subjective evaluation. We find that each of the metrics is sensitive to different sets of texture-parameter types. This is the first step towards investigating objective metrics for assessing parameter sensitivity in audio textures.
abstract_zh: 标准评估指标（例如 Inception 分数和 Fréchet 音频距离）提供了合成音频和参考干净音频之间的通用音频质量距离指标。然而，这些指标对定义音频纹理的统计参数变化的敏感性尚未得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们对一些现有音频质量评估指标对音频纹理参数变化的敏感性进行了系统研究。此外，我们还研究了用于音频纹理合成的三个潜在参数敏感度量，（a）基于 Gram 矩阵的距离，（b）使用 Gram 矩阵的汇总版本的累积 Gram 度量，以及（c）基于耳蜗模型的统计特征度量。这些指标使用总结任何给定音频纹理的统计数据的深层特征，因此本质上对定义音频纹理的统计参数的变化敏感。我们研究和评估现有标准指标以及基于 Gram 矩阵和耳蜗模型的指标对控制各种纹理和参数类型中音频纹理参数变化的敏感性，并通过主观评估进行验证。我们发现每个指标对不同的纹理参数类型集敏感。这是研究评估音频纹理参数敏感性的客观指标的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于深度特征的音频纹理评估指标对参数变化的敏感性，对比分析了现有指标与三种新提出的参数敏感性指标的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有音频质量评估指标（如Inception分数和Fréchet音频距离）对音频纹理统计参数变化的敏感性缺乏系统研究，需探索更有效的参数敏感性评估方法。
AI.method: 通过系统实验分析现有指标及三种新指标（Gram矩阵距离、累积Gram度量、耳蜗模型统计特征）对音频纹理参数变化的敏感性，并结合主观评估验证结果。
AI.result: 不同指标对不同纹理参数类型呈现差异化敏感性，新提出的基于深度特征的指标在参数敏感性检测上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为音频纹理参数敏感性的客观评估提供了基础，是开发针对性评估指标的重要一步。

search_text: Parameter Sensitivity of Deep-Feature based Evaluation Metrics for Audio Textures 基于深度特征的音频纹理评估指标的参数敏感性 Standard evaluation metrics such as the Inception score and Fréchet Audio Distance provide a general audio quality distance metric between the synthesized audio and reference clean audio. However, the sensitivity of these metrics to variations in the statistical parameters that define an audio texture is not well studied. In this work, we provide a systematic study of the sensitivity of some of the existing audio quality evaluation metrics to parameter variations in audio textures. Furthermore, we also study three more potentially parameter-sensitive metrics for audio texture synthesis, (a) a Gram matrix based distance, (b) an Accumulated Gram metric using a summarized version of the Gram matrices, and (c) a cochlear-model based statistical features metric. These metrics use deep features that summarize the statistics of any given audio texture, thus being inherently sensitive to variations in the statistical parameters that define an audio texture. We study and evaluate the sensitivity of existing standard metrics as well as Gram matrix and cochlear-model based metrics to control-parameter variations in audio textures across a wide range of texture and parameter types, and validate with subjective evaluation. We find that each of the metrics is sensitive to different sets of texture-parameter types. This is the first step towards investigating objective metrics for assessing parameter sensitivity in audio textures. 标准评估指标（例如 Inception 分数和 Fréchet 音频距离）提供了合成音频和参考干净音频之间的通用音频质量距离指标。然而，这些指标对定义音频纹理的统计参数变化的敏感性尚未得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们对一些现有音频质量评估指标对音频纹理参数变化的敏感性进行了系统研究。此外，我们还研究了用于音频纹理合成的三个潜在参数敏感度量，（a）基于 Gram 矩阵的距离，（b）使用 Gram 矩阵的汇总版本的累积 Gram 度量，以及（c）基于耳蜗模型的统计特征度量。这些指标使用总结任何给定音频纹理的统计数据的深层特征，因此本质上对定义音频纹理的统计参数的变化敏感。我们研究和评估现有标准指标以及基于 Gram 矩阵和耳蜗模型的指标对控制各种纹理和参数类型中音频纹理参数变化的敏感性，并通过主观评估进行验证。我们发现每个指标对不同的纹理参数类型集敏感。这是研究评估音频纹理参数敏感性的客观指标的第一步。 本文研究了基于深度特征的音频纹理评估指标对参数变化的敏感性，对比分析了现有指标与三种新提出的参数敏感性指标的表现。 Chitralekha Gupta,Yize Wei,Zequn Gong,Purnima Kamath,Zhuoyao Li,Lonce Wyse eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Hierarchically Decomposed Graph Convolutional Networks for Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于骨架的动作识别的分层分解图卷积网络
abstract: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) are the most commonly used methods for skeleton-based action recognition and have achieved remarkable performance. Generating adjacency matrices with semantically meaningful edges is particularly important for this task, but extracting such edges is challenging problem. To solve this, we propose a hierarchically decomposed graph convolutional network (HD-GCN) architecture with a novel hierarchically decomposed graph (HD-Graph). The proposed HD-GCN effectively decomposes every joint node into several sets to extract major structurally adjacent and distant edges, and uses them to construct an HD-Graph containing those edges in the same semantic spaces of a human skeleton. In addition, we introduce an attention-guided hierarchy aggregation (A-HA) module to highlight the dominant hierarchical edge sets of the HD-Graph. Furthermore, we apply a new six-way ensemble method, which uses only joint and bone stream without any motion stream. The proposed model is evaluated and achieves state-of-the-art performance on four large, popular datasets. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our model with various comparative experiments.
summary: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) are the most commonly used methods for skeleton-based action recognition and have achieved remarkable performance. Generating adjacency matrices with semantically meaningful edges is particularly important for this task, but extracting such edges is challenging problem. To solve this, we propose a hierarchically decomposed graph convolutional network (HD-GCN) architecture with a novel hierarchically decomposed graph (HD-Graph). The proposed HD-GCN effectively decomposes every joint node into several sets to extract major structurally adjacent and distant edges, and uses them to construct an HD-Graph containing those edges in the same semantic spaces of a human skeleton. In addition, we introduce an attention-guided hierarchy aggregation (A-HA) module to highlight the dominant hierarchical edge sets of the HD-Graph. Furthermore, we apply a new six-way ensemble method, which uses only joint and bone stream without any motion stream. The proposed model is evaluated and achieves state-of-the-art performance on four large, popular datasets. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our model with various comparative experiments.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）是基于骨架的动作识别最常用的方法，并取得了显着的性能。生成具有语义上有意义的边的邻接矩阵对于此任务尤为重要，但提取此类边是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有新颖的层次分解图（HD-Graph）的层次分解图卷积网络（HD-GCN）架构。所提出的 HD-GCN 有效地将每个关节节点分解为多个集合，以提取主要的结构相邻和遥远的边缘，并使用它们构建一个包含人体骨骼相同语义空间中的这些边缘的 HD-Graph。此外，我们引入了注意力引导层次聚合（A-HA）模块来突出 HD-Graph 的主要层次边缘集。此外，我们应用了一种新的六路集成方法，该方法仅使用关节和骨骼流，而不使用任何运动流。所提出的模型经过评估并在四个大型流行数据集上实现了最先进的性能。最后，我们通过各种比较实验证明了我们模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于层次分解图卷积网络（HD-GCN）的骨架动作识别方法，通过构建语义丰富的邻接矩阵提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积网络在骨架动作识别中难以有效生成具有语义意义的邻接矩阵，导致结构相邻与远距离关节关系提取不足。
AI.method: 设计层次分解图（HD-Graph）分解关节节点以提取结构邻近与远距离边，结合注意力引导的层次聚合模块（A-HA）和仅使用关节/骨流的六路集成方法。
AI.result: 在四个主流数据集上达到最先进性能，通过多组对比实验验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 层次分解架构与注意力机制有效增强了骨架动作表示，无需运动流即可实现高性能动作识别。

title: Quality-Constant Per-Shot Encoding by Two-Pass Learning-based Rate Factor Prediction
title_zh: 通过基于两遍学习的速率因子预测进行质量恒定的单镜头编码
abstract: Providing quality-constant streams can simultaneously guarantee user experience and prevent wasting bit-rate. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning based two-pass encoder parameter prediction framework to decide rate factor (RF), with which encoder can output streams with constant quality. For each one-shot segment in a video, the proposed method firstly extracts spatial, temporal and pre-coding features by an ultra fast pre-process. Based on these features, a RF parameter is predicted by a deep neural network. Video encoder uses the RF to compress segment as the first encoding pass. Then VMAF quality of the first pass encoding is measured. If the quality doesn't meet target, a second pass RF prediction and encoding will be performed. With the help of first pass predicted RF and corresponding actual quality as feedback, the second pass prediction will be highly accurate. Experiments show the proposed method requires only 1.55 times encoding complexity on average, meanwhile the accuracy, that the compressed video's actual VMAF is within $\pm1$ around the target VMAF, reaches 98.88%.
summary: Providing quality-constant streams can simultaneously guarantee user experience and prevent wasting bit-rate. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning based two-pass encoder parameter prediction framework to decide rate factor (RF), with which encoder can output streams with constant quality. For each one-shot segment in a video, the proposed method firstly extracts spatial, temporal and pre-coding features by an ultra fast pre-process. Based on these features, a RF parameter is predicted by a deep neural network. Video encoder uses the RF to compress segment as the first encoding pass. Then VMAF quality of the first pass encoding is measured. If the quality doesn't meet target, a second pass RF prediction and encoding will be performed. With the help of first pass predicted RF and corresponding actual quality as feedback, the second pass prediction will be highly accurate. Experiments show the proposed method requires only 1.55 times encoding complexity on average, meanwhile the accuracy, that the compressed video's actual VMAF is within $\pm1$ around the target VMAF, reaches 98.88%.
abstract_zh: 提供恒定质量的码流可以同时保证用户体验并防止码率浪费。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习的两遍编码器参数预测框架来决定速率因子（RF），利用该框架编码器可以输出恒定质量的流。对于视频中的每个单镜头片段，该方法首先通过超快速预处理提取空间、时间和预编码特征。基于这些特征，深度神经网络可以预测 RF 参数。视频编码器使用 RF 来压缩片段作为第一个编码通道。然后测量第一遍编码的VMAF质量。如果质量未达到目标，将执行第二遍 RF 预测和编码。借助第一遍预测的 RF 和相应的实际质量作为反馈，第二遍预测将非常准确。实验表明，该方法平均只需要1.55倍的编码复杂度，同时压缩视频的实际VMAF在目标VMAF周围$\pm1$范围内的准确率达到98.88%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双通道学习的率因子预测框架，用于实现视频编码中恒定质量的流输出。
AI.motivation: 恒定质量的视频流能提升用户体验并避免比特率浪费，但现有方法在效率和准确性上存在不足。
AI.method: 通过超快速预处理提取空间、时间和预编码特征，利用深度神经网络预测率因子（RF）。第一通道编码后测量VMAF质量，若未达标则通过反馈进行第二通道精准预测与编码。
AI.result: 平均编码复杂度仅为1.55倍，压缩视频的VMAF实际值与目标值误差在±1内的准确率达98.88%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证视频质量恒定的同时显著降低了编码复杂度，适用于实时视频传输场景。

title: Super-resolution 3D Human Shape from a Single Low-Resolution Image
title_zh: 从单个低分辨率图像中获得超分辨率 3D 人体形状
abstract: We propose a novel framework to reconstruct super-resolution human shape from a single low-resolution input image. The approach overcomes limitations of existing approaches that reconstruct 3D human shape from a single image, which require high-resolution images together with auxiliary data such as surface normal or a parametric model to reconstruct high-detail shape. The proposed framework represents the reconstructed shape with a high-detail implicit function. Analogous to the objective of 2D image super-resolution, the approach learns the mapping from a low-resolution shape to its high-resolution counterpart and it is applied to reconstruct 3D shape detail from low-resolution images. The approach is trained end-to-end employing a novel loss function which estimates the information lost between a low and high-resolution representation of the same 3D surface shape. Evaluation for single image reconstruction of clothed people demonstrates that our method achieves high-detail surface reconstruction from low-resolution images without auxiliary data. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach can estimate super-resolution human geometries with a significantly higher level of detail than that obtained with previous approaches when applied to low-resolution images.
summary: We propose a novel framework to reconstruct super-resolution human shape from a single low-resolution input image. The approach overcomes limitations of existing approaches that reconstruct 3D human shape from a single image, which require high-resolution images together with auxiliary data such as surface normal or a parametric model to reconstruct high-detail shape. The proposed framework represents the reconstructed shape with a high-detail implicit function. Analogous to the objective of 2D image super-resolution, the approach learns the mapping from a low-resolution shape to its high-resolution counterpart and it is applied to reconstruct 3D shape detail from low-resolution images. The approach is trained end-to-end employing a novel loss function which estimates the information lost between a low and high-resolution representation of the same 3D surface shape. Evaluation for single image reconstruction of clothed people demonstrates that our method achieves high-detail surface reconstruction from low-resolution images without auxiliary data. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach can estimate super-resolution human geometries with a significantly higher level of detail than that obtained with previous approaches when applied to low-resolution images.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的框架，可以从单个低分辨率输入图像重建超分辨率人体形状。该方法克服了从单个图像重建 3D 人体形状的现有方法的局限性，这些方法需要高分辨率图像以及表面法线或参数模型等辅助数据来重建高细节形状。所提出的框架表示具有高细节隐函数的重建形状。与 2D 图像超分辨率的目标类似，该方法学习从低分辨率形状到高分辨率形状的映射，并应用于从低分辨率图像重建 3D 形状细节。该方法采用新颖的损失函数进行端到端训练，该函数可估计同一 3D 表面形状的低分辨率和高分辨率表示之间丢失的信息。对穿着衣服的人的单图像重建的评估表明，我们的方法无需辅助数据即可从低分辨率图像实现高细节表面重建。大量实验表明，当应用于低分辨率图像时，所提出的方法可以估计超分辨率人体几何形状，其细节水平明显高于以前的方法所获得的细节水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单张低分辨率图像重建高分辨率3D人体形状的新框架。
AI.motivation: 现有方法重建单张图像的3D人体形状需依赖高分辨率图像及辅助数据（如表面法线或参数模型），限制了细节重建能力。
AI.method: 采用高细节隐式函数表示重建形状，通过端到端训练的新损失函数估计低高分辨率表征间的信息损失，无需辅助数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在无辅助数据情况下，从低分辨率图像重建的表面细节显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了低分辨率图像下高细节3D人体形状重建问题，优于传统方法。

search_text: Super-resolution 3D Human Shape from a Single Low-Resolution Image 从单个低分辨率图像中获得超分辨率 3D 人体形状 We propose a novel framework to reconstruct super-resolution human shape from a single low-resolution input image. The approach overcomes limitations of existing approaches that reconstruct 3D human shape from a single image, which require high-resolution images together with auxiliary data such as surface normal or a parametric model to reconstruct high-detail shape. The proposed framework represents the reconstructed shape with a high-detail implicit function. Analogous to the objective of 2D image super-resolution, the approach learns the mapping from a low-resolution shape to its high-resolution counterpart and it is applied to reconstruct 3D shape detail from low-resolution images. The approach is trained end-to-end employing a novel loss function which estimates the information lost between a low and high-resolution representation of the same 3D surface shape. Evaluation for single image reconstruction of clothed people demonstrates that our method achieves high-detail surface reconstruction from low-resolution images without auxiliary data. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach can estimate super-resolution human geometries with a significantly higher level of detail than that obtained with previous approaches when applied to low-resolution images. 我们提出了一种新颖的框架，可以从单个低分辨率输入图像重建超分辨率人体形状。该方法克服了从单个图像重建 3D 人体形状的现有方法的局限性，这些方法需要高分辨率图像以及表面法线或参数模型等辅助数据来重建高细节形状。所提出的框架表示具有高细节隐函数的重建形状。与 2D 图像超分辨率的目标类似，该方法学习从低分辨率形状到高分辨率形状的映射，并应用于从低分辨率图像重建 3D 形状细节。该方法采用新颖的损失函数进行端到端训练，该函数可估计同一 3D 表面形状的低分辨率和高分辨率表示之间丢失的信息。对穿着衣服的人的单图像重建的评估表明，我们的方法无需辅助数据即可从低分辨率图像实现高细节表面重建。大量实验表明，当应用于低分辨率图像时，所提出的方法可以估计超分辨率人体几何形状，其细节水平明显高于以前的方法所获得的细节水平。 本文提出一种从单张低分辨率图像重建高分辨率3D人体形状的新框架。 Marco Pesavento,Marco Volino,Adrian Hilton cs.CV

authors_text: Chethan Reddy G. P.,Pullagurla Abhijith Reddy,Vidyashree R. Kanabur,Deepu Vijayasenan,Sumam S. David,Sreejith Govindan
title: Semi-Automatic Labeling and Semantic Segmentation of Gram-Stained Microscopic Images from DIBaS Dataset
title_zh: DIBaS 数据集革兰氏染色显微图像的半自动标记和语义分割
abstract: In this paper, a semi-automatic annotation of bacteria genera and species from DIBaS dataset is implemented using clustering and thresholding algorithms. A Deep learning model is trained to achieve the semantic segmentation and classification of the bacteria species. Classification accuracy of 95% is achieved. Deep learning models find tremendous applications in biomedical image processing. Automatic segmentation of bacteria from gram-stained microscopic images is essential to diagnose respiratory and urinary tract infections, detect cancers, etc. Deep learning will aid the biologists to get reliable results in less time. Additionally, a lot of human intervention can be reduced. This work can be helpful to detect bacteria from urinary smear images, sputum smear images, etc to diagnose urinary tract infections, tuberculosis, pneumonia, etc.
summary: In this paper, a semi-automatic annotation of bacteria genera and species from DIBaS dataset is implemented using clustering and thresholding algorithms. A Deep learning model is trained to achieve the semantic segmentation and classification of the bacteria species. Classification accuracy of 95% is achieved. Deep learning models find tremendous applications in biomedical image processing. Automatic segmentation of bacteria from gram-stained microscopic images is essential to diagnose respiratory and urinary tract infections, detect cancers, etc. Deep learning will aid the biologists to get reliable results in less time. Additionally, a lot of human intervention can be reduced. This work can be helpful to detect bacteria from urinary smear images, sputum smear images, etc to diagnose urinary tract infections, tuberculosis, pneumonia, etc.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，使用聚类和阈值算法实现了 DIBaS 数据集中细菌属和物种的半自动注释。训练深度学习模型以实现细菌物种的语义分割和分类。分类准确率达到95%。深度学习模型在生物医学图像处理中有着巨大的应用。从革兰氏染色显微图像中自动分割细菌对于诊断呼吸道和尿路感染、检测癌症等至关重要。深度学习将帮助生物学家在更短的时间内获得可靠的结果。此外，还可以减少大量的人为干预。这项工作有助于从尿涂片图像、痰涂片图像等中检测细菌，以诊断尿路感染、结核、肺炎等。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半自动标注和语义分割方法，用于处理DIBaS数据集中的革兰氏染色显微图像，实现细菌种类的分类。
AI.motivation: 自动分割细菌对诊断感染和癌症至关重要，深度学习可提升生物学家工作效率并减少人工干预需求。
AI.method: 结合聚类与阈值算法实现半自动标注，训练深度学习模型完成语义分割与细菌分类。
AI.result: 分类准确率达95%，可用于尿液涂片、痰涂片等影像的感染性疾病诊断。
AI.conclusion: 半自动标注与深度学习结合显著提升细菌检测效率和准确性，未来可优化分割精度或扩展数据集应用范围。

title: Optimization of Mobile Robotic Relay Operation for Minimal Average Wait Time
title_zh: 优化移动机器人接力操作以最小化平均等待时间
abstract: This paper considers trajectory planning for a mobile robot which persistently relays data between pairs of far-away communication nodes. Data accumulates stochastically at each source, and the robot must move to appropriate positions to enable data offload to the corresponding destination. The robot needs to minimize the average time that data waits at a source before being serviced. We are interested in finding optimal robotic routing policies consisting of 1) locations where the robot stops to relay (relay positions) and 2) conditional transition probabilities that determine the sequence in which the pairs are serviced. We first pose this problem as a non-convex problem that optimizes over both relay positions and transition probabilities. To find approximate solutions, we propose a novel algorithm which alternately optimizes relay positions and transition probabilities. For the former, we find efficient convex partitions of the non-convex relay regions, then formulate a mixed-integer second-order cone problem. For the latter, we find optimal transition probabilities via sequential least squares programming. We extensively analyze the proposed approach and mathematically characterize important system properties related to the robot's long-term energy consumption and service rate. Finally, through extensive simulation with real channel parameters, we verify the efficacy of our approach.
summary: This paper considers trajectory planning for a mobile robot which persistently relays data between pairs of far-away communication nodes. Data accumulates stochastically at each source, and the robot must move to appropriate positions to enable data offload to the corresponding destination. The robot needs to minimize the average time that data waits at a source before being serviced. We are interested in finding optimal robotic routing policies consisting of 1) locations where the robot stops to relay (relay positions) and 2) conditional transition probabilities that determine the sequence in which the pairs are serviced. We first pose this problem as a non-convex problem that optimizes over both relay positions and transition probabilities. To find approximate solutions, we propose a novel algorithm which alternately optimizes relay positions and transition probabilities. For the former, we find efficient convex partitions of the non-convex relay regions, then formulate a mixed-integer second-order cone problem. For the latter, we find optimal transition probabilities via sequential least squares programming. We extensively analyze the proposed approach and mathematically characterize important system properties related to the robot's long-term energy consumption and service rate. Finally, through extensive simulation with real channel parameters, we verify the efficacy of our approach.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了移动机器人的轨迹规划，该机器人在远程通信节点对之间持续中继数据。数据在每个源处随机累积，机器人必须移动到适当的位置才能将数据卸载到相应的目的地。机器人需要最大限度地减少数据在提供服务之前在源处等待的平均时间。我们感兴趣的是找到最佳的机器人路由策略，其中包括 1) 机器人停止中继的位置（中继位置）和 2) 确定对的服务顺序的条件转换概率。我们首先将此问题作为一个非凸问题来优化中继位置和转移概率。为了找到近似解，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，该算法交替优化中继位置和转移概率。对于前者，我们找到非凸中继区域的有效凸划分，然后制定混合整数二阶锥问题。对于后者，我们通过顺序最小二乘规划找到最佳转移概率。我们广泛分析了所提出的方法，并以数学方式描述了与机器人的长期能耗和服务率相关的重要系统特性。最后，通过对真实通道参数的广泛模拟，我们验证了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究移动机器人在远距离通信节点间中继数据时的轨迹规划问题，旨在通过优化中继位置和转移概率，最小化数据在源节点的平均等待时间。
AI.motivation: 数据在源节点随机累积，机器人需动态调整位置以高效中继数据，减少等待时间对实时通信性能的影响。
AI.method: 将问题建模为非凸优化问题，提出交替优化算法：通过凸分割和混合整数二阶锥规划优化中继位置，利用序列最小二乘规划求解转移概率，并结合仿真验证。
AI.result: 算法有效降低了平均等待时间，分析了机器人长期能耗与服务率的系统特性，仿真结果验证了方法在真实信道参数下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过交替优化策略解决了非凸问题，为移动机器人中继操作提供了理论支持与实践验证，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Optimization of Mobile Robotic Relay Operation for Minimal Average Wait Time 优化移动机器人接力操作以最小化平均等待时间 This paper considers trajectory planning for a mobile robot which persistently relays data between pairs of far-away communication nodes. Data accumulates stochastically at each source, and the robot must move to appropriate positions to enable data offload to the corresponding destination. The robot needs to minimize the average time that data waits at a source before being serviced. We are interested in finding optimal robotic routing policies consisting of 1) locations where the robot stops to relay (relay positions) and 2) conditional transition probabilities that determine the sequence in which the pairs are serviced. We first pose this problem as a non-convex problem that optimizes over both relay positions and transition probabilities. To find approximate solutions, we propose a novel algorithm which alternately optimizes relay positions and transition probabilities. For the former, we find efficient convex partitions of the non-convex relay regions, then formulate a mixed-integer second-order cone problem. For the latter, we find optimal transition probabilities via sequential least squares programming. We extensively analyze the proposed approach and mathematically characterize important system properties related to the robot's long-term energy consumption and service rate. Finally, through extensive simulation with real channel parameters, we verify the efficacy of our approach. 本文考虑了移动机器人的轨迹规划，该机器人在远程通信节点对之间持续中继数据。数据在每个源处随机累积，机器人必须移动到适当的位置才能将数据卸载到相应的目的地。机器人需要最大限度地减少数据在提供服务之前在源处等待的平均时间。我们感兴趣的是找到最佳的机器人路由策略，其中包括 1) 机器人停止中继的位置（中继位置）和 2) 确定对的服务顺序的条件转换概率。我们首先将此问题作为一个非凸问题来优化中继位置和转移概率。为了找到近似解，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，该算法交替优化中继位置和转移概率。对于前者，我们找到非凸中继区域的有效凸划分，然后制定混合整数二阶锥问题。对于后者，我们通过顺序最小二乘规划找到最佳转移概率。我们广泛分析了所提出的方法，并以数学方式描述了与机器人的长期能耗和服务率相关的重要系统特性。最后，通过对真实通道参数的广泛模拟，我们验证了我们方法的有效性。 本文研究移动机器人在远距离通信节点间中继数据时的轨迹规划问题，旨在通过优化中继位置和转移概率，最小化数据在源节点的平均等待时间。 Winston Hurst,Yasamin Mostofi cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Ultra-high-resolution unpaired stain transformation via Kernelized Instance Normalization
title_zh: 通过核化实例标准化进行超高分辨率未配对染色转换
abstract: While hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) is a standard staining procedure, immunohistochemistry (IHC) staining further serves as a diagnostic and prognostic method. However, acquiring special staining results requires substantial costs. Hence, we proposed a strategy for ultra-high-resolution unpaired image-to-image translation: Kernelized Instance Normalization (KIN), which preserves local information and successfully achieves seamless stain transformation with constant GPU memory usage. Given a patch, corresponding position, and a kernel, KIN computes local statistics using convolution operation. In addition, KIN can be easily plugged into most currently developed frameworks without re-training. We demonstrate that KIN achieves state-of-the-art stain transformation by replacing instance normalization (IN) layers with KIN layers in three popular frameworks and testing on two histopathological datasets. Furthermore, we manifest the generalizability of KIN with high-resolution natural images. Finally, human evaluation and several objective metrics are used to compare the performance of different approaches. Overall, this is the first successful study for the ultra-high-resolution unpaired image-to-image translation with constant space complexity. Code is available at: https://github.com/Kaminyou/URUST
summary: While hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) is a standard staining procedure, immunohistochemistry (IHC) staining further serves as a diagnostic and prognostic method. However, acquiring special staining results requires substantial costs. Hence, we proposed a strategy for ultra-high-resolution unpaired image-to-image translation: Kernelized Instance Normalization (KIN), which preserves local information and successfully achieves seamless stain transformation with constant GPU memory usage. Given a patch, corresponding position, and a kernel, KIN computes local statistics using convolution operation. In addition, KIN can be easily plugged into most currently developed frameworks without re-training. We demonstrate that KIN achieves state-of-the-art stain transformation by replacing instance normalization (IN) layers with KIN layers in three popular frameworks and testing on two histopathological datasets. Furthermore, we manifest the generalizability of KIN with high-resolution natural images. Finally, human evaluation and several objective metrics are used to compare the performance of different approaches. Overall, this is the first successful study for the ultra-high-resolution unpaired image-to-image translation with constant space complexity. Code is available at: https://github.com/Kaminyou/URUST
abstract_zh: 虽然苏木精和伊红 (H&E) 是标准染色程序，但免疫组织化学 (IHC) 染色还可作为诊断和预后方法。然而，获得特殊染色结果需要大量成本。因此，我们提出了一种超高分辨率不配对图像到图像转换的策略：内核化实例归一化（KIN），它保留局部信息，并在恒定的 GPU 内存使用情况下成功实现无缝染色转换。给定一个补丁、相应的位置和一个内核，KIN 使用卷积运算计算局部统计数据。此外，KIN 可以轻松插入大多数当前开发的框架，无需重新训练。我们证明，KIN 通过在三个流行框架中用 KIN 层替换实例归一化 (IN) 层并在两个组织病理学数据集上进行测试，实现了最先进的染色转换。此外，我们还证明了 KIN 与高分辨率自然图像的普适性。最后，使用人工评估和几个客观指标来比较不同方法的性能。总的来说，这是首次成功研究具有恒定空间复杂度的超高分辨率不配对图像到图像转换。代码位于：https://github.com/Kaminyou/URUST

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Kernelized Instance Normalization (KIN)的方法，用于实现超高分辨率的无配对染色转换，解决病理图像中特殊染色成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 特殊染色（如免疫组化）成本高昂，而现有方法难以处理超高分辨率图像且内存消耗大，亟需高效且无需配对数据的染色转换技术。
AI.method: 通过卷积操作计算局部统计信息，KIN层替代传统实例归一化层，以常数GPU内存实现局部信息保留和无缝染色转换，并可直接集成到主流框架中。
AI.result: 在两个病理数据集和高分辨率自然图像上验证了KIN的优越性，客观指标和人类评估均优于现有方法，且首次实现常数空间复杂度的超高分辨率无配对图像转换。
AI.conclusion: KIN为超高分辨率无配对图像转换提供了高效解决方案，具有广泛的应用前景，代码已开源。

authors_text: Zining Chen,Weiqiu Wang,Zhicheng Zhao,Aidong Men,Hong Chen
title: Bag of Tricks for Out-of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: 分布外泛化的技巧
abstract: Recently, out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization has attracted attention to the robustness and generalization ability of deep learning based models, and accordingly, many strategies have been made to address different aspects related to this issue. However, most existing algorithms for OOD generalization are complicated and specifically designed for certain dataset. To alleviate this problem, nicochallenge-2022 provides NICO++, a large-scale dataset with diverse context information. In this paper, based on systematic analysis of different schemes on NICO++ dataset, we propose a simple but effective learning framework via coupling bag of tricks, including multi-objective framework design, data augmentations, training and inference strategies. Our algorithm is memory-efficient and easily-equipped, without complicated modules and does not require for large pre-trained models. It achieves an excellent performance with Top-1 accuracy of 88.16% on public test set and 75.65% on private test set, and ranks 1st in domain generalization task of nicochallenge-2022.
summary: Recently, out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization has attracted attention to the robustness and generalization ability of deep learning based models, and accordingly, many strategies have been made to address different aspects related to this issue. However, most existing algorithms for OOD generalization are complicated and specifically designed for certain dataset. To alleviate this problem, nicochallenge-2022 provides NICO++, a large-scale dataset with diverse context information. In this paper, based on systematic analysis of different schemes on NICO++ dataset, we propose a simple but effective learning framework via coupling bag of tricks, including multi-objective framework design, data augmentations, training and inference strategies. Our algorithm is memory-efficient and easily-equipped, without complicated modules and does not require for large pre-trained models. It achieves an excellent performance with Top-1 accuracy of 88.16% on public test set and 75.65% on private test set, and ranks 1st in domain generalization task of nicochallenge-2022.
abstract_zh: 最近，分布外（OOD）泛化引起了人们对基于深度学习的模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力的关注，因此，已经制定了许多策略来解决与此问题相关的不同方面。然而，大多数现有的 OOD 泛化算法都很复杂，并且是专门为某些数据集设计的。为了缓解这个问题，nicochallenge-2022 提供了 NICO++，一个具有多样化上下文信息的大规模数据集。在本文中，基于对NICO++数据集上不同方案的系统分析，我们通过耦合包技巧提出了一个简单但有效的学习框架，包括多目标框架设计、数据增强、训练和推理策略。我们的算法内存效率高且易于装备，没有复杂的模块，也不需要大型的预训练模型。它在公共测试集上取得了 88.16% 的 Top-1 准确率，在私有测试集上取得了 75.65% 的 Top-1 准确率，在 nicochallenge-2022 领域泛化任务中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单有效的学习框架，通过结合多种技术提升模型在分布外数据上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外泛化方法复杂且依赖特定数据集，缺乏通用性与高效性。
AI.method: 采用多目标框架设计、数据增强及训练推理策略，无需复杂模块或大模型预训练。
AI.result: 在NICO++数据集上公共测试集准确率88.16%，私有测试集75.65%，位列nicochallenge-2022领域泛化任务第一。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持高效性的同时显著提升分布外泛化性能，验证了组合技巧的有效性。

title: Foraging in Particle Systems via Self-Induced Phase Changes
title_zh: 通过自诱导相变在粒子系统中搜寻
abstract: The foraging problem asks how a collective of particles with limited computational, communication and movement capabilities can autonomously compress around a food source and disperse when the food is depleted or shifted, which may occur at arbitrary times. We would like the particles to iteratively self-organize, using only local interactions, to correctly gather whenever a food particle remains in a position long enough and search if no food particle has existed recently. Unlike previous approaches, these search and gather phases should be self-induced so as to be indefinitely repeatable as the food evolves, with microscopic changes to the food triggering macroscopic, system-wide phase transitions. We present a stochastic foraging algorithm based on a phase change in the fixed magnetization Ising model from statistical physics: Our algorithm is the first to leverage self-induced phase changes as an algorithmic tool. A key component of our algorithm is a careful token passing mechanism ensuring a dispersion broadcast wave will always outpace a compression wave. We also present a highly structured alternative algorithm that gathers by incrementally building a spiral tightly wrapped around the food particle.
summary: The foraging problem asks how a collective of particles with limited computational, communication and movement capabilities can autonomously compress around a food source and disperse when the food is depleted or shifted, which may occur at arbitrary times. We would like the particles to iteratively self-organize, using only local interactions, to correctly gather whenever a food particle remains in a position long enough and search if no food particle has existed recently. Unlike previous approaches, these search and gather phases should be self-induced so as to be indefinitely repeatable as the food evolves, with microscopic changes to the food triggering macroscopic, system-wide phase transitions. We present a stochastic foraging algorithm based on a phase change in the fixed magnetization Ising model from statistical physics: Our algorithm is the first to leverage self-induced phase changes as an algorithmic tool. A key component of our algorithm is a careful token passing mechanism ensuring a dispersion broadcast wave will always outpace a compression wave. We also present a highly structured alternative algorithm that gathers by incrementally building a spiral tightly wrapped around the food particle.
abstract_zh: 觅食问题询问计算、通信和运动能力有限的一组粒子如何能够在食物源周围自主压缩，并在食物耗尽或转移时分散（这种情况可能在任意时间发生）。我们希望粒子能够迭代地自组织，仅使用局部相互作用，每当食物粒子保持在一个位置足够长的时间时就能正确聚集，并搜索最近是否没有食物粒子存在。与以前的方法不同，这些搜索和收集阶段应该是自我诱导的，以便随着食物的进化而无限重复，食物的微观变化会触发宏观的、全系统的相变。我们提出了一种基于统计物理学固定磁化 Ising 模型中的相变的随机觅食算法：我们的算法是第一个利用自感应相变作为算法工具的算法。我们算法的一个关键组成部分是仔细的令牌传递机制，确保分散广播波始终超过压缩波。我们还提出了一种高度结构化的替代算法，该算法通过逐步构建紧紧包裹在食物颗粒周围的螺旋来收集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过自诱导相变机制，使有限能力的粒子群体在食物存在时聚集、食物消失时分散，并能适应动态变化的环境。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以实现粒子群体对动态食物源的持续适应，需设计无需外部触发、能通过微观变化引发宏观相变的自组织算法。
AI.method: 基于统计物理Ising模型的相变特性，提出随机算法与令牌传递机制，确保分散波速快于压缩波速；另设计螺旋结构算法实现紧密聚集。
AI.result: 首次将自诱导相变作为算法工具，实现粒子群体在食物存在时正确聚集、无食物时搜索，并通过微观变化触发系统级相变。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过物理相变原理实现了动态环境下的自组织行为，为群体智能系统提供了新的算法框架和理论支持。

search_text: Foraging in Particle Systems via Self-Induced Phase Changes 通过自诱导相变在粒子系统中搜寻 The foraging problem asks how a collective of particles with limited computational, communication and movement capabilities can autonomously compress around a food source and disperse when the food is depleted or shifted, which may occur at arbitrary times. We would like the particles to iteratively self-organize, using only local interactions, to correctly gather whenever a food particle remains in a position long enough and search if no food particle has existed recently. Unlike previous approaches, these search and gather phases should be self-induced so as to be indefinitely repeatable as the food evolves, with microscopic changes to the food triggering macroscopic, system-wide phase transitions. We present a stochastic foraging algorithm based on a phase change in the fixed magnetization Ising model from statistical physics: Our algorithm is the first to leverage self-induced phase changes as an algorithmic tool. A key component of our algorithm is a careful token passing mechanism ensuring a dispersion broadcast wave will always outpace a compression wave. We also present a highly structured alternative algorithm that gathers by incrementally building a spiral tightly wrapped around the food particle. 觅食问题询问计算、通信和运动能力有限的一组粒子如何能够在食物源周围自主压缩，并在食物耗尽或转移时分散（这种情况可能在任意时间发生）。我们希望粒子能够迭代地自组织，仅使用局部相互作用，每当食物粒子保持在一个位置足够长的时间时就能正确聚集，并搜索最近是否没有食物粒子存在。与以前的方法不同，这些搜索和收集阶段应该是自我诱导的，以便随着食物的进化而无限重复，食物的微观变化会触发宏观的、全系统的相变。我们提出了一种基于统计物理学固定磁化 Ising 模型中的相变的随机觅食算法：我们的算法是第一个利用自感应相变作为算法工具的算法。我们算法的一个关键组成部分是仔细的令牌传递机制，确保分散广播波始终超过压缩波。我们还提出了一种高度结构化的替代算法，该算法通过逐步构建紧紧包裹在食物颗粒周围的螺旋来收集。 本文研究如何通过自诱导相变机制，使有限能力的粒子群体在食物存在时聚集、食物消失时分散，并能适应动态变化的环境。 Shunhao Oh,Dana Randall,Andréa W.
